# Integrate Binance Login with your web application | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Using OAuth to Access Binance API
=================================

Binance APIs utilize the [OAuth 2.0](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6749)
 protocol for authentication and authorization. Binance supports common OAuth 2.0 scenarios such as those for web server, single page (browser based), mobile and native applications. This document will guide you through how your application communicates with Binance's OAuth 2.0 server to secure a user's consent for performing an API request on his behalf.

To begin, your application must identify the necessary permissions, or `scopes`. Visit the [Binance Developer Center](https://developers.binance.com/en)
, sign up for a Binance entity account, and from there, navigate to your console to create an OAuth application and get your own client ID and client secret. For now, Binance Login (Oauth2.0), is exclusively offered to close ecosystem partners. Please reach to our business team for further information.

Depending on your specific application type, you can select one of the two different authorization flows listed here:

1.  For web applications, please refer to the ‘Authorization Code Flow’ section;
2.  For browser-based applications as well as mobile and native applications, please refer to the ‘PCKE Flow’ section.

1\. Authorization Code Flow[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#1-authorization-code-flow "1. Authorization Code Flow的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Step 1. Redirect users to request Binance access and set authorization parameters.[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-1-redirect-users-to-request-binance-access-and-set-authorization-parameters "Step 1. Redirect users to request Binance access and set authorization parameters.的直接链接")

    GET https://accounts.binance.com/en/oauth/authorize?    response_type=code&    client_id=YOUR_CLIENT_ID&    redirect_uri=YOUR_REDIRECT_URI&    state=CSRF_TOKEN&    scope=SCOPES

> ⚠️ The carriage returns of the above example are only for readability and should be removed in real world, as well as the following examples

When redirecting a user to Binance to authorize access to your application, your first step is to create the authorization request.

| Parameters | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `response_type` | **Required** Value `code` |
| `client_id` | **Required** The client ID of your application. |
| `redirect_uri` | **required** The URL in your web application where users will be redirected after authorization. This value needs to be URL encoded. |
| `state` | **Optional** The CSRF token to protect against CSRF (cross-site request forgery) attacks. |
| `scope` | **required** List of scopes enum your application requests access to, with comma (`,`) seperated. |

Here is an Example of an authorization URL:

    GET https://accounts.binance.com/en/oauth/authorize?    response_type=code&    client_id=a28f296f2cbe6c64b4d5dec24735d39b1b6fffcf&    redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fdomain.com%2Foauth%2Fcallback&    state=377f36a4557ab5935b36&    scope=user:openId,create:apikey

### Step 2. Binance prompts user for consent[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-2-binance-prompts-user-for-consent "Step 2. Binance prompts user for consent的直接链接")

In this step, the user decides whether to grant your application the requested access. At this stage, Binance displays a consent window that shows the name of your application and the Binance API services that it is requesting permission to access with the user's authorization credentials. The user can then consent or refuse to grant access to your application.

Your application doesn't need to do anything at this stage as it waits for Binance's OAuth 2.0 server to redirect back.

### Step 3. Binance redirects back to your application[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-3-binance-redirects-back-to-your-application "Step 3. Binance redirects back to your application的直接链接")

If the user approves your application, Binance's OAuth server will redirect back to your `redirect_uri` with a temporary authorization `code` parameter.

If you specified a `state` parameter in step 1, the parameter will be included as well. If you generate a random string or encode the hash of a cookie or another value that captures the client's `state`, you can validate the response to additionally ensure that the request and response originated in the same browser, providing protection against attacks such as cross-site request forgery.

Example of the redirection:

    GET https://domain.com/oauth/callback?    code=cf6941ae8918b6a008f1377f36a4557ab5935b36&    state=377f36a4557ab5935b36

> `state` is the same as the one in step 1

### Step 4. Exchange authorization code for refresh and access tokens[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-4-exchange-authorization-code-for-refresh-and-access-tokens "Step 4. Exchange authorization code for refresh and access tokens的直接链接")

After your application receives the authorization `code`, it can exchange the authorization `code` for an access token, which can be done by make a POST call:

    POST https://accounts.binance.com/oauth/token?client_id=YOUR_CLIENT_ID&client_secret=YOUR_CLIENT_SECRET&grant_type=authorization_code&code=STEP3_CODE&redirect_uri=YOUR_REDIRECT_URI

| Parameter | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `grant_type` | **required** Value `authorization_code` |
| `code` | **required** Step3 return code |
| `client_id` | **required** The client ID of your application. |
| `client_secret` | **required** The client secret of your application. |
| `redirect_uri` | **required** The URL in your web application where users will be redirected after authorization. This value needs to be URL encoded. |

Example POST call:

    curl https://accounts.binance.com/oauth/token \  -X POST  -d 'client_id=je-client&client_secret=je-client-secret&grant_type=authorization_code&code=95OfIm&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fdomain.com%2Foauth%2Fcallback'

After a successful request, a valid `access_token` will be returned in the response and it will be invalid if it exceeds the `expires_in` time in the response, which is in seconds.

Here is an example response:

    {  "access_token": "83f2bf51-a2c4-4c2e-b7c4-46cef6a8dba5",  "refresh_token": "fb5587ee-d9cf-4cb5-a586-4aed72cc9bea",  "scope": "read",  "token_type": "bearer",  "expires_in": 30714}

### Step 5. Exchange refresh token for access tokens[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-5-exchange-refresh-token-for-access-tokens "Step 5. Exchange refresh token for access tokens的直接链接")

If your access token is expired, you can use `refresh_token` to get a new access token, which can be done by make a POST call:

    POST https://accounts.binance.com/oauth/token?client_id=YOUR_CLIENT_ID&client_secret=YOUR_CLIENT_SECRET&grant_type=refresh_token&refresh_token=STEP4_REFRESH_TOKEN

| Parameter | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `grant_type` | **required** Value `refresh_token` |
| `refresh_token` | **required** Step4 refresh token |
| `client_id` | **required** The client ID of your application. |
| `client_secret` | **required** The client secret of your application. |
| Example POST call: |     |

    curl https://accounts.binance.com/oauth/token \  -X POST  -d 'client_id=je-client&client_secret=je-client-secret&grant_type=refresh_token&refresh_token=95OfIm

After a successful request, a valid `access_token` will be returned in the response and it will be invalid if it exceeds the `expires_in` time in the response, which is in seconds.

Here is an example response:

    {  "access_token": "83f2bf51-a2c4-4c2e-b7c4-46cef6a8dba5",  "refresh_token": "fb5587ee-d9cf-4cb5-a586-4aed72cc9bea",  "scope": "read",  "token_type": "bearer",  "expires_in": 30714}

### Step 6. Calling Binance APIs[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-6-calling-binance-apis "Step 6. Calling Binance APIs的直接链接")

After you have a valid `access_token`, you can make your first API call:

    curl 'https://www.binanceapis.com/oauth-api/v1/user-info' \--header 'Authorization: Bearer {access_token}'

**Response:**

    {  "code": "000000",  "message": null,  "data": {    "userId": "e10e20b7f20947e7bd206b15ce3dae90",    "email": "xx@xx.com"  },  "success": true}

2\. PKCE Flow[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#2-pkce-flow "2. PKCE Flow的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The PKCE extension prevents an attack where the authorization code is intercepted and exchanged for an access token by a malicious client, by providing the authorization server with a way to verify the same client instance that exchanges the authorization code is the same one that initiated the flow. For more details, refer to [https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7636](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7636)

### Step 1. Redirect users to request Binance access and set authorization parameters.[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-1-redirect-users-to-request-binance-access-and-set-authorization-parameters-1 "Step 1. Redirect users to request Binance access and set authorization parameters.的直接链接")

    GET https://accounts.binance.com/en/oauth/authorize?    response_type=code&    client_id=YOUR_CLIENT_ID&    redirect_uri=YOUR_REDIRECT_URI&    state=CSRF_TOKEN&    scope=SCOPES&    code_challenge=CODE_CHALLENGE&    code_challenge_method=S256

> ⚠️ The carriage returns of the above example are only for readability and should be removed in real world, as well as the following examples

When redirecting a user to Binance to authorize access to your application, your first step is to create the authorization request. You need create and store a new PKCE code\_verifier, also will be used in STEP4

Here is an Example of javascript generate code\_verifier

    // Generate a secure random string using the browser crypto functionsfunction generateRandomString() {  var array = new Uint32Array(28);  window.crypto.getRandomValues(array);  return Array.from(array, (dec) => ("0" + dec.toString(16)).substr(-2)).join(    ""  );}

| Parameters | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `response_type` | **Required** Value `code` |
| `client_id` | **Required** The client ID of your application. |
| `redirect_uri` | **required** The URL in your web application where users will be redirected after authorization. This value needs to be URL encoded. |
| `state` | **Optional** The CSRF token to protect against CSRF (cross-site request forgery) attacks. |
| `scope` | **required** List of scopes enum your application requests access to, with comma (`,`) seperated. |
| `code_challenge` | **required** Hash and base64-urlencode of code\_verifier |

Here is an Example of javascript generate code\_challenge

    // Calculate the SHA256 hash of the input text.function sha256(code_verifier) {  const encoder = new TextEncoder();  const data = encoder.encode(code_verifier);  return window.crypto.subtle.digest("SHA-256", data);}// Base64-urlencodes the input stringfunction base64urlencode(hashed) {  return btoa(String.fromCharCode.apply(null, new Uint8Array(hashed)))    .replace(/\+/g, "-")    .replace(/\//g, "_")    .replace(/=+$/, "");}// Return the base64-urlencoded sha256 hash for the PKCE challengeasync function generateCodeChallenge(code_verifier) {  hashed = await sha256(code_verifier);  return base64urlencode(hashed);}

Here is an Example of an authorization URL:

    GET https://accounts.binance.com/en/oauth/authorize?    response_type=code&    client_id=a28f296f2cbe6c64b4d5dec24735d39b1b6fffcf&    redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fdomain.com%2Foauth%2Fcallback&    state=377f36a4557ab5935b36&    scope=user:openId,create:apikey&    code_challenge=ARU184muFVaDi3LObH5YTZSxqA5ZdYPLspCl7wFwV0U    code_challenge_method=S256

### Step 2. Binance prompts user for consent[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-2-binance-prompts-user-for-consent-1 "Step 2. Binance prompts user for consent的直接链接")

In this step, the user decides whether to grant your application the requested access. At this stage, Binance displays a consent window that shows the name of your application and the Binance API services that it is requesting permission to access with the user's authorization credentials. The user can then consent or refuse to grant access to your application.

Your application doesn't need to do anything at this stage as it waits for Binance's OAuth 2.0 server to redirect back.

### Step 3. Binance redirects back to your application[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-3-binance-redirects-back-to-your-application-1 "Step 3. Binance redirects back to your application的直接链接")

If the user approves your application, Binance's OAuth server will redirect back to your `redirect_uri` with a temporary authorization `code` parameter.

If you specified a `state` parameter in step 1, the parameter will be included as well. If you generate a random string or encode the hash of a cookie or another value that captures the client's `state`, you can validate the response to additionally ensure that the request and response originated in the same browser, providing protection against attacks such as cross-site request forgery.

Example of the redirection:

    GET https://domain.com/oauth/callback?    code=cf6941ae8918b6a008f1377f36a4557ab5935b36&    state=377f36a4557ab5935b36

> `state` is the same as the one in step 1

### Step 4. Exchange authorization code for refresh and access tokens[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-4-exchange-authorization-code-for-refresh-and-access-tokens-1 "Step 4. Exchange authorization code for refresh and access tokens的直接链接")

After your application receives the authorization `code`, it can exchange the authorization `code` for an access token, which can be done by make a POST call:

    POST https://accounts.binance.com/oauth/token?client_id=YOUR_CLIENT_ID&code_verifier=STEP1_CODE_VERIFIER&grant_type=authorization_code&code=STEP3_CODE&redirect_uri=YOUR_REDIRECT_URI

| Parameter | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `grant_type` | **required** Value `authorization_code` |
| `code` | **required** Step3 return code |
| `client_id` | **required** The client ID of your application. |
| `code_verifier` | **required** The random secret code created and stored in STEP1 |
| `redirect_uri` | **required** The URL in your web application where users will be redirected after authorization. This value needs to be URL encoded. |

Example POST call:

    curl https://accounts.binance.com/oauth/token \  -X POST  -d 'client_id=je-client&code_verifier=65a4ecce1fe857067bec7a6887529531831ebe38e32da95fe0f322a2&grant_type=authorization_code&code=95OfIm&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fdomain.com%2Foauth%2Fcallback'

After a successful request, a valid `access_token` will be returned in the response and it will be invalid if it exceeds the `expires_in` time in the response, which is in seconds.

Here is an example response:

    {  "access_token": "83f2bf51-a2c4-4c2e-b7c4-46cef6a8dba5",  "refresh_token": "fb5587ee-d9cf-4cb5-a586-4aed72cc9bea",  "scope": "read",  "token_type": "bearer",  "expires_in": 30714}

### Step 5. Exchange refresh token for access tokens[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-5-exchange-refresh-token-for-access-tokens-1 "Step 5. Exchange refresh token for access tokens的直接链接")

If your access token is expired, you can use `refresh_token` to get a new access token, which can be done by make a POST call:

    POST https://accounts.binance.com/oauth/token?client_id=YOUR_CLIENT_ID&client_secret=YOUR_CLIENT_SECRET&grant_type=refresh_token&refresh_token=STEP4_REFRESH_TOKEN

| Parameter | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `grant_type` | **required** Value `refresh_token` |
| `refresh_token` | **required** Step4 refresh token |
| `client_id` | **required** The client ID of your application. |
| `client_secret` | **required** The client secret of your application. |
| Example POST call: |     |

    curl https://accounts.binance.com/oauth/token \  -X POST  -d 'client_id=je-client&client_secret=je-client-secret&grant_type=refresh_token&refresh_token=95OfIm

After a successful request, a valid `access_token` will be returned in the response and it will be invalid if it exceeds the `expires_in` time in the response, which is in seconds.

Here is an example response:

    {  "access_token": "83f2bf51-a2c4-4c2e-b7c4-46cef6a8dba5",  "refresh_token": "fb5587ee-d9cf-4cb5-a586-4aed72cc9bea",  "scope": "read",  "token_type": "bearer",  "expires_in": 30714}

### Step 6. Calling Binance APIs[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-6-calling-binance-apis-1 "Step 6. Calling Binance APIs的直接链接")

After you have a valid `access_token`, you can make your first API call:

    curl 'https://www.binanceapis.com/oauth-api/v1/user-info' \--header 'Authorization: Bearer {access_token}'

**Response:**

    {  "code": "000000",  "message": null,  "data": {    "userId": "e10e20b7f20947e7bd206b15ce3dae90",    "email": "xx@xx.com"  },  "success": true}

*   [1\. Authorization Code Flow](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#1-authorization-code-flow)
    *   [Step 1. Redirect users to request Binance access and set authorization parameters.](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-1-redirect-users-to-request-binance-access-and-set-authorization-parameters)
        
    *   [Step 2. Binance prompts user for consent](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-2-binance-prompts-user-for-consent)
        
    *   [Step 3. Binance redirects back to your application](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-3-binance-redirects-back-to-your-application)
        
    *   [Step 4. Exchange authorization code for refresh and access tokens](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-4-exchange-authorization-code-for-refresh-and-access-tokens)
        
    *   [Step 5. Exchange refresh token for access tokens](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-5-exchange-refresh-token-for-access-tokens)
        
    *   [Step 6. Calling Binance APIs](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-6-calling-binance-apis)
        
*   [2\. PKCE Flow](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#2-pkce-flow)
    *   [Step 1. Redirect users to request Binance access and set authorization parameters.](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-1-redirect-users-to-request-binance-access-and-set-authorization-parameters-1)
        
    *   [Step 2. Binance prompts user for consent](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-2-binance-prompts-user-for-consent-1)
        
    *   [Step 3. Binance redirects back to your application](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-3-binance-redirects-back-to-your-application-1)
        
    *   [Step 4. Exchange authorization code for refresh and access tokens](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/#step-4-exchange-authorization-code-for-refresh-and-access-tokens-1)

本页总览

获得折价买币产品列表(USER\_DATA)
======================

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/discount-buy/market-data#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

获得折价买币产品列表

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/discount-buy/market-data#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/accumulator/product/list`

请求权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/discount-buy/market-data#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "请求权重的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**1(IP)**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/discount-buy/market-data#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| targetAsset | STRING | NO  | 目标币种，仅支持非稳定币 |
| investAsset | STRING | NO  | 申购的币种，仅支持稳定币 |
| pageSize | LONG | YES | 最小： 10, 最大：100 |
| pageIndex | NUMBER | YES | 默认：1 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  | 该值不能大于 60000 |
| timestamp | DATETIME | YES |     |

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/discount-buy/market-data#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "total": 1,    "list": [        {            "id": "741590",            "investAsset": "USDT",            "targetAsset": "BTC",            "strikePrice": "114111",            "knockoutPrice":"118000",            "duration": 4,            "settleDate": 1709020800000,            "purchaseDecimal": 2,            "purchaseEndTime": 1708934400000,            "canPurchase": true, //true, false            "knockOutApr": "0.3",            "orderId": 8257205859,            "minAmount": "0.01",            "maxAmount": "100000",            "createTimestamp": 1708560084000        }    ]}

    调用需要签名的接口时，请在计算签名之前对 payload 进行百分比编码（percent-encode）。不符合此顺序的请求将被拒绝，并返回错误代码 [`-1022 签名不正确`](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/error-code#-1022-invalid_signature)
    。请检查并相应地更新您代码中的签名逻辑部分。

# Get Discount Buy product list | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/discount-buy/market-data/Get-Discount-Buy-product-list#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

获得折价买币产品列表(USER\_DATA)
======================

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/discount-buy/market-data/Get-Discount-Buy-product-list#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

获得折价买币产品列表

====================

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

申购折价买币产品

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/discount-buy/trade#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/accumulator/product/subscribe`

请求权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/discount-buy/trade#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "请求权重的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |

获得折价买币产品持仓状态(USER\_DATA)
========================

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/discount-buy/trade/Get-Discount-Buy-positions#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

获得双币产品持仓状态(批量接口)

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/discount-buy/trade/Get-Discount-Buy-positions#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/accumulator/product/position/list`

请求权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/discount-buy/trade/Get-Discount-Buy-positions#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "请求权重的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**1(IP)**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/discount-buy/trade/Get-Discount-Buy-positions#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| status | ENUM | NO  | `PENDING`:产品申购中，将稍后给出结果;`PURCHASE_SUCCESS`:申购成功;`SETTLED`: 产品已经结算;`PURCHASE_FAIL`:申购失败;`REFUNDING`:退款中;`REFUND_SUCCESS`:退款成功，资金返回现货账户; `SETTLING`:产品正在结算中，如果不填写该字段，则返回所有持仓信息。 |
| pageSize | LONG | YES | 最小： 10, 最大：100 |
| pageIndex | INT | YES | 默认：1 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  | 该值不能大于 60000 |
| timestamp | DATETIME | YES |     |

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/discount-buy/trade/Get-Discount-Buy-positions#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

====================

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/market-data#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

获得双币产品列表

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/market-data#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/dci/product/list`

请求权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/market-data#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "请求权重的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**1(IP)**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/market-data#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| optionType | STRING | YES | 输入CALL 或者 PUT |
| exercisedCoin | STRING | YES | 行权币种，例如：如果您认购高卖产品（看涨期权），您应该输入:`optionType`:CALL,`exercisedCoin`:USDT,`investCoin`:BNB; 如果您认购低买产品（看跌期权），您应该输入: `optionType`:PUT,`exercisedCoin`:BNB,`investCoin`:USDT |
| investCoin | STRING | YES | 申购币种，例如：如果您认购高卖产品（看涨期权），您应该输入:`optionType`:CALL,`exercisedCoin`:USDT,`investCoin`:BNB; 如果您认购低买产品（看跌期权），您应该输入: `optionType`:PUT,`exercisedCoin`:BNB,`investCoin`:USDT |
| pageSize | LONG | NO  | 默认： 10, 最大：100 |
| pageIndex | INT | NO  | 默认：1 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  | 该值不能大于 60000 |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/market-data#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

====================

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/market-data/Get-Dual-Investment-product-list#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

获得双币产品列表

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/market-data/Get-Dual-Investment-product-list#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/dci/product/list`

请求权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/market-data/Get-Dual-Investment-product-list#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "请求权重的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**1(IP)**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/market-data/Get-Dual-Investment-product-list#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| optionType | STRING | YES | 输入CALL 或者 PUT |
| exercisedCoin | STRING | YES | 行权币种，例如：如果您认购高卖产品（看涨期权），您应该输入:`optionType`:CALL,`exercisedCoin`:USDT,`investCoin`:BNB; 如果您认购低买产品（看跌期权），您应该输入: `optionType`:PUT,`exercisedCoin`:BNB,`investCoin`:USDT |
| investCoin | STRING | YES | 申购币种，例如：如果您认购高卖产品（看涨期权），您应该输入:`optionType`:CALL,`exercisedCoin`:USDT,`investCoin`:BNB; 如果您认购低买产品（看跌期权），您应该输入: `optionType`:PUT,`exercisedCoin`:BNB,`investCoin`:USDT |
| pageSize | LONG | NO  | 默认： 10, 最大：100 |
| pageIndex | INT | NO  | 默认：1 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  | 该值不能大于 60000 |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/market-data/Get-Dual-Investment-product-list#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "total": 1,    "list": [        {            "id": "741590",            "investCoin": "USDT",            "exercisedCoin": "BNB",            "strikePrice": "380",            "duration": 4,            "settleDate": 1709020800000,            "purchaseDecimal": 8,            "purchaseEndTime": 1708934400000,            "canPurchase": true, //true, false            "apr": "0.6076",            "orderId": 8257205859,            "minAmount": "0.1",            "maxAmount": "25265.7",            "createTimestamp": 1708560084000,            "optionType": "PUT",            "isAutoCompoundEnable": true, //true, false            "autoCompoundPlanList": [                "STANDARD",                "ADVANCE"            ]        }    ]}

*   [接口描述](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/market-data/Get-Dual-Investment-product-list#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0)
    
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/market-data/Get-Dual-Investment-product-list#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)
    
*   [请求权重](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/market-data/Get-Dual-Investment-product-list#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D)
    
*   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/market-data/Get-Dual-Investment-product-list#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)
    
*   [响应示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/market-data/Get-Dual-Investment-product-list#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)

# Subscribe Dual Investment products | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

申购双币产品(USER\_DATA)
==================

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

申购双币产品

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/dci/product/subscribe`

请求权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "请求权重的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**1(IP)**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| id  | STRING | YES | 从 `/sapi/v1/dci/product/list` 获得id |
| orderId | STRING | YES | 从 `/sapi/v1/dci/product/list` 获得orderId |
| depositAmount | DECIMAL | YES | 申购金额 |
| autoCompoundPlan | ENUM | YES | 输入参数：`NONE`, `STANDARD`, `ADVANCED`, NONE=关闭自动复投计划,STANDARD= 基础计划,ADVANCED= 进阶计划 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  | 该值不能大于 60000 |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

失败消息：

*   Products are not available. 代表APR变小或者订单不可用。
*   Failed. 代表系统或者网络错误。

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {  "positionId": 10208824,  "investCoin": "BNB",  "exercisedCoin": "USDT",  "subscriptionAmount": "0.002",  "duration": 4,  "autoCompoundPlan": "STANDARD", //基础计划, 进阶计划;autoCompoundPlan为None时此字段不显示  "strikePrice": "380",  "settleDate": 1709020800000,  "purchaseStatus": "PURCHASE_SUCCESS",  "apr": "0.7397",  "orderId": 8259117597,  "purchaseTime": 1708677583874,  "optionType": "CALL"}

*   [接口描述](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0)
    
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)
    
*   [请求权重](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

改变自动复投状态

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Change-Auto-Compound-status#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/dci/product/auto_compound/edit-status`

# Get Dual Investment positions | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Get-Dual-Investment-positions#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

获得双币产品持仓状态(USER\_DATA)
======================

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Get-Dual-Investment-positions#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

获得双币产品持仓状态(批量接口)

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Get-Dual-Investment-positions#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/dci/product/positions`

请求权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Get-Dual-Investment-positions#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "请求权重的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**1(IP)**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Get-Dual-Investment-positions#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| status | ENUM | NO  | `PENDING`:产品申购中，将稍后给出结果;`PURCHASE_SUCCESS`:申购成功;`SETTLED`: 产品已经结算;`PURCHASE_FAIL`:申购失败;`REFUNDING`:退款中;`REFUND_SUCCESS`:退款成功，资金返回现货账户; `SETTLING`:产品正在结算中，如果不填写该字段，则返回所有持仓信息。 |
| pageSize | LONG | NO  | 默认： 10, 最大：100 |
| pageIndex | INT | NO  | 默认：1 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  | 该值不能大于 60000 |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Get-Dual-Investment-positions#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "total": 1,    "list": [        {            "id": "10160533", //positionId            "investCoin": "USDT",            "exercisedCoin": "BNB",            "subscriptionAmount": "0.5",            "strikePrice": "330",            "duration": 4,            "settleDate": 1708416000000,            "purchaseStatus": "PURCHASE_SUCCESS",            "apr": "0.0365",            "orderId": 7973677530,            "purchaseEndTime": 1708329600000, //申购中, 申购成功, 已结算, 申购失败, 退款中, 退款成功, 结算中            "optionType": "PUT",            "autoCompoundPlan": "STANDARD", //关闭计划, 基础计划, 进阶计划            "subscriptionTime": 1708243200000        }    ]}

*   [接口描述](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Get-Dual-Investment-positions#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0)
    
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Get-Dual-Investment-positions#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)

# 快速开始 | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/quick-start#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

快速开始
====

API Key 权限设置[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/quick-start#api-key-%E6%9D%83%E9%99%90%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE "API Key 权限设置的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   新创建的API的默认权限是 `只读`。
*   如果需要通过API提款, 需要在UI修改权限, 选中 `允许提现`。

账户[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/quick-start#%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7 "账户的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 现货账户[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/quick-start#%E7%8E%B0%E8%B4%A7%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7 "现货账户的直接链接")

新注册的币安账号都会有一个现货(`SPOT`)账号。

### 杠杆账户[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/quick-start#%E6%9D%A0%E6%9D%86%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7 "杠杆账户的直接链接")

为了开设杠杆(`MARGIN`)账户, 可以参考[Binance杠杆交易账户设置指南](https://www.binance.vision/zh/tutorials/binance-margin-trading-guide)

API 代码库[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/quick-start#api-%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%E5%BA%93 "API 代码库的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Connectors[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/quick-start#connectors "Connectors的直接链接")

以下有一些轻量级的代码库，使不同语言的用户能够直接调用现货的 Binance 公共 API：

*   Python [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-python](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-python)
    
*   JavaScript [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-js](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-js)
    
*   Ruby [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-ruby](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-ruby)
    
*   DotNET C# [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-dotnet](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-dotnet)
    
*   Java [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-java](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-java)
    
*   Rust [https://github.com/binance/binance-spot-connector-rust](https://github.com/binance/binance-spot-connector-rust)
    
*   PHP [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-php](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-php)
    
*   Go [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-go](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-go)
    

### Postman Collections[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/quick-start#postman-collections "Postman Collections的直接链接")

Postman 集合现已推出。推荐给寻求快速和轻松地开始使用 API 的新用户。

[https://github.com/binance/binance-api-postman](https://github.com/binance/binance-api-postman)

### Swagger[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/quick-start#swagger "Swagger的直接链接")

以下有提供包含 RESTful API 的 OpenAPI 规范的 YAML 文件，以及可供参考的 Swagger UI 页面。

[https://github.com/binance/binance-api-swagger](https://github.com/binance/binance-api-swagger)

*   [API Key 权限设置](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/quick-start#api-key-%E6%9D%83%E9%99%90%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE)
    
*   [账户](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/quick-start#%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7)
    *   [现货账户](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/quick-start#%E7%8E%B0%E8%B4%A7%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7)
        
    *   [杠杆账户](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/quick-start#%E6%9D%A0%E6%9D%86%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7)
        
*   [API 代码库](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/quick-start#api-%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%E5%BA%93)
    *   [Connectors](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/quick-start#connectors)

# Subscribe Dual Investment products | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Subscribe-Dual-Investment-products#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

申购双币产品(USER\_DATA)
==================

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Subscribe-Dual-Investment-products#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

申购双币产品

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Subscribe-Dual-Investment-products#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/dci/product/subscribe`

请求权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Subscribe-Dual-Investment-products#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "请求权重的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**1(IP)**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Subscribe-Dual-Investment-products#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| id  | STRING | YES | 从 `/sapi/v1/dci/product/list` 获得id |
| orderId | STRING | YES | 从 `/sapi/v1/dci/product/list` 获得orderId |
| depositAmount | DECIMAL | YES | 申购金额 |
| autoCompoundPlan | ENUM | YES | 输入参数：`NONE`, `STANDARD`, `ADVANCED`, NONE=关闭自动复投计划,STANDARD= 基础计划,ADVANCED= 进阶计划 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  | 该值不能大于 60000 |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

失败消息：

*   Products are not available. 代表APR变小或者订单不可用。
*   Failed. 代表系统或者网络错误。

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Subscribe-Dual-Investment-products#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {  "positionId": 10208824,  "investCoin": "BNB",  "exercisedCoin": "USDT",  "subscriptionAmount": "0.002",  "duration": 4,  "autoCompoundPlan": "STANDARD", //基础计划, 进阶计划;autoCompoundPlan为None时此字段不显示  "strikePrice": "380",  "settleDate": 1709020800000,  "purchaseStatus": "PURCHASE_SUCCESS",  "apr": "0.7397",  "orderId": 8259117597,  "purchaseTime": 1708677583874,  "optionType": "CALL"}

*   [接口描述](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Subscribe-Dual-Investment-products#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0)
    
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Subscribe-Dual-Investment-products#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)
    
*   [请求权重](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Subscribe-Dual-Investment-products#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D)
    
*   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Subscribe-Dual-Investment-products#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)
    
*   [响应示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/advanced_earn/dual-investment/trade/Subscribe-Dual-Investment-products#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)

联系我们
====

    *   咨询关于API或者Websockets性能方面的问题.
    *   咨询文档中没有提及的API问题.
*   [币安开发者社区](https://dev.binance.vision/)
    *   咨询关于API/Websockets代码实现，或者任何API/Websockets的问题.
*   [币安客服](https://www.binance.com/cn/support-center)
    *   咨询关于账户，钱包，2FA等.

# 更新日志 | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/change-log#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

更新日志
====

2025-12-26[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/change-log#2025-12-26 "2025-12-26的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 时效性通知[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/change-log#%E6%97%B6%E6%95%88%E6%80%A7%E9%80%9A%E7%9F%A5 "时效性通知的直接链接")

*   **以下有关于REST API变更将在 2026-01-15 07:OO UTC 发生:**  
    调用需要签名的接口时，请在计算签名之前对 payload 进行百分比编码（percent-encode）。不符合此顺序的请求将被拒绝，并返回错误代码 [`-1022 签名不正确`](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/error-code#-1022-invalid_signature)
    。请检查并相应地更新您代码中的签名逻辑部分。

### REST API[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/change-log#rest-api "REST API的直接链接")

*   更新了 REST API 文档中有关于 [签名请求示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/general-info#post-apiv3order-%E7%9A%84%E7%AD%BE%E5%90%8D%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)
     的部分。

* * *

2023-04-18[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/change-log#2023-04-18 "2023-04-18的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   新增现货策略交易接口：
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/algo/spot/newOrderTwap` 以支持现货策略下单
    *   `DELETE /sapi/v1/algo/spot/order` 以支持现货策略委托撤单
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/algo/spot/openOrders` 以支持查询现货策略当前委托
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/algo/spot/historicalOrders` 以支持查询现货策略历史订单
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/algo/spot/subOrders` 以支持查询现货策略子订单

* * *

2022-04-27[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/change-log#2022-04-27 "2022-04-27的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   新增合约策略交易接口：
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/algo/futures/newOrderTwap` 以支持合约 Twap 策略下单

FAQ: [时间加权平均价格策略(Twap) 介绍](https://www.binance.com/cn/support/faq/093927599fd54fd48857237f6ebec0b0)

* * *

2022-04-13[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/change-log#2022-04-13 "2022-04-13的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   新增合约策略交易接口：
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/algo/futures/newOrderVp` 以支持合约 vp 策略下单
    *   `DELETE /sapi/v1/algo/futures/order` 以支持合约策略委托撤单
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/algo/futures/openOrders` 以支持查询合约策略当前委托
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/algo/futures/historicalOrders` 以支持查询合约策略历史订单
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/algo/futures/subOrders` 以支持查询合约策略子订单

FAQ: [成交量份额参与算法(VP) 介绍](https://www.binance.com/cn/support/faq/b0b94dcc8eb64c2585763b8747b60702)

*   [2025-12-26](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/change-log#2025-12-26)
    *   [时效性通知](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/change-log#%E6%97%B6%E6%95%88%E6%80%A7%E9%80%9A%E7%9F%A5)

# Query Current Algo Open Orders (USER_DATA) | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo/Query-Current-Algo-Open-Orders#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

查询当前策略订单挂单(USER\_DATA)
======================

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo/Query-Current-Algo-Open-Orders#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

查询当前策略订单挂单

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo/Query-Current-Algo-Open-Orders#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/algo/futures/openOrders`

请求权重(IP)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo/Query-Current-Algo-Open-Orders#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Dip "请求权重(IP)的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**1**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo/Query-Current-Algo-Open-Orders#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

> *   您的 API Key 需要开通 `允许合约交易` 权限
> *   请使用Base URL: [https://api.binance.com](https://api.binance.com/)
>     

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo/Query-Current-Algo-Open-Orders#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "total": 1,    "orders": [        {             "algoId": 14517,      //策略订单ID            "symbol": "ETHUSDT",  //交易对            "side": "SELL",       //买卖方向            "positionSide": "SHORT", //持仓模式            "totalQty": "5.000",     //总共下单数量            "executedQty": "0.000",  //执行数量            "executedAmt": "0.00000000",   //执行价值            "avgPrice": "0.00",            //平均价格            "clientAlgoId": "d7096549481642f8a0bb69e9e2e31f2e",  //用户自定义策略订单ID            "bookTime": 1649756817004,     //用户下单时间             "endTime": 0,                  //结束时间            "algoStatus": "WORKING",       //策略订单状态            "algoType": "VP",              //策略订单类型            "urgency": "LOW"               //执行速率        }    ]}

*   [接口描述](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo/Query-Current-Algo-Open-Orders#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0)
    
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo/Query-Current-Algo-Open-Orders#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)
    
*   [请求权重(IP)](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo/Query-Current-Algo-Open-Orders#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Dip)
    
*   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo/Query-Current-Algo-Open-Orders#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)
    
*   [响应示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo/Query-Current-Algo-Open-Orders#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)

# 基本信息 | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/alpha/market-data/general-info#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

通用信息
====

这是关于币安Alpha交易的文档。所有接口均使用HTTP GET请求，返回JSON格式的数据。因为是公共接口，所以无需身份验证。

重要提示[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/alpha/market-data/general-info#%E9%87%8D%E8%A6%81%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA "重要提示的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

对于需要symbol参数的接口（例如，交易量、历史交易或K线数据），请先调用Token列表接口以获取可用代币列表。在响应中，根据代币符号名称（例如 "ZKJ" 或 "QUQ"）确定对应的ALPHA代币ID。然后，按格式ALPHA\_<token\_id><quote\_asset>构造symbol参数（例如，ALPHA\_173USDT表示代币ID为173，计价资产为USDT的代币）。

*   [重要提示](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/alpha/market-data/general-info#%E9%87%8D%E8%A6%81%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA)

---

# token列表 | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/alpha/market-data/rest-api#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Token列表
=======

描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/alpha/market-data/rest-api#%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "描述的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

获取所有可用ALPHA代币的列表，包括它们的ID和符号。用于在其它接口构造symbol参数时查找代币ID。

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/alpha/market-data/rest-api#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/bapi/defi/v1/public/wallet-direct/buw/wallet/cex/alpha/all/token/list`

完整URL[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/alpha/market-data/rest-api#%E5%AE%8C%E6%95%B4url "完整URL的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[https://www.binance.com/bapi/defi/v1/public/wallet-direct/buw/wallet/cex/alpha/all/token/list](https://www.binance.com/bapi/defi/v1/public/wallet-direct/buw/wallet/cex/alpha/all/token/list)

参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/alpha/market-data/rest-api#%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "参数的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

无

响应结构[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/alpha/market-data/rest-api#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%84 "响应结构的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   `code`：字符串（例如，000000表示成功）
*   `message`: 空，通常用于返回信息提示。
*   `messageDetail`: 空，通常用于更详细信息或错误描述。
*   `success`: 布尔值，表示此次API调用是否成功（true）。
*   `data`：对象数组，每个对象代表一个代币，包含字段：
    *   `alphaId`：整数（ALPHA代币ID，例如ALPHA\_175）
    *   `symbol`：字符串（代币符号，例如“USDT”）
    *   `name`：字符串（代币全名，例如“USDT”）
    *   `chainId`: 字符串 (链ID)
    *   `contractAddress`: 字符串 (合约地址)
    *   其他字段：可能包括小数位、网络信息等。

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/alpha/market-data/rest-api#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "code": "000000",    "message": "",    "messageDetail": "",    "success": true,    "data": [        {            "tokenId": "3F350C8B3621770A673159B7A19BC034",            "chainId": "56",            "chainIconUrl": "https://bin.bnbstatic.com/image/admin_mgs_image_upload/20250228/d0216ce4-a3e9-4bda-8937-4a6aa943ccf2.png",            "chainName": "BSC",            "contractAddress": "0xcf640fdf9b3d9e45cbd69fda91d7e22579c14444",            "name": "gorilla",            "symbol": "gorilla",            "iconUrl": "https://bin.bnbstatic.com/images/web3-data/public/token/logos/248b5406f88a4ee28913a29107875339.png",            "price": "0.00080595003978242023",            "percentChange24h": "-7.42",            "volume24h": "14847.711222633409558029675",            "marketCap": "805950.03978242",            "fdv": "805950.03978242",            "liquidity": "263192.72813121626034",            "totalSupply": "1000000000",            "circulatingSupply": "1000000000",            "holders": "7120",            "decimals": 18,            "listingCex": false,            "hotTag": false,            "cexCoinName": "",            "canTransfer": false,            "denomination": 1,            "offline": false,            "tradeDecimal": 8,            "alphaId": "ALPHA_175",            "offsell": false,            "priceHigh24h": "0.00088873864475645879",            "priceLow24h": "0.0008020805165487083",            "count24h": "166",            "onlineTge": false,            "onlineAirdrop": false,            "score": 1,            "cexOffDisplay": false,            "stockState": false,            "listingTime": 1746686700000,            "mulPoint": 1,            "bnExclusiveState": false        }    ]}

使用示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/alpha/market-data/rest-api#%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "使用示例的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

先调用此接口以映射代币符号到ALPHA代币ID。

*   [描述](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/alpha/market-data/rest-api#%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0)
    
*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/alpha/market-data/rest-api#http-request)

*   [参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/alpha/market-data/rest-api#%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)
    
*   [响应结构](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/alpha/market-data/rest-api#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%84)
    
*   [响应示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/alpha/market-data/rest-api#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)

# Volume Participation(VP) New Order (TRADE) | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

成交量份额参与算法(VP)下单(TRADE)
======================

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

发送VP下单 仅支持U本位合约

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/algo/futures/newOrderVp`

请求权重(UID)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Duid "请求权重(UID)的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**3000**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| symbol | STRING | YES | 交易对 eg. BTCUSDT |
| side | ENUM | YES | 买卖方向 ( BUY or SELL ) |
| positionSide | ENUM | NO  | 持仓方向，单向持仓模式下非必填，默认且仅可填BOTH;在双向持仓模式下必填,且仅可选择 LONG 或 SHORT |
| quantity | DECIMAL | YES | 下单数量， 以合约币种（base asset）个数下单; 名义价值 (`quantity` \* `标记价格(base asset)`) 需要大于 10,000 USDT，且不超过 1,000,000 USDT |
| urgency | ENUM | YES | 代表当前执行的相对速率; ENUM: LOW（慢）, MEDIUM（中等）, HIGH（快） |
| clientAlgoId | STRING | NO  | 必须传入32位，如果未发送，则自动生成 |
| reduceOnly | BOOLEAN | NO  | true, false; 非双开模式下默认false；双开模式下不接受此参数； 开仓不接受此参数 |
| limitPrice | DECIMAL | NO  | 限价单价格; 若未发送，则以市场价下单 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

其他信息:

> *   最大所有策略订单挂单数量： 10。
> *   杠杆倍数和持仓模式与您的合约账户设置相同，您可以通过合约交易页面设置或者通过fapi设置。
> *   收到 `"success": true` 不代表您的订单一定会被执行。请通过查询订单接口（`GET sapi/v1/algo/futures/openOrders` 或者 `GET sapi/v1/algo/futures/historicalOrders`）以获取订单状态。 例如: 如果您的合约账户余额不足，或者开仓使用了`reduce only`参数，或者您下单选择的持仓模式与您设置的不符，这些情况您都会收到响应 `"success": true`，但订单状态会显示为 `expired`，代表订单过期。
> *   您的 API Key 需要开通 `允许合约交易` 权限
> *   请使用Base URL: [https://api.binance.com](https://api.binance.com/)
>     

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "clientAlgoId": "00358ce6a268403398bd34eaa36dffe7", //用户自定义策略订单ID    "success": true,     "code": 0,    "msg": "OK"}

*   [接口描述](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0)
    
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)
    
*   [请求权重(UID)](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Duid)
    
*   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)
    
*   [响应示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)

---

# Time Weighted Average Price (Twap) New Order(TRADE) | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/spot-algo/Time-Weighted-Average-Price-New-Order#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

时间加权平均价格策略(Twap)下单(TRADE)
=========================

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/spot-algo/Time-Weighted-Average-Price-New-Order#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

通过算法服务进行时间加权平均价格策略（TWAP）下单交易

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/spot-algo/Time-Weighted-Average-Price-New-Order#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/algo/spot/newOrderTwap`

请求权重(UID)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/spot-algo/Time-Weighted-Average-Price-New-Order#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Duid "请求权重(UID)的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**3000**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/spot-algo/Time-Weighted-Average-Price-New-Order#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| symbol | STRING | YES | 交易对 eg. BTCUSDT |
| side | ENUM | YES | 买卖方向 ( BUY or SELL ) |
| quantity | DECIMAL | YES | 下单数量， 以Base资产个数下单; 每单支持最大的金额会是200,000， 2,000,000或者10,000,000 USD等额的，取决于币对。请降低您的下单金额，如果您的下单金额超过了上限。 |
| duration | LONG | YES | 请以秒为单位发送\[300,86400\]；少于 5 分钟 => 默认为 5 分钟；大于 24h => 默认为 24h |
| clientAlgoId | STRING | NO  | 必须传入32位，如果未发送，则自动生成 |
| limitPrice | DECIMAL | NO  | 限价单价格; 若未发送，则以市场价下单 |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

> *   最大所有策略订单挂单数量： 20。

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/spot-algo/Time-Weighted-Average-Price-New-Order#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo/Query-Sub-Orders#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/algo/futures/subOrders`

请求权重(IP)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo/Query-Sub-Orders#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Dip "请求权重(IP)的直接链接")

**1**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo/Query-Sub-Orders#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| algoId | LONG | YES |     |
| page | INT | NO  | 默认1 |
| pageSize | INT | NO  | 最小 1， 最大 100; 默认 100 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

> *   您的 API Key 需要开通 `允许合约交易` 权限
> *   请使用Base URL: [https://api.binance.com](https://api.binance.com/)
>     

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/future-algo/Query-Sub-Orders#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "total": 1,    "executedQty": "1.000",    "executedAmt": "3229.44000000",    "subOrders": [        {            "algoId": 13723,    //策略订单ID            "orderId": 8389765519993908929,  //子订单ID            "orderStatus": "FILLED",         //子订单状态            "executedQty": "1.000",          //执行数量            "executedAmt": "3229.44000000",  //执行价值            "feeAmt": "-1.61471999",         //手续费            "feeAsset": "USDT",              //手续费币种            "bookTime": 1649319001964,       //下单时间            "avgPrice": "3229.44",           //平均价格            "side": "SELL",                  //买卖方向            "symbol": "ETHUSDT",             //交易对            "subId": 1,                      //子订单执行顺序ID            "timeInForce": "IMMEDIATE_OR_CANCEL",  //有效方式            "origQty": "1.000"              //原始委托数量        }    ]}

# Binance Account Bound Token | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/babt#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Background[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/babt#background "Background的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Soulbound Token (SBT) is a new concept proposed by Vitalik Buterin recently(Soul Bound idea and the recent paper about decentralized society). It will be a keystone for Web3 to go to the next level, "Decentralized Society" (DeSoc).

SBTs are most like NFTs we see today, but they have two key different properties.

1.  Non-transferable - When someone gets an SBT, He/She cannot transfer this SBT to another address.
2.  Revocable - SBTs can be revoked by issuers.

Suppose Binance issues Binance Account Bound(BAB) tokens which are credentials of Binance KYC users. So here are the potential scenarios to use these tokens:

1.  A new protocol only airdrops to addresses with BAB tokens since business cooperation.
2.  A NFT only allows minting from addresses with BAB tokens to avoid bots.
3.  A DAO only allows voting from addresses with BAB tokens, and each such address will have a cap of voting power to ensure governance fairness.
4.  A DAO uses Quadratic Voting, and only allows addresses with BAB tokens.

Purpose[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/babt#purpose "Purpose的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

SBTs are still in the stage of concept. We have two purposes for this pilot project.

1.  Accumulate the influence in the cutting-edge technology field of the chain world.
2.  Introduce some new elements to promote the ecological prosperity of BSC.

Goal[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/babt#goal "Goal的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------

We will give a practice about SBT by issuing BAB tokens. Users can mint, revoke and check BAB tokens on the Binance platform.

Disclaimer[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/babt#disclaimer "Disclaimer的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

BAB Token is a non-fungible token issued by Binance characterized as a soulbound token. Getting a BAB Token is optional for Binance users and Binance's role is limited to issuing (upon request) the BAB Token for users who have completed identity verification procedures for their Binance account, which may vary depending on the user's country of residence. Third-party projects such as decentralized protocols, decentralized autonomous organizations, or decentralized applications have sole authority and discretion to decide whether or not to integrate BAB Tokens into their ecosystem, the purposes for which they will use it and whether BAB Tokens are suitable for their product or ecosystem, without any involvement of Binance. Binance is not making any representation to third-party projects about the holders of the BAB Tokens. Use of BAB Tokens by third-party projects in any way should not be construed as a recommendation, vetting, or endorsement of such third-party projects by Binance, BNB Chain, or any other affiliated entity.

*   [Background](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/babt#background)
    
*   [Purpose](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/babt#purpose)
    
*   [Goal](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/babt#goal)
    
*   [Disclaimer](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/babt#disclaimer)

# Time Weighted Average Price (Twap) New Order(TRADE) | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/spot-algo#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

时间加权平均价格策略(Twap)下单(TRADE)
=========================

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/spot-algo#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

通过算法服务进行时间加权平均价格策略（TWAP）下单交易

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/spot-algo#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/algo/spot/newOrderTwap`

请求权重(UID)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/spot-algo#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Duid "请求权重(UID)的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**3000**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/spot-algo#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| symbol | STRING | YES | 交易对 eg. BTCUSDT |
| side | ENUM | YES | 买卖方向 ( BUY or SELL ) |
| quantity | DECIMAL | YES | 下单数量， 以Base资产个数下单; 每单支持最大的金额会是200,000， 2,000,000或者10,000,000 USD等额的，取决于币对。请降低您的下单金额，如果您的下单金额超过了上限。 |
| duration | LONG | YES | 请以秒为单位发送\[300,86400\]；少于 5 分钟 => 默认为 5 分钟；大于 24h => 默认为 24h |
| clientAlgoId | STRING | NO  | 必须传入32位，如果未发送，则自动生成 |
| limitPrice | DECIMAL | NO  | 限价单价格; 若未发送，则以市场价下单 |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

> *   最大所有策略订单挂单数量： 20。

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/spot-algo#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "clientAlgoId": "65ce1630101a480b85915d7e11fd5078", //用户自定义策略订单ID    "success": true,     "code": 0,    "msg": "OK"}

*   [接口描述](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/spot-algo#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0)
    
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/spot-algo#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)

*   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/algo/spot-algo#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)
