# Send primary mode | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/send-primary-mode/send-primary-mode#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Send primary mode
=================

As we know, Binance Connect has a wide range of application scenarios. In addition to on-ramp (buy) and off-ramp (sell), Binance Connect can also be used as a crypto payment channel/tool, that is, users can directly use the crypto balance in their Binance wallet to make third-party payments. This is the "send primary mode" we launched.

In send primary mode, the product process and user flow are different from the normal on-ramp (buy), as follows:

*   Send (transfer) crypto will be promoted as the first priority;
*   Buy crypto related features will be downgraded and hidden, users don't need to buy crypto, they only need to send (transfer) crypto from their Binance wallet;
*   Only in one case, when the crypto balance in user's Binance wallet is insufficient, the flow will return back to the buy crypto process, to avoid users being blocked here;

How to integrate send primary mode[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/send-primary-mode/send-primary-mode#how-to-integrate-send-primary-mode "How to integrate send primary mode的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you are going to integrate send primary mode, please follow these instructions:

1.  Contact Binance Connect team to enable this feature for you (it's disabled by default);
2.  Pass `"SEND_PRIMARY": true` or `"SEND_PRIMARY_FLEXIBLE": true` in the `customization` parameter of the pre-order API. Please refer to [Customization](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/basics/9.customization)
    .

### Difference between SEND\_PRIMARY and SEND\_PRIMARY\_FLEXIBLE[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/send-primary-mode/send-primary-mode#difference-between-send_primary-and-send_primary_flexible "Difference between SEND_PRIMARY and SEND_PRIMARY_FLEXIBLE的直接链接")

*   **SEND\_PRIMARY**: The crypto amount is locked and fixed based on the amount specified in the pre-order API. Users cannot modify the amount on the Binance Connect page. Should work together with `amountType: 2`.
*   **SEND\_PRIMARY\_FLEXIBLE**: The crypto amount specified in the pre-order API will be used as a default value, but users can freely input and modify the amount on the Binance Connect page. This provides more flexibility for users to adjust the payment amount as needed.

> **Note**: You should only use either `SEND_PRIMARY` or `SEND_PRIMARY_FLEXIBLE`, not both at the same time.

Typical Send Flow[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/send-primary-mode/send-primary-mode#typical-send-flow "Typical Send Flow的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  **Initiate Send & Fetch Info**
    
    *   The user initiates a crypto transfer from Binance on the partner's frontend.
    *   The partner's backend requests the list of supported crypto networks and trading pairs from Binance Connect.
    *   This information is then relayed to the partner's frontend to be displayed to the user.
2.  **Confirm & Create Pre-order**
    
    *   The user confirms the details on the partner's frontend.
    *   The partner's backend sends a pre-order request to Binance Connect.
    *   Binance Connect returns a `redirectUrl` in the response.
3.  **Redirect to Binance**
    
    *   The partner's frontend redirects the user to the Binance App/website using the `redirectUrl`.
4.  **Complete Flow on Binance**
    
    *   The user completes the send process on the Binance platform.
    *   Note: If the user's balance is insufficient, the flow will include a buy step before sending.
5.  **Webhook Notification**
    
    *   Binance Connect sends a webhook notification to the partner's backend about the order status update.
6.  **Query Order Status**
    
    *   The partner's backend can then query the order details from Binance Connect to get the final status of the transaction.

Diagram[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/send-primary-mode/send-primary-mode#diagram "Diagram的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![send-flow.png](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/assets/images/send-flow-fb3d602472913895b2a78cedd0550281.png)

*   [How to integrate send primary mode](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/send-primary-mode/send-primary-mode#how-to-integrate-send-primary-mode)
    *   [Difference between SEND\_PRIMARY and SEND\_PRIMARY\_FLEXIBLE](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/send-primary-mode/send-primary-mode#difference-between-send_primary-and-send_primary_flexible)
        
*   [Typical Send Flow](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/send-primary-mode/send-primary-mode#typical-send-flow)
    
*   [Diagram](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/send-primary-mode/send-primary-mode#diagram)

---

# Send primary mode | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/send-primary-mode#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Send primary mode
=================

As we know, Binance Connect has a wide range of application scenarios. In addition to on-ramp (buy) and off-ramp (sell), Binance Connect can also be used as a crypto payment channel/tool, that is, users can directly use the crypto balance in their Binance wallet to make third-party payments. This is the "send primary mode" we launched.

In send primary mode, the product process and user flow are different from the normal on-ramp (buy), as follows:

*   Send (transfer) crypto will be promoted as the first priority;
*   Buy crypto related features will be downgraded and hidden, users don't need to buy crypto, they only need to send (transfer) crypto from their Binance wallet;
*   Only in one case, when the crypto balance in user's Binance wallet is insufficient, the flow will return back to the buy crypto process, to avoid users being blocked here;

How to integrate send primary mode[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/send-primary-mode#how-to-integrate-send-primary-mode "How to integrate send primary mode的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you are going to integrate send primary mode, please follow these instructions:

1.  Contact Binance Connect team to enable this feature for you (it's disabled by default);
2.  Pass `"SEND_PRIMARY": true` or `"SEND_PRIMARY_FLEXIBLE": true` in the `customization` parameter of the pre-order API. Please refer to [Customization](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/basics/9.customization)
    .

### Difference between SEND\_PRIMARY and SEND\_PRIMARY\_FLEXIBLE[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/send-primary-mode#difference-between-send_primary-and-send_primary_flexible "Difference between SEND_PRIMARY and SEND_PRIMARY_FLEXIBLE的直接链接")

*   **SEND\_PRIMARY**: The crypto amount is locked and fixed based on the amount specified in the pre-order API. Users cannot modify the amount on the Binance Connect page. Should work together with `amountType: 2`.
*   **SEND\_PRIMARY\_FLEXIBLE**: The crypto amount specified in the pre-order API will be used as a default value, but users can freely input and modify the amount on the Binance Connect page. This provides more flexibility for users to adjust the payment amount as needed.

> **Note**: You should only use either `SEND_PRIMARY` or `SEND_PRIMARY_FLEXIBLE`, not both at the same time.

Typical Send Flow[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/send-primary-mode#typical-send-flow "Typical Send Flow的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  **Initiate Send & Fetch Info**
    
    *   The user initiates a crypto transfer from Binance on the partner's frontend.
    *   The partner's backend requests the list of supported crypto networks and trading pairs from Binance Connect.
    *   This information is then relayed to the partner's frontend to be displayed to the user.
2.  **Confirm & Create Pre-order**
    
    *   The user confirms the details on the partner's frontend.
    *   The partner's backend sends a pre-order request to Binance Connect.
    *   Binance Connect returns a `redirectUrl` in the response.
3.  **Redirect to Binance**
    
    *   The partner's frontend redirects the user to the Binance App/website using the `redirectUrl`.
4.  **Complete Flow on Binance**
    
    *   The user completes the send process on the Binance platform.
    *   Note: If the user's balance is insufficient, the flow will include a buy step before sending.
5.  **Webhook Notification**
    
    *   Binance Connect sends a webhook notification to the partner's backend about the order status update.
6.  **Query Order Status**
    
    *   The partner's backend can then query the order details from Binance Connect to get the final status of the transaction.

Diagram[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/send-primary-mode#diagram "Diagram的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![send-flow.png](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/assets/images/send-flow-fb3d602472913895b2a78cedd0550281.png)

*   [How to integrate send primary mode](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/send-primary-mode#how-to-integrate-send-primary-mode)
    *   [Difference between SEND\_PRIMARY and SEND\_PRIMARY\_FLEXIBLE](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/send-primary-mode#difference-between-send_primary-and-send_primary_flexible)
        
*   [Typical Send Flow](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/send-primary-mode#typical-send-flow)

# Webhook | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook/webhook#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Webhook
=======

Whenever a key event (currently only "order status change") occurs, Binance Connect will send a webhook message, and the partner (client) can receive this message at the webhook callback url and react accordingly, such as updating order data and frontend UI.

### Request Headers[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook/webhook#request-headers "Request Headers的直接链接")

| **Field** | **Type** | **Remarks** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| X-BN-Connect-Timestamp | timestamp | timestamp |
| X-BN-Connect-Signature | string | SHA256withRSA(**requestBody** + **X-Connect-Timestamp**) |
| X-BN-Connect-For | string | Same with your client id (X-Tesla-ClientId) |

### Request Body[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook/webhook#request-body "Request Body的直接链接")

| **Field** | **Type** | **Remarks** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| webhookEventType | string | A fixed value: connect\_order\_event |
| externalOrderId | string | The unique order id from the partner side. |
| type | int | 1: buy, 2: sell, 3: send |
| businessType | int | 1: fiat, 2: p2p, 3: send, 4: convert |
| status | int | Please refer to "[Order status](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/basics/7.order-status)<br>" |
| payMethodCode | string | The payment method code is from payment method list API |
| payMethodSubCode | string | The payment method sub code is from payment method list API |
| fiatCurrency | string | fiat currency |
| cryptoCurrency | string | crypto currency |
| openUserId | string | OpenUserId represents a Binance user ID that has been securely hashed. This field is provided to merchants to facilitate the identification of whether multiple orders originate from the same user. |
| fiatAmount | string | fiat amount |
| cryptoAmount | string | crypto amount |
| feeAmount | string | fee amount |
| feeCurrency | string | fee currency, USD or crypto |
| revenueAmount | string | partner revenue amount |
| revenueCurrency | string | partner revenue currency, USD or crypto |
| networkFee | string | network fee amount |
| withdrawWalletAddress | string | withdraw wallet address |
| withdrawNetwork | string | withdraw network |
| withdrawMemo | string | withdraw network memo |
| withdrawTxHash | string | withdraw tx hash |
| orderDetailLink | string | order detail link |
| orderTime | timestamp | order time |
| completionTime | timestamp | completion time |
| updateTime | timestamp | update time |
| convertInfo | object | Convert information. This field is only present for Convert orders. Refer to **ConvertInfo** |
| swapDetailInfoVo | object | If the order has swap operation. Then this field has value. Refer to **SwapDetailInfoVo** |
| userData | string | AES-encrypted JSON string (see details below). Disabled by default; contact us to enable |

#### SwapDetailInfoVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook/webhook#swapdetailinfovo "SwapDetailInfoVo的直接链接")

| **Field** | **Type** | **Remarks** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| fromCryptoCurrencyContractAddress | string | The "from" crypto contract address, typically a stablecoin or native token. |
| toCryptoCurrencyContractAddress | string | The contract address of the target coin the user intends to swap online. |
| toCryptoCurrencyAmount | string | The final amount of cryptocurrency the user swapped and received in their wallet. |

#### ConvertInfo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook/webhook#convertinfo "ConvertInfo的直接链接")

| **Field** | **Type** | **Remarks** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| fromCoin | string | The source cryptocurrency being converted from |
| fromCoinAmount | string | The amount of source cryptocurrency being converted |

#### userData field[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook/webhook#userdata-field "userData field的直接链接")

*   Type: string
    
*   Remarks: When enabled, `userData` contains a JSON object (serialized to a string) that is encrypted with AES. The field value is the AES-encrypted ciphertext encoded as a string. This field is disabled by default — please contact us if you need it enabled and for access to the AES key and configuration.
    
*   Decryption reference: follow the AES decryption instructions described in Binance documentation: [https://developers.binance.com/docs/binance-pay/authentication#decryption-instructions-for-merchant-data-sharing](https://developers.binance.com/docs/binance-pay/authentication#decryption-instructions-for-merchant-data-sharing)
    
*   JSON structure (plaintext before AES encryption):
    

| Field | Type | Remarks |
| --- | --- | --- |
| firstName | string | User's first name |
| middleName | string | User's middle name (optional) |
| lastName | string | User's last name |
| residenceCountry | string | Country code of residence (ISO) |
| birthday | string | Birthday in YYYY-MM-DD format |
| country | string | Country code (ISO) |
| refundAddress | string | Refund crypto address (if any) |
| refundNetwork | string | Network of refund (e.g., ETH) |
| refundMemo | string | Refund memo/memo field (if any) |

Notes:

*   Field names and types above show the expected JSON keys that will be present after decrypting `userData`.
*   The concrete AES parameters (mode, IV, padding) and key delivery method will be provided when the field is enabled; see the decryption reference link above for an example.

### Response Body[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook/webhook#response-body "Response Body的直接链接")

*   HTTP status code is 200
*   Response body is in JSON format.

| **Field** | **Type** | **Remarks** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| returnCode | string | SUCCESS or other code you wish to return to Binance Connect |
| returnMessage | string | the message you wish to return to Binance Connect |

### How signature works[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook/webhook#how-signature-works "How signature works的直接链接")

The encryption/decryption and verification process of webhook is exactly the opposite/mirrored of API request process. The sender and receiver of the two are opposite, but they are both processes that signed by the sender with a private key and verified by the receiver with a public key.

For API requests, the partner (client) generates a pair of keys. The private key is kept securely and privately by the partner (client). Then the partner (client) uses the private key to sign when initiating API requests. The public key is shared to Bianance Connect, with which Binance will verify the signature of the API request to ensure that the request is indeed initiated by the partner (client).

For webhook, it's an opposite/mirrored process. Binance Connect generates a pair of keys. The private key is kept securely and privately by Binance Connect. Then Binance Connect uses the private key to sign when initiating the webhook message. The public key is shared to the partner (client), with which the partner (client) can verify the signature of the webhook message to ensure that the message is indeed initiated by Binance.

#### The webhook signature flow is as follows:[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook/webhook#the-webhook-signature-flow-is-as-follows "The webhook signature flow is as follows:的直接链接")

![signature-Webhook.png](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/assets/images/signature-Webhook-8e2546351f3231e2cd4fa48bb8ed679f.png)

### Verify signature[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook/webhook#verify-signature "Verify signature的直接链接")

As mentioned above, Binance Connect initiates a webhook request to the webhook callback url provided by the partner ( client). And the partner (client) should verify the identity of the request initiator based on the public key provided by Binance Connect.

The example code below shows how to verify signature with public key:

    public static boolean verify(String srcData, PublicKey publicKey, String sign) throws Exception {    Signature signature = Signature.getInstance("SHA256withRSA");    signature.initVerify(publicKey);    signature.update(srcData.getBytes());    return signature.verify(Base64.decodeBase64(sign.getBytes()));}

### Example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook/webhook#example "Example的直接链接")

Request Body:

    {  "webhookEventType": "connect_order_event",  "externalOrderId": "180401941923045",  "type": 1,  "businessType": 1,  "status": 2,  "payMethodCode": "BUY_P2P",  "payMethodSubCode": "BANK",  "fiatCurrency": "EUR",  "cryptoCurrency": "USDT",  "openUserId": "f47ac10b58cc4372a5670e02b2c3d479",  "fiatAmount": "100",  "cryptoAmount": "107.8",  "feeAmount": "1",  "feeCurrency": "USDT",  "revenueAmount": "0.08",  "revenueCurrency": "USDT",  "networkFee": "0.5",  "withdrawWalletAddress": "0xbb4CdB98Bd36B01bD1cBaEA52De08d9173bc095c",  "withdrawNetwork": "BSC",  "withdrawMemo": "",  "withdrawTxHash": "0xcb163e2e6322cd6aa7bc4d45306029e846c0c06e9cdee45a06e88801d1231e71",  "orderDetailLink": "https://www.binance.com/en/my/wallet/exchange/buysell-history?type=buy",  "orderTime": 1723186761000,  "completionTime": 1723206761000,  "updateTime": 1734446642930}

### Example (Convert Order)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook/webhook#example-convert-order "Example (Convert Order)的直接链接")

Request Body:

    {  "webhookEventType": "connect_order_event",  "networkFee": null,  "feeCurrency": "USDT",  "type": 1,  "businessType": 4,  "withdrawMemo": "",  "revenueAmount": null,  "cryptoCurrency": "USDT",  "withdrawTxHash": "",  "completionTime": null,  "orderTime": 1753344231742,  "payMethodSubCode": "CUMBERLAND",  "cryptoAmount": "1.03",  "orderDetailLink": null,  "payMethodCode": "SPOT",  "revenueCurrency": "USDT",  "convertInfoVo": {    "fromCoin": "BNB",    "fromCoinAmount": 0.00137386  },  "swapDetailInfoVo": null,  "updateTime": 1753344255279,  "externalOrderId": "830315252102",  "withdrawWalletAddress": "0xbb4CdB98Bd36B01bD1cBaEA52De08d9173bc095c",  "fiatCurrency": "",  "fiatAmount": "0",  "withdrawNetwork": "ETH",  "status": 11}

*   [Request Headers](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook/webhook#request-headers)
    
*   [Request Body](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook/webhook#request-body)
    
*   [Response Body](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook/webhook#response-body)
    
*   [How signature works](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook/webhook#how-signature-works)
    
*   [Verify signature](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook/webhook#verify-signature)
    
*   [Example](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook/webhook#example)

# Overview | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Sandbox APIs Overview
=====================

Overview[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#overview "Overview的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The Sandbox APIs provide a safe testing environment for partners to integrate with Binance Connect without using real funds or affecting production systems. These APIs allow you to simulate the complete order lifecycle, test different order types, and verify your integration before going live.

_**Note1: The sandbox environment is isolated from production. All data and operations here do not impact real user accounts or transactions.**_

_**Note2: Invoke the pre-order API first, then use the sandbox APIs below.**_

Purpose[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#purpose "Purpose的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The sandbox environment enables you to:

*   Test order placement flows without real transactions
*   Simulate various order types (BUY, BUY\_P2P, SEND, Convert)
*   Manually control order status transitions for testing webhooks and order state management
*   Validate your integration with different scenarios and edge cases

Available APIs[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#available-apis "Available APIs的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 1\. Place Order[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#1-place-order "1. Place Order的直接链接")

Place standard test orders to simulate regular cryptocurrency purchase flows.

### 2\. Place Convert Feature Order[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#2-place-convert-feature-order "2. Place Convert Feature Order的直接链接")

Test cryptocurrency conversion scenarios where users convert from one crypto to another.

### 3\. Place Buy Any Token Order[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#3-place-buy-any-token-order "3. Place Buy Any Token Order的直接链接")

Simulate purchases of any token, including tokens not listed on Binance spot markets.

### 4\. Order Status Transition[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#4-order-status-transition "4. Order Status Transition的直接链接")

Manually trigger order status changes to test your order lifecycle management and webhook handling.

Testing Flow[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#testing-flow "Testing Flow的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

A typical testing workflow in the sandbox:

1.  **Place an Order**: Use one of the place order endpoints to create a test order
2.  **Verify Order Creation**: Check that your system correctly receives and processes the order
3.  **Trigger Status Transitions**: Use the order status transition API to simulate different order states
4.  **Test Webhooks**: Verify your webhook handlers correctly process status updates
5.  **Validate Order Queries**: Use the order query API to fetch and verify order details

Key Differences from Production[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#key-differences-from-production "Key Differences from Production的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   No real funds are used
*   Orders don't execute actual blockchain transactions
*   Status transitions are manual and controlled by the partner
*   All operations are isolated to the sandbox environment

Getting Started[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#getting-started "Getting Started的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

To start testing with sandbox APIs:

1.  Ensure you have sandbox credentials configured
2.  Review the individual API documentation for each endpoint
3.  Start with simple order placement and gradually test more complex scenarios
4.  Use the order status transition API to simulate various order states

Best Practices[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#best-practices "Best Practices的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Test all possible order types your integration will support
*   Verify error handling for invalid requests
*   Test webhook delivery and processing for all status transitions
*   Validate order query functionality with different order states
*   Test edge cases like very small or large amounts

*   [Overview](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#overview)
    
*   [Purpose](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#purpose)
    
*   [Available APIs](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#available-apis)
    *   [1\. Place Order](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#1-place-order)
        
    *   [2\. Place Convert Feature Order](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#2-place-convert-feature-order)
        
    *   [3\. Place Buy Any Token Order](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#3-place-buy-any-token-order)
        
    *   [4\. Order Status Transition](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#4-order-status-transition)
        
*   [Testing Flow](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#testing-flow)
    
*   [Key Differences from Production](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#key-differences-from-production)
    
*   [Getting Started](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#getting-started)
    
*   [Best Practices](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/sandbox#best-practices)

# Change Log | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/change-log#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Change Log
==========

### Nov 25, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/change-log#nov-25-2025 "Nov 25, 2025的直接链接")

*   Added userData in webhook and query-order-detail API.

### Oct 22, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/change-log#oct-22-2025 "Oct 22, 2025的直接链接")

*   Added p2p-only trading pair API

### Oct 20, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/change-log#oct-20-2025 "Oct 20, 2025的直接链接")

*   Added new field `webhookEventType` in the webhook payload.

### Oct 15, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/change-log#oct-15-2025 "Oct 15, 2025的直接链接")

*   Support 1024-bits RSA keys for enhanced security.

### Sep 10, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/change-log#sep-10-2025 "Sep 10, 2025的直接链接")

*   Added typical flow.

### Jul 24, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/change-log#jul-24-2025 "Jul 24, 2025的直接链接")

*   Added convert feature.
    *   Added convert-related fields in the webhook payload.
    *   Added convert-related fields in the query order detail API response.

### Jul 7, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/change-log#jul-7-2025 "Jul 7, 2025的直接链接")

*   Add REVOLUT, PIX payment methods examples to get payment method list API.
*   Add REVOLUT, PIX payment methods examples to get payment method list v2 API.

Add lock crypto & net\_receive example to pre-order API.
========================================================

### Jun 26, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/change-log#jun-26-2025 "Jun 26, 2025的直接链接")

*   Added swap-related fields to the webhook payload.

### May 26, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/change-log#may-26-2025 "May 26, 2025的直接链接")

*   Added buy any token (swap) section.
*   Added send primary mode section.
*   Added subtype of `FIAT_AMOUNT` and `CRYPTO_AMOUNT` for `LOCK_ORDER_ATTRIBUTES` customization capability.
*   Added customization capability of `NET_RECEIVE`.

### May 19, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/change-log#may-19-2025 "May 19, 2025的直接链接")

*   Added openUserId field in query order detail API and webhook payload.
*   Added LOCK\_ORDER\_ATTRIBUTES customization capability for amount for pre-order API.

### May 12, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/change-log#may-12-2025 "May 12, 2025的直接链接")

*   Added buy any token feature.
    *   Added new order status and state flow.
    *   Added new error codes.
    *   get payment method list API
        *   Added `contractAddress` field.
    *   get estimated quote API
        *   Added `contractAddress`, `address` field.
    *   pre-order API
        *   Added `contractAddress` field.
    *   query order detail API
        *   Added `contractAddress` field.
        *   Added `swapDetailInfoVo` field.

### December 25, 2024[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/change-log#december-25-2024 "December 25, 2024的直接链接")

*   Added customization support.

### December 18, 2024[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/change-log#december-18-2024 "December 18, 2024的直接链接")

*   Added Off-ramp (Sell) APIs.

### September 27, 2024[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/change-log#september-27-2024 "September 27, 2024的直接链接")

*   Added get payment method list v2 API.
*   Added pay method code and pay method sub code in get estimated quote API response.
*   Added redirectDeepLink,failRedirectDeepLink and clientIp fields in pre-order API request.

### August 9, 2024[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/change-log#august-9-2024 "August 9, 2024的直接链接")

*   Added revenue sharing related fields in API response.

### July 25, 2024[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/change-log#july-25-2024 "July 25, 2024的直接链接")

*   Adjusted the data structure of API response.

**2025-04-18**

Please see [https://www.binance.com/en/support/faq/detail/6b9a63f1e3384cf48a2eedb82767a69a](https://www.binance.com/en/support/faq/detail/6b9a63f1e3384cf48a2eedb82767a69a)
    

* * *

* * *

**2025-02-26**

*   Update sub account deposit history Endpoint `GET /sapi/v1/broker/subAccount/depositHist` , adding "travelRuleStatus".

* * *

**2024-10-30**

*   Update the `Weight(UID)` to 60 for Endpoint `GET /sapi/v3/broker/subAccount/futuresSummary` .

* * *

**2024-08-15**

*   New parameter `filterResult` will be available on August 16, 2024 for query futures commission rebate record:`GET /sapi/v1/broker/rebate/futures/recentRecord` . If `filterResult` \= TRUE, rebates not from its own sub accounts will be filtered out in response.

* * *

**2024-06-28**

*   New Endpoint for query futures assets of sub-accounts:`GET /sapi/v3/broker/subAccount/futuresSummary` .
*   Following endpoints will be deleted in a month: `GET /sapi/v1/broker/subAccount/futuresSummary` ,`GET /sapi/v2/broker/subAccount/futuresSummary` . Please migrate the usage of legacy version(v1&v2) to the new (v3) version as soon as possible.

* * *

**2024-06-06**

*   Endpoints adjustment: for internal transfers, the txid prefix has been replaced to “Off-chain transfer”on 28 May 2024. “internal transfer” flag is no longer available in the TXID field, including historical transactions, the following endpoints are impacted: `GET /sapi/v1/broker/subAccount/depositHist`.

* * *

**2024-04-30**

*   Update the request limit for endpoint: `POST /sapi/v1/broker/subAccountApi`. You can only create 1 api key for each sub account per second
    
*   Update the request limit for endpoint: `DELETE /sapi/v1/broker/subAccountApi`. You can only delete 1 api key for each sub account per second
    

* * *

**2024-03-05**

*   Remove endpoint: `POST /sapi/v1/broker/subAccount/blvt`.

* * *

**2023-10-04**

*   Remove endpoint: `POST /sapi/v1/broker/subAccountApi/permission/vanillaOptions`.

* * *

**2023-08-31**

*   Remove endpoint: `POST /sapi/v1/broker/subAccount/margin`. To enable the margin account, simply transfer assets into Cross Margin wallet.

* * *

**2023-06-08**

# Common API request headers | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/basics#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Common API request headers
==========================

| Parameter | Description | Mandatory | Remarks |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Content-Type | application/json | Yes |     |
| X-Tesla-ClientId | Partner (client) id provided by Binance Connect | Yes |     |
| X-Tesla-SignAccessToken | Access token provided by Binance Connect | Yes |     |
| X-Tesla-Signature | A signature generated by request body, timestamp and partner (client) private key\* | Yes | Refer to “[API Request signing](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/basics/3.request-signing)<br>” |
| X-Tesla-Timestamp | Timestamp in millisecond | Yes |     |

> \*_The private key and public key are generated by the partner (client). Please refer to “[API Request signing](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/basics/3.request-signing)
> ” for the generation method._

---

# Create a Sub Account | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Create a Sub Account
====================

API Description[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account#api-description "API Description的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

To create a link sub-account

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/broker/subAccount`

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| tag | STRING | NO  | tag length should be less than 32 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

**Caution:**

*   This request will generate a sub account under your brokerage master account.
*   You need to enable "trade" option for the api key which requests this endpoint.

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {  "subaccountId": "1",  "email": "vai_42038996_47411276_brokersubuser@lac.info",  "tag":"bob123d"}

*   [API Description](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account#api-description)
    
*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account#http-request)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account#request-parameters)
    
*   [Example Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account#example-response)

# Introduction | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Rest API Information[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link#rest-api-information "Rest API Information的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   The base endpoint for Exchange Link is: **[https://api.binance.com](https://api.binance.com/)
    **
*   The base endpoint for Link and Trade(Spot) is: **[https://api.binance.com](https://api.binance.com/)
    **
*   The base endpoint for Link and Trade(Futures) is: **[https://fapi.binance.com](https://fapi.binance.com/)
    **
*   All endpoints return either a JSON object or array.
*   Data is returned in **ascending** order. Oldest first, newest last.
*   All time and timestamp related fields are in milliseconds.
*   HTTP `4XX` return codes are used for for malformed requests; the issue is on the sender's side.
*   HTTP `429` return code is used when breaking a request rate limit.
*   HTTP `418` return code is used when an IP has been auto-banned for continuing to send requests after receiving `429` codes.
*   HTTP `5XX` return codes are used for internal errors; the issue is on Binance's side. It is important to **NOT** treat this as a failure operation; the execution status is **UNKNOWN** and could have been a success.
*   Any endpoint can return an ERROR; the error payload is as follows:

    {  "code": -1121,  "msg": "Invalid symbol."}

*   Specific error codes and messages defined in another document.
*   For `GET` endpoints, parameters must be sent as a `query string`.
*   For `POST`, `PUT`, and `DELETE` endpoints, the parameters may be sent as a `query string` or in the `request body` with content type `application/x-www-form-urlencoded`. You may mix parameters between both the `query string` and `request body` if you wish to do so.
*   Parameters may be sent in any order.
*   If a parameter sent in both the `query string` and `request body`, the `query string` parameter will be used.

IP Limits[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link#ip-limits "IP Limits的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Every request will contain `X-MBX-USED-WEIGHT-(intervalNum)(intervalLetter)` in the response headers which has the current used weight for the IP for all request rate limiters defined.
*   Each route has a `weight` which determines for the number of requests each endpoint counts for. Heavier endpoints and endpoints that do operations on multiple symbols will have a heavier `weight`. The default weight for each request is 1, if not specify.
*   When a 429 is received, it's your obligation as an API to back off and not spam the API.
*   **Repeatedly violating rate limits and/or failing to back off after receiving 429s will result in an automated IP ban (HTTP status 418).**
*   IP bans are tracked and **scale in duration** for repeat offenders, **from 2 minutes to 3 days**.
*   A `Retry-After` header is sent with a 418 or 429 responses and will give the **number of seconds** required to wait, in the case of a 429, to prevent a ban, or, in the case of a 418, until the ban is over.
*   **The limits on the API are based on the IPs, not the API keys.**

Endpoint Security Type[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link#endpoint-security-type "Endpoint Security Type的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Each endpoint has a security type that determines the how you will interact with it.
*   API-keys are passed into the Rest API via the `X-MBX-APIKEY` header.
*   API-keys and secret-keys **are case sensitive**.
*   API-keys can be configured to only access certain types of secure endpoints. For example, one API-key could be used for TRADE only, while another API-key can access everything except for TRADE routes.
*   By default, API-keys can access all secure routes.

| Security Type | Description |
| --- | --- |
| TRADE | Endpoint requires sending a valid API-Key and signature. |
| USER\_DATA | Endpoint requires sending a valid API-Key and signature. |

Note[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link#note "Note的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

#### Email address[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link#email-address "Email address的直接链接")

*   Email address should be encoded. e.g. [alice@test.com](mailto:alice@test.com)
     should be encoded into alice%40test.com
*   Email address should be in lower case.

*   [Rest API Information](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link#rest-api-information)

# Create a Sub Account | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-a-Sub-Account#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Create a Sub Account
====================

API Description[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-a-Sub-Account#api-description "API Description的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

To create a link sub-account

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-a-Sub-Account#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/broker/subAccount`

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-a-Sub-Account#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| tag | STRING | NO  | tag length should be less than 32 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

**Caution:**

*   This request will generate a sub account under your brokerage master account.
*   You need to enable "trade" option for the api key which requests this endpoint.

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-a-Sub-Account#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {  "subaccountId": "1",  "email": "vai_42038996_47411276_brokersubuser@lac.info",  "tag":"bob123d"}

*   [API Description](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-a-Sub-Account#api-description)
    
*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-a-Sub-Account#http-request)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-a-Sub-Account#request-parameters)
    
*   [Example Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-a-Sub-Account#example-response)

# Webhook | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Webhook
=======

Whenever a key event (currently only "order status change") occurs, Binance Connect will send a webhook message, and the partner (client) can receive this message at the webhook callback url and react accordingly, such as updating order data and frontend UI.

### Request Headers[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook#request-headers "Request Headers的直接链接")

| **Field** | **Type** | **Remarks** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| X-BN-Connect-Timestamp | timestamp | timestamp |
| X-BN-Connect-Signature | string | SHA256withRSA(**requestBody** + **X-Connect-Timestamp**) |
| X-BN-Connect-For | string | Same with your client id (X-Tesla-ClientId) |

### Request Body[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook#request-body "Request Body的直接链接")

| **Field** | **Type** | **Remarks** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| webhookEventType | string | A fixed value: connect\_order\_event |
| externalOrderId | string | The unique order id from the partner side. |
| type | int | 1: buy, 2: sell, 3: send |
| businessType | int | 1: fiat, 2: p2p, 3: send, 4: convert |
| status | int | Please refer to "[Order status](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/basics/7.order-status)<br>" |
| payMethodCode | string | The payment method code is from payment method list API |
| payMethodSubCode | string | The payment method sub code is from payment method list API |
| fiatCurrency | string | fiat currency |
| cryptoCurrency | string | crypto currency |
| openUserId | string | OpenUserId represents a Binance user ID that has been securely hashed. This field is provided to merchants to facilitate the identification of whether multiple orders originate from the same user. |
| fiatAmount | string | fiat amount |
| cryptoAmount | string | crypto amount |
| feeAmount | string | fee amount |
| feeCurrency | string | fee currency, USD or crypto |
| revenueAmount | string | partner revenue amount |
| revenueCurrency | string | partner revenue currency, USD or crypto |
| networkFee | string | network fee amount |
| withdrawWalletAddress | string | withdraw wallet address |
| withdrawNetwork | string | withdraw network |
| withdrawMemo | string | withdraw network memo |
| withdrawTxHash | string | withdraw tx hash |
| orderDetailLink | string | order detail link |
| orderTime | timestamp | order time |
| completionTime | timestamp | completion time |
| updateTime | timestamp | update time |
| convertInfo | object | Convert information. This field is only present for Convert orders. Refer to **ConvertInfo** |
| swapDetailInfoVo | object | If the order has swap operation. Then this field has value. Refer to **SwapDetailInfoVo** |
| userData | string | AES-encrypted JSON string (see details below). Disabled by default; contact us to enable |

#### SwapDetailInfoVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook#swapdetailinfovo "SwapDetailInfoVo的直接链接")

| **Field** | **Type** | **Remarks** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| fromCryptoCurrencyContractAddress | string | The "from" crypto contract address, typically a stablecoin or native token. |
| toCryptoCurrencyContractAddress | string | The contract address of the target coin the user intends to swap online. |
| toCryptoCurrencyAmount | string | The final amount of cryptocurrency the user swapped and received in their wallet. |

#### ConvertInfo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook#convertinfo "ConvertInfo的直接链接")

| **Field** | **Type** | **Remarks** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| fromCoin | string | The source cryptocurrency being converted from |
| fromCoinAmount | string | The amount of source cryptocurrency being converted |

#### userData field[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook#userdata-field "userData field的直接链接")

*   Type: string
    
*   Remarks: When enabled, `userData` contains a JSON object (serialized to a string) that is encrypted with AES. The field value is the AES-encrypted ciphertext encoded as a string. This field is disabled by default — please contact us if you need it enabled and for access to the AES key and configuration.
    
*   Decryption reference: follow the AES decryption instructions described in Binance documentation: [https://developers.binance.com/docs/binance-pay/authentication#decryption-instructions-for-merchant-data-sharing](https://developers.binance.com/docs/binance-pay/authentication#decryption-instructions-for-merchant-data-sharing)
    
*   JSON structure (plaintext before AES encryption):
    

| Field | Type | Remarks |
| --- | --- | --- |
| firstName | string | User's first name |
| middleName | string | User's middle name (optional) |
| lastName | string | User's last name |
| residenceCountry | string | Country code of residence (ISO) |
| birthday | string | Birthday in YYYY-MM-DD format |
| country | string | Country code (ISO) |
| refundAddress | string | Refund crypto address (if any) |
| refundNetwork | string | Network of refund (e.g., ETH) |
| refundMemo | string | Refund memo/memo field (if any) |

Notes:

*   Field names and types above show the expected JSON keys that will be present after decrypting `userData`.
*   The concrete AES parameters (mode, IV, padding) and key delivery method will be provided when the field is enabled; see the decryption reference link above for an example.

### Response Body[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook#response-body "Response Body的直接链接")

*   HTTP status code is 200
*   Response body is in JSON format.

| **Field** | **Type** | **Remarks** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| returnCode | string | SUCCESS or other code you wish to return to Binance Connect |
| returnMessage | string | the message you wish to return to Binance Connect |

### How signature works[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook#how-signature-works "How signature works的直接链接")

The encryption/decryption and verification process of webhook is exactly the opposite/mirrored of API request process. The sender and receiver of the two are opposite, but they are both processes that signed by the sender with a private key and verified by the receiver with a public key.

For API requests, the partner (client) generates a pair of keys. The private key is kept securely and privately by the partner (client). Then the partner (client) uses the private key to sign when initiating API requests. The public key is shared to Bianance Connect, with which Binance will verify the signature of the API request to ensure that the request is indeed initiated by the partner (client).

For webhook, it's an opposite/mirrored process. Binance Connect generates a pair of keys. The private key is kept securely and privately by Binance Connect. Then Binance Connect uses the private key to sign when initiating the webhook message. The public key is shared to the partner (client), with which the partner (client) can verify the signature of the webhook message to ensure that the message is indeed initiated by Binance.

#### The webhook signature flow is as follows:[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook#the-webhook-signature-flow-is-as-follows "The webhook signature flow is as follows:的直接链接")

![signature-Webhook.png](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/assets/images/signature-Webhook-8e2546351f3231e2cd4fa48bb8ed679f.png)

### Verify signature[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook#verify-signature "Verify signature的直接链接")

As mentioned above, Binance Connect initiates a webhook request to the webhook callback url provided by the partner ( client). And the partner (client) should verify the identity of the request initiator based on the public key provided by Binance Connect.

The example code below shows how to verify signature with public key:

    public static boolean verify(String srcData, PublicKey publicKey, String sign) throws Exception {    Signature signature = Signature.getInstance("SHA256withRSA");    signature.initVerify(publicKey);    signature.update(srcData.getBytes());    return signature.verify(Base64.decodeBase64(sign.getBytes()));}

### Example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_connect/webhook#example "Example的直接链接")

Request Body:

    {  "webhookEventType": "connect_order_event",  "externalOrderId": "180401941923045",  "type": 1,  "businessType": 1,  "status": 2,  "payMethodCode": "BUY_P2P",  "payMethodSubCode": "BANK",  "fiatCurrency": "EUR",  "cryptoCurrency": "USDT",  "openUserId": "f47ac10b58cc4372a5670e02b2c3d479",  "fiatAmount": "100",  "cryptoAmount": "107.8",  "feeAmount": "1",  "feeCurrency": "USDT",  "revenueAmount": "0.08",  "revenueCurrency": "USDT",  "networkFee": "0.5",  "withdrawWalletAddress": "0xbb4CdB98Bd36B01bD1cBaEA52De08d9173bc095c",  "withdrawNetwork": "BSC",  "withdrawMemo": "",  "withdrawTxHash": "0xcb163e2e6322cd6aa7bc4d45306029e846c0c06e9cdee45a06e88801d1231e71",  "orderDetailLink": "https://www.binance.com/en/my/wallet/exchange/buysell-history?type=buy",  "orderTime": 1723186761000,  "completionTime": 1723206761000,  "updateTime": 1734446642930}

# Change Sub Account Api Permission | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Change-Sub-Account-Api-Permission#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Change Sub Account Api Permission
=================================

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Change-Sub-Account-Api-Permission#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/broker/subAccountApi/permission`

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Change-Sub-Account-Api-Permission#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| subAccountId | STRING | YES |     |
| subAccountApiKey | STRING | YES |     |
| canTrade | ENUM | YES |     |
| marginTrade | ENUM | YES |     |
| futuresTrade | ENUM | YES |     |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

**Caution:**

*   This request will change the api permission for a sub account.
*   You need to enable "trade" option for the api key which requests this endpoint.
*   Sub account should be enable `margin` before its api-key's `marginTrade` being enabled.
*   Sub account should be enable `futures` before its api-key's `futuresTrade` being enabled.

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Change-Sub-Account-Api-Permission#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {	"subaccountId": "1", 	"apikey":"vmPUZE6mv9SD5VNHk4HlWFsOr6aKE2zvsw0MuIgwCIPy6utIco14y7Ju91duEh8A",	"canTrade": true,	"marginTrade": true,	"futuresTrade": true}

*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Change-Sub-Account-Api-Permission#http-request)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Change-Sub-Account-Api-Permission#request-parameters)
    
*   [Example Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Change-Sub-Account-Api-Permission#example-response)

---

# Delete Sub Account Api Key | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Delete-Sub-Account-Api-Key#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Delete Sub Account Api Key
==========================

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Delete-Sub-Account-Api-Key#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

DELETE `/sapi/v1/broker/subAccountApi`

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Delete-Sub-Account-Api-Key#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| subAccountId | STRING | YES |     |
| subAccountApiKey | STRING | YES |     |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

**Caution:**

*   This request will delete a api key for a sub account
*   You need to enable "trade" option for the api key which requests this endpoint
*   You can only delete 1 api key for each sub account per second

# Delete Sub Account | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Delete-Sub-Account#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Delete Sub Account
==================

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Delete-Sub-Account#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

DELETE `/sapi/v1/broker/subAccount`

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Delete-Sub-Account#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| subAccountId | STRING | YES |     |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Delete-Sub-Account#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {}

**Caution:**

*   The operation will delete a sub account under your brokerage master account.
*   Please transfer out all funds from the sub account and delete API key of the sub account before deleting it.
*   The deleted sub account CANNOT be reverted.
*   The daily deletion limit for a broker Master is 20 sub accounts.
*   You need to enable "trade" option for the api key which requests this endpoint.
*   This endpoint requires user to be whitelisted. Please contact Binance Link team.

*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Delete-Sub-Account#http-request)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Delete-Sub-Account#request-parameters)
    
*   [Example Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Delete-Sub-Account#example-response)

---

# Update IP Restriction for Sub-Account API key (For Master Account) | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Update-IP-Restriction-for-Sub-Account-API-key-For-Master-Account#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Update IP Restriction for Sub-Account API key (For Master Account)
==================================================================

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Update-IP-Restriction-for-Sub-Account-API-key-For-Master-Account#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v2/broker/subAccountApi/ipRestriction`

Weight(UID):[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Update-IP-Restriction-for-Sub-Account-API-key-For-Master-Account#weightuid "Weight(UID):的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**3000**

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Update-IP-Restriction-for-Sub-Account-API-key-For-Master-Account#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| subAccountId | STRING | YES |     |
| subAccountApiKey | STRING | YES |     |
| status | STRING | YES | IP Restriction status. 1 = IP Unrestricted. 2 = Restrict access to trusted IPs only. |
| ipAddress | STRING | NO  | Insert static IP in batch, separated by commas. |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Update-IP-Restriction-for-Sub-Account-API-key-For-Master-Account#http-request)

# Enable Universal Transfer Permission For Sub Account Api Key | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Enable-Universal-Transfer-Permission-For-SubAccount-Api-Key#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Enable Universal Transfer Permission For Sub Account Api Key
============================================================

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Enable-Universal-Transfer-Permission-For-SubAccount-Api-Key#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/broker/subAccountApi/permission/universalTransfer`

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Enable-Universal-Transfer-Permission-For-SubAccount-Api-Key#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| subAccountId | LONG | YES |     |
| subAccountApiKey | STRING | YES |     |
| canUniversalTransfer | ENUM | YES | true or false |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| subAccountId | STRING | NO  |     |
| page | LONG | NO  | default 1 |
| size | LONG | NO  | default 500 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Query-Sub-Account#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    [        {            "subaccountId": "1",            "email": "vai_42038996_47411276_brokersubuser@lac.info",            "tag":"bob123",            "makerCommission": 0.001,            "takerCommission": 0.001,            "marginMakerCommission": -1,  // if margin disabled, return -1            "marginTakerCommission": -1,  // if margin disabled, return -1            "createTime":1544433328000        },        {            "subaccountId": "2",            "email":"123@abc.com",            "tag":"bob123",            "makerCommission":0.001,            "takerCommission":0.001,            "marginMakerCommission": 10,            "marginTakerCommission": 10,            "createTime":1544433328000        }]

# Futures Transfer for Link Sub-account | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Futures-Transfer-for-Link-Sub-account#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Futures Transfer for Link Sub-account (For Master Account) (USER\_DATA)
=======================================================================

API Description[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Futures-Transfer-for-Link-Sub-account#api-description "API Description的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Futures Transfer for Link Sub-account

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Futures-Transfer-for-Link-Sub-account#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/broker/futures/accountTransfer`

Request Weight(IP)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Futures-Transfer-for-Link-Sub-account#request-weightip "Request Weight(IP)的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**1**

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Futures-Transfer-for-Link-Sub-account#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| subAccountId | LONG | YES |     |
| asset | STRING | YES | The asset being transferred, e.g., USDT |
| amount | DECIMAL | YES | The amount to be transferred |
| type | INT | YES | 1: transfer from subaccount's spot account to its USDT-margined futures account 2: transfer from subaccount's USDT-margined futures account to its spot account 3: transfer from subaccount's spot account to its COIN-margined futures account 4:transfer from subaccount's COIN-margined futures account to its spot account |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

> *   You need to open Enable Spot & Margin Trading permission for the API Key which requests this endpoint.

Response Example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Futures-Transfer-for-Link-Sub-account#response-example "Response Example的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "txnId":"2966662589"}

*   [API Description](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Futures-Transfer-for-Link-Sub-account#api-description)
    
*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Futures-Transfer-for-Link-Sub-account#http-request)
    
*   [Request Weight(IP)](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Futures-Transfer-for-Link-Sub-account#request-weightip)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Futures-Transfer-for-Link-Sub-account#request-parameters)
    
*   [Response Example](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Futures-Transfer-for-Link-Sub-account#response-example)

# Sub Account Transfer(spot) | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Sub-Account-Transfer-Spot#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Sub Account Transfer（SPOT）
==========================

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Sub-Account-Transfer-Spot#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/broker/transfer`

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Sub-Account-Transfer-Spot#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| fromId | STRING | NO  |     |
| toId | STRING | NO  |     |
| clientTranId | STRING | NO  | client transfer id, must be unique. The max length is 32 characters |
| asset | STRING | YES |     |
| amount | DECIMAL | YES |     |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

**Caution:**

*   You need to enable "internal transfer" option for the api key which requests this endpoint.
*   Transfer from master account if `fromId` not sent.
*   Transfer to master account if `toId` not sent.

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Sub-Account-Transfer-Spot#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {	"txnId":"2966662589",	"clientTranId":"abc"}

*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Sub-Account-Transfer-Spot#http-request)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Sub-Account-Transfer-Spot#request-parameters)
    
*   [Example Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Sub-Account-Transfer-Spot#example-response)

# Query Sub Account Transfer History(Futures) | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Query-Sub-Account-Transfer-History-Futures#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Query Sub Account Transfer History（FUTURES）
===========================================

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Query-Sub-Account-Transfer-History-Futures#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/broker/transfer/futures`

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Query-Sub-Account-Transfer-History-Futures#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| subAccountId | STRING | YES |     |
| futuresType | LONG | YES | 1:USDT Futures,2: COIN Futures |
| clientTranId | STRING | NO  |     |
| startTime | LONG | NO  | default 30 days records |
| endTime | LONG | NO  | default 30 days records |
| page | INT | NO  | default 1 |
| limit | INT | NO  | default 50, max 500 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   Only get the latest history of past 30 days.

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Query-Sub-Account-Transfer-History-Futures#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Query-Sub-Account-Transfer-History-Futures#http-request)
