# Create Api Key for Sub Account | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-Api-Key-for-Sub-Account#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Create Api Key for Sub Account
==============================

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-Api-Key-for-Sub-Account#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/broker/subAccountApi`

Weight(IP)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-Api-Key-for-Sub-Account#weightip "Weight(IP)的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**8**

Weight(Master Account)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-Api-Key-for-Sub-Account#weightmaster-account "Weight(Master Account)的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**3000**

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-Api-Key-for-Sub-Account#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| subAccountId | STRING | YES |     |
| publicKey | STRING | NO  | The public key for asymmetrical key type(Ed25519 and RSA). Please see [https://www.binance.com/en/support/faq/detail/6b9a63f1e3384cf48a2eedb82767a69a](https://www.binance.com/en/support/faq/detail/6b9a63f1e3384cf48a2eedb82767a69a) |
| canTrade | ENUM | YES | spot trade |
| marginTrade | ENUM | NO  | margin trade |
| futuresTrade | ENUM | NO  | futures trade |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

**Caution:**

*   This request will generate a api key for a sub account.
*   You need to enable "trade" option for the api key which requests this endpoint
*   Sub account should be enable `margin` before its api-key's `marginTrade` being enabled
*   Sub account should be enable `futures` before its api-key's `futuresTrade` being enabled
*   You can only create 1 api key for each sub account per second

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-Api-Key-for-Sub-Account#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {	"subaccountId": "1",	"apiKey":"vmPUZE6mv9SD5VNHk4HlWFsOr6aKE2zvsw0MuIgwCIPy6utIco14y7Ju91duEh8A",	"secretKey":"NhqPtmdSJYdKjVHjA7PZj4Mge3R5YNiP1e3UZjInClVN65XAbvqqM6A7H5fATj0",	"canTrade": true,	"marginTrade": false,	"futuresTrade": false}

*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-Api-Key-for-Sub-Account#http-request)
    
*   [Weight(IP)](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-Api-Key-for-Sub-Account#weightip)
    
*   [Weight(Master Account)](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-Api-Key-for-Sub-Account#weightmaster-account)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-Api-Key-for-Sub-Account#request-parameters)
    
*   [Example Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/account/Create-Api-Key-for-Sub-Account#example-response)

---

# Change Sub Account Commission | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-Commission#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Change Sub Account Commission
=============================

API Description[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-Commission#api-description "API Description的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   This request will change the commission for a sub account.
*   You need to enable "trade" option for the api key which requests this endpoint.

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-Commission#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/broker/subAccountApi/commission`

Weight(UID)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-Commission#weightuid "Weight(UID)的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**4**

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-Commission#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| subAccountId | STRING | YES |     |
| makerCommission | FLOAT | YES | 0.001 |
| takerCommission | FLOAT | YES | 0.002 |
| marginMakerCommission | FLOAT | NO  |     |
| marginTakerCommission | FLOAT | NO  |     |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   If margin disabled, it is not allowed to send `marginMakerCommission` or `marginTakerCommission`.
*   If margin enabled, `marginMakerCommission` or `marginTakerCommission` has default value as `makerCommission` or `takerCommission` .

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-Commission#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "subAccountId": "1",    "makerCommission": 0.001,    "takerCommission": 0.002,    "marginMakerCommission": 0.001,    "marginTakerCommission": 0.002}

*   [API Description](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-Commission#api-description)
    
*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-Commission#http-request)
    
*   [Weight(UID)](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-Commission#weightuid)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-Commission#request-parameters)
    
*   [Example Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-Commission#example-response)

Sub Account Transfer（FUTURES）
=============================

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Sub-Account-Transfer-Futures#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/broker/transfer/futures`

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Sub-Account-Transfer-Futures#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| fromId | STRING | NO  |     |
| toId | STRING | NO  |     |
| futuresType | LONG | YES | 1:USDT Futures,2: COIN Futures |
| asset | STRING | YES |     |
| amount | DECIMAL | YES |     |
| clientTranId | STRING | NO  | The max length is 32 characters |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

**Caution:**

*   You need to enable "internal transfer" option for the api key which requests this endpoint.
*   Transfer from master account if `fromId` not sent.
*   Transfer to master account if `toId` not sent.
*   Each master account could transfer 5000 times/min

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Sub-Account-Transfer-Futures#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {	"success":true,	"txnId":"2966662589",	"clientTranId":"a123"}

*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Sub-Account-Transfer-Futures#http-request)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Sub-Account-Transfer-Futures#request-parameters)
    
*   [Example Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Sub-Account-Transfer-Futures#example-response)

# Query Sub Account Transfer History(Spot) | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Query-Sub-Account-Transfer-History-Spot#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Query Sub Account Transfer History（SPOT）
========================================

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Query-Sub-Account-Transfer-History-Spot#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/broker/transfer`

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Query-Sub-Account-Transfer-History-Spot#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| fromId | STRING | NO  |     |
| toId | STRING | NO  |     |
| clientTranId | STRING | NO  | client transfer id |
| showAllStatus | ENUM | NO  | true or false, default: false |
| startTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| endTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| page | INT | NO  |     |
| limit | INT | NO  | default 500, max 500 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

**Caution:**

*   If showAllStatus is true, the status in response will show four types: INIT,PROCESS,SUCCESS,FAILURE.
*   If showAllStatus is false, the status in response will show three types: INIT,PROCESS,SUCCESS.
*   Either fromId or toId must be sent. Return fromId equal master account by default.

**Query scope is limited to 100 days:**

*   Both _startTime_ and _endTime_ are provided: If it exceeds, the endTime will be re-calculated 100 days after the startTime.
*   Neither _startTime_ nor _endTime_ are provided: Calculate 100 days before today.
*   _endTime_ is not provided: Calculate 100 days after startTime.
*   _startTime_ is not provided: Calculate 100 days before endTime.

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Query-Sub-Account-Transfer-History-Spot#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    [        {            "fromId":"1",            "toId":"2",            "asset":"BTC",            "qty":"1",            "time":1544433328000,            "txnId":"2966662589",            "clientTranId":"abc",            "status": "SUCCESS"  // Status Type：INIT,PROCESS,SUCCESS        },        {            "fromId":"1",            "toId":"2",            "asset":"ETH",            "qty":"2",            "time":1544433328000,            "txnId":"296666999",            "clientTranId":"",            "status": "SUCCESS"        }]

*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Query-Sub-Account-Transfer-History-Spot#http-request)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Query-Sub-Account-Transfer-History-Spot#request-parameters)
    
*   [Example Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Query-Sub-Account-Transfer-History-Spot#example-response)

---

# Query Universal Transfer History | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Query-Universal-Transfer-History#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Query Universal Transfer History
================================

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Query-Universal-Transfer-History#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/broker/universalTransfer`

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Query-Universal-Transfer-History#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| fromId | STRING | NO  |     |
| toId | STRING | NO  |     |
| clientTranId | STRING | NO  | client transfer id |
| startTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| endTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| page | INT | NO  | default 1 |
| limit | INT | NO  | default 500, max 500 |
| showAllStatus | Boolean | NO  | TRUE or FALSE |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

**Caution:**

*   Either fromId or toId must be sent.
*   If either fromId or toId is the master account itself, it will not return in response.
*   If showAllStatus is true, the status in response will show four types: INIT,PROCESS,SUCCESS,FAILURE.

**Query scope is limited to 100 days:**

*   Both _startTime_ and _endTime_ are provided: If it exceeds, the endTime will be re-calculated 100 days after the startTime.
*   Neither _startTime_ nor _endTime_ are provided: Calculate 30 days before today.
*   _endTime_ is not provided: Calculate as Current time.
*   _startTime_ is not provided: Calculate 30 days before endTime.

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Query-Universal-Transfer-History#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    [        {            "toId":"444016824578949121",            "asset":"BTC",            "qty":"0.1",            "time":1544433328000,            "status":"SUCCESS",            "txnId":"12831078279",            "clientTranId":"abc",            "fromAccountType": "SPOT",            "toAccountType": "USDT_FUTURE"        },        {            "toId":"444016824578949121",            "asset":"USDT",            "qty":"2",            "time":1544433328000,            "status":"SUCCESS",            "txnId":"296666999",            "clientTranId":"",            "fromAccountType": "SPOT",            "toAccountType": "USDT_FUTURE"        }]

*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Query-Universal-Transfer-History#http-request)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Query-Universal-Transfer-History#request-parameters)
    
*   [Example Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Query-Universal-Transfer-History#example-response)

# Change Sub Account Commission | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Change Sub Account Commission
=============================

API Description[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee#api-description "API Description的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   This request will change the commission for a sub account.
*   You need to enable "trade" option for the api key which requests this endpoint.

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/broker/subAccountApi/commission`

Weight(UID)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee#weightuid "Weight(UID)的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**4**

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| subAccountId | STRING | YES |     |
| makerCommission | FLOAT | YES | 0.001 |
| takerCommission | FLOAT | YES | 0.002 |
| marginMakerCommission | FLOAT | NO  |     |
| marginTakerCommission | FLOAT | NO  |     |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   If margin disabled, it is not allowed to send `marginMakerCommission` or `marginTakerCommission`.
*   If margin enabled, `marginMakerCommission` or `marginTakerCommission` has default value as `makerCommission` or `takerCommission` .

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "subAccountId": "1",    "makerCommission": 0.001,    "takerCommission": 0.002,    "marginMakerCommission": 0.001,    "marginTakerCommission": 0.002}

*   [API Description](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee#api-description)
    
*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee#http-request)
    
*   [Weight(UID)](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee#weightuid)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee#request-parameters)
    
*   [Example Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee#example-response)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |

| toId | STRING | NO  |     |

| toAccountType | STRING | YES | SPOT,USDT\_FUTURE,COIN\_FUTURE |

# Overall Workflow | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Overall-Workflow#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Getting Started
===============

Integrating with Binance Link KYC Saas broadly follows the below steps.

1.  Create an Exchange Link sub-account via API.
2.  KYC is processed for the user in one of two methods.
3.  Validate that KYC is passed.
4.  Create an API Key for the sub-account, and proceed from there.

Sub Account Creation Flow with Link Module integration
======================================================

1.  Create a Sub account `POST /sapi/v1/broker/subAccount`
2.  Complete KYC and bind to Sub account via KYC module through one of:
    *   Share KYC API `/bapi/ekyc/v2/public/ekyc/customer/share-kyc-data`
    *   Oauth Link `/bapi/ekyc/v2/public/ekyc/customer/add-account-info-list`
3.  Check KYC Status is passed `/bapi/ekyc/v2/public/ekyc/customer/check-kyc-status`
    *   Requirement: `data.levelInfo.currentLevel.kycStatus` = `PASS`
4.  Create Sub account API Key `POST /sapi/v1/broker/subAccountApi`

---

# Change Sub Account USDT-Ⓜ Futures Commission | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-UM-Futures-Commission#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Change Sub Account USDT-Ⓜ Futures Commission Adjustment
=======================================================

API Description[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-UM-Futures-Commission#api-description "API Description的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   This request will change the USDT-Ⓜ futures commission for a sub account.
*   You need to enable "trade" option for the api key which requests this endpoint.
*   The sub-account's USDT-Ⓜ futures commission of a symbol equals to the base commission of the symbol on the sub-account's fee tier plus the commission adjustment.

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-UM-Futures-Commission#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/broker/subAccountApi/commission/futures`

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-UM-Futures-Commission#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| subAccountId | STRING | YES |     |
| symbol | STRING | YES |     |
| makerAdjustment | INT | YES | 100 for 0.01% |
| takerAdjustment | INT | YES | 100 for 0.01% |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   If futures disabled, it is not allowed to set subaccount's USDT-Ⓜ futures commission adjustment on any symbol.

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-UM-Futures-Commission#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {	"subAccountId": 1,	"symbol": "BTCUSDT",	"makerAdjustment": 150,	 // USDT-Ⓜ futures commission adjustment for maker	"takerAdjustment": 150,	 // USDT-Ⓜ futures commission adjustment for taker	"makerCommission": 450,	 // USDT-Ⓜ futures commission (after adjusted) for maker	"takerCommission": 550,	 // USDT-Ⓜ futures commission (after adjusted) for taker}

*   [API Description](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-UM-Futures-Commission#api-description)
    
*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-UM-Futures-Commission#http-request)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-UM-Futures-Commission#request-parameters)
    
*   [Example Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-UM-Futures-Commission#example-response)

---

# Query Futures Commission Rebate Record | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Futures-Commission-Rebate-Record#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Query Broker Futures Commission Rebate Record
=============================================

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Futures-Commission-Rebate-Record#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/broker/rebate/futures/recentRecord`

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Futures-Commission-Rebate-Record#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| futuresType | LONG | YES | 1:USDT Futures, 2: Coin Futures |
| startTime | LONG | YES |     |
| endTime | LONG | YES |     |
| page | LONG | NO  | default 1 |
| size | LONG | NO  | default 10, max 100 |
| filterResult | BOOLEAN | NO  | TRUE or FALSE. Default: FALSE |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   If filterResult = TRUE, rebates not from its own sub accounts will be filtered out in response.

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Futures-Commission-Rebate-Record#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    [   {      "subaccountId": "1",      "income": "0.02063898",      "asset": "USDT",      "symbol": "ETHUSDT",      "tradeId": 123456,      "time": 1544433328000,        "status": 1    },    {      "subaccountId": "2",      "income": "0.02060008",      "asset": "USDT",      "symbol": "BTCUSDT",      "tradeId": 223456,      "time": 1544433328000,      "status": 1    }]

*   Status: 0: Pending, 1: Successful, 2: Failed

*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Futures-Commission-Rebate-Record#http-request)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Futures-Commission-Rebate-Record#request-parameters)
    
*   [Example Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Futures-Commission-Rebate-Record#example-response)

# Get Sub Account Deposit History | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Get-Sub-Account-Deposit-History#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Get Sub Account Deposit History
===============================

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Get-Sub-Account-Deposit-History#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/broker/subAccount/depositHist`

Weight(Master Account)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Get-Sub-Account-Deposit-History#weightmaster-account "Weight(Master Account)的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**10**

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Get-Sub-Account-Deposit-History#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| subAccountId | STRING | NO  |     |
| coin | STRING | NO  |     |
| status | INT | NO  | 0(0:pending,6: credited but cannot withdraw, 1:success) |
| startTime | LONG | NO  | Default: 7 days from current timestamp |
| endTime | LONG | NO  | Default: present timestamp |
| limit | INT | NO  | Default：500 |
| offset | INT | NO  | Default：0 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   The query time period must be less than 7 days( default as the recent 7 days).

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Get-Sub-Account-Deposit-History#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    [    {        "depositId": 1234567890123,        "subAccountId": "1",        "address": "0xddc66e4313fd6c737b6cae67cad90bb4e0ac7092",        "addressTag": "",        "amount": "139.04370000",        "coin": "USDT",        "insertTime": 1566791463000,        "transferType": 0,        "network": "ETH",        "status": 1,        "txId": "0x5759dfe9983a4c7619bce9bc736bb6c26f804091753bf66fa91e7cd5cfeebafd",        "sourceAddress": "xxxxxxxxxxxxxx",        "confirmTimes": "12/12",        "selfReturnStatus": 0,        "travelRuleStatus": 0 //0: travel rule not required OR info already provided and funds ready to use, 1: travel rule required to provide deposit info    },    {        "depositId": 1234567890123,        "subAccountId": "2",        "address": "0xddc66e4313fd6c737b6cae67kld90bb4e0ac7092",        "addressTag": "",        "amount": "1589.12345678",        "coin": "BTC",        "insertTime": 1566791463000,        "transferType": 1,        "network": "BNB",        "status": 1,        "txId": "Off-chain transfer dbea58fa48ef4cc59393da4552ae77d7",        "sourceAddress": "xxxxxxxxxxxxxx",        "confirmTimes": "12/12",        "selfReturnStatus": 0,        "travelRuleStatus": 1 //0: travel rule not required OR info already provided and funds ready to use, 1: travel rule required to provide deposit info    }]

*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Get-Sub-Account-Deposit-History#http-request)
    
*   [Weight(Master Account)](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Get-Sub-Account-Deposit-History#weightmaster-account)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Get-Sub-Account-Deposit-History#request-parameters)
    
*   [Example Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/asset/Get-Sub-Account-Deposit-History#example-response)

# Introduction | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Introduction#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Rest API Information[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Introduction#rest-api-information "Rest API Information的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Binance Link KYC SaaS is a KYC-as-a-Service solution designed for our Exchange Link clients.

It enables clients to integrate KYC verification for sub-accounts, offering services such as collecting and validating customer information, auditing customer data, and screening for sanctions and politically exposed persons (PEPs).

*   [Rest API Information](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Introduction#rest-api-information)

---

# Query Sub Account COIN-Ⓜ Futures Commission | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Sub-Account-CM-Futures-Commission#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Query Sub Account COIN-Ⓜ Futures Commission Adjustment
======================================================

*   The sub-account's COIN-Ⓜ futures commission of a symbol equals to the base commission of the symbol on the sub-account's fee tier plus the commission adjustment.

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Sub-Account-CM-Futures-Commission#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/broker/subAccountApi/commission/coinFutures`

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Sub-Account-CM-Futures-Commission#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| subAccountId | STRING | YES |     |
| pair | STRING | YES | BTCUSD |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   If futures disabled, it is not allowed to set subaccount's COIN-Ⓜ futures commission adjustment on any symbol.
*   Different symbols have the same commission for the same pair

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Sub-Account-CM-Futures-Commission#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    [	{			"subAccountId": 1,		"pair": "BTCUSD",		"makerCommission": 450,	 // COIN-Ⓜ futures commission (after adjusted) for maker		"takerCommission": 550,	 // COIN-Ⓜ futures commission (after adjusted) for taker	},	{			"subAccountId": 1,		"pair": "ETHUSD",		"makerCommission": 400,		"takerCommission": 500,	},]

*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Sub-Account-CM-Futures-Commission#http-request)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Sub-Account-CM-Futures-Commission#request-parameters)
    
*   [Example Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Sub-Account-CM-Futures-Commission#example-response)

---

# Query Spot Commission Rebate Recent Record | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Spot-Commission-Rebate-Recent-Record#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Query Broker Commission Rebate Recent Record（Spot）
==================================================

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Spot-Commission-Rebate-Recent-Record#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/broker/rebate/recentRecord`

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Spot-Commission-Rebate-Recent-Record#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| subAccountId | STRING | NO  |     |
| startTime | LONG | NO  | Default: 7 days from current timestamp |
| endTime | LONG | NO  | Default: present timestamp |
| page | LONG | NO  | default 1 |
| size | LONG | NO  | default 500，max500 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   The query time period must be less than 7 days (default as the recent 7 days).

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Spot-Commission-Rebate-Recent-Record#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    [        {            "subaccountId":"1",            "income": "0.02063898",            "asset":"BTC",            "symbol": "ETHBTC",            "tradeId": 123456,            "time":1544433328000,            "status": 1        },        {            "subaccountId":"2",            "income": "1.2063898",            "asset":"USDT",            "symbol": "BTCUSDT",            "tradeId": 223456,            "time":1581580800000,            "status": 1        }]

*   Status: 0: Pending, 1: Successful, 2: Failed

*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Spot-Commission-Rebate-Recent-Record#http-request)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Spot-Commission-Rebate-Recent-Record#request-parameters)

# Query Sub Account USDT-Ⓜ Futures Commission | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Sub-Account-UM-Futures-Commission#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Query Sub Account USDT-Ⓜ Futures Commission Adjustment
======================================================

API Description[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Sub-Account-UM-Futures-Commission#api-description "API Description的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   The sub-account's USDT-Ⓜ futures commission of a symbol equals to the base commission of the symbol on the sub-account's fee tier plus the commission adjustment.

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Sub-Account-UM-Futures-Commission#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/broker/subAccountApi/commission/futures`

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Sub-Account-UM-Futures-Commission#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| subAccountId | STRING | YES |     |
| symbol | STRING | YES |     |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   If futures disabled, it is not allowed to set subaccount's USDT-Ⓜ futures commission adjustment on any symbol.

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Query-Sub-Account-UM-Futures-Commission#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    [	{			"subAccountId": 1,		"symbol": "BTCUSDT",		"makerCommission": 450,	 // USDT-Ⓜ futures commission (after adjusted) for maker		"takerCommission": 550,	 // USDT-Ⓜ futures commission (after adjusted) for taker	},	{			"subAccountId": 1,		"symbol": "ETHUSDT",		"makerCommission": 400,		"takerCommission": 500,	},]

# Change Sub Account COIN-Ⓜ Futures Commission | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-CM-Futures-Commission#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Change Sub Account COIN-Ⓜ Futures Commission Adjustment
=======================================================

API Description[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-CM-Futures-Commission#api-description "API Description的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   This request will change the COIN-Ⓜ futures commission for a sub account.
*   You need to enable "trade" option for the api key which requests this endpoint.
*   The sub-account's COIN-Ⓜ futures commission of a symbol equals to the base commission of the symbol on the sub-account's fee tier plus the commission adjustment.

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-CM-Futures-Commission#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/broker/subAccountApi/commission/coinFutures`

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-CM-Futures-Commission#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| subAccountId | STRING | YES |     |
| pair | STRING | YES | BTCUSD |
| makerAdjustment | INT | YES | 100 for 0.01% |
| takerAdjustment | INT | YES | 100 for 0.01% |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   If futures disabled, it is not allowed to set subaccount's COIN-Ⓜ futures commission adjustment on any symbol.
*   Different symbols have the same commission for the same pair

Example Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-CM-Futures-Commission#example-response "Example Response的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {	"subAccountId": 1,	"pair": "BTCUSD",	"makerAdjustment": 150,	 // COIN-Ⓜ futures commission adjustment for maker	"takerAdjustment": 150,	 // COIN-Ⓜ futures commission adjustment for taker	"makerCommission": 450,	 // COIN-Ⓜ futures commission (after adjusted) for maker	"takerCommission": 550,	 // COIN-Ⓜ futures commission (after adjusted) for taker}

*   [API Description](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-CM-Futures-Commission#api-description)
    
*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-CM-Futures-Commission#http-request)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-CM-Futures-Commission#request-parameters)
    
*   [Example Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/fee/Change-Sub-Account-CM-Futures-Commission#example-response)

---

# KYC Sharing | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Kyc-Sharing#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

KYC Sharing
===========

API Description[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Kyc-Sharing#api-description "API Description的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Share Exchange Link User KYC Info API.

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Kyc-Sharing#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/bapi/ekyc/v2/public/ekyc/customer/share-kyc-data`

Request Header[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Kyc-Sharing#request-header "Request Header的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| X-SHA2-Signature | STRING | YES | Request Signature |

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Kyc-Sharing#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bizEntityKey | STRING | YES | business entity key, each access entity has its own bizEntityKey |
| requestNo | STRING | YES | every request unique number, max length is 120 |
| kycInfo | STRING | YES | KycInfo |

### KycInfo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Kyc-Sharing#kycinfo "KycInfo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| userInfo | UserInfo | YES |     |
| basicInfo | BasicInfo | YES |     |
| identifyInfo | IdentifyInfo | YES |     |

### UserInfo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Kyc-Sharing#userinfo "UserInfo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bizEntityKey | STRING | YES | business entity key, each access entity has its own bizEntityKey |
| entityCustomerId | STRING | YES | customer id，that is, the user id of the access entity site, max length is 128 |
| brokerMainAccountId | STRING | YES | broker main account id |
| brokerSubAccountId | STRING | YES | broker sub account id |
| notifyUrl | STRING | YES | notify url when kyc status changed |
| extra | STRING | NO  | extra info in JSON format |

### BasicInfo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Kyc-Sharing#basicinfo "BasicInfo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| firstName | STRING | YES |     |
| middleName | STRING | NO  |     |
| lastName | STRING | YES |     |
| residentialCountry | STRING | YES | country of residence: 2-alpha code in UPPER CASE |
| dob | STRING | YES | yyyy-MM-dd |
| country | STRING | YES | nationality, 2-alpha code in UPPER CASE |
| userSubmitIp | STRING | YES |     |
| address | STRING | YES | max is 400 |
| city | STRING | YES | max is 100 |
| postalCode | STRING | NO  | max is 50 |

### IdentifyInfo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Kyc-Sharing#identifyinfo "IdentifyInfo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| documentType | STRING | YES | document type, for example: ID\_CARD, PASSPORT, DRIVING\_LICENSE,RESIDENCE\_PERMIT |
| selectCountry | STRING | Yes | user selected country when do Id verification 2-alpha code in UPPER CASE |
| frontFileUrl | STRING | YES | id front image download url |
| backFileUrl | STRING | NO  | id back image download url |
| faceFileUrl | STRING | YES | face image download url |
| firstName | STRING | YES | please ensure this matches the “firstName” under Basic Info table above, if not it will be rejected. |
| middleName | STRING | NO  |     |
| lastName | STRING | YES | please ensure this matches the “lastName” under Basic Info table above, if not it will be rejected. |
| dob | STRING | YES | date of birth: yyyy-MM-dd |
| idType | STRING | YES | id doc type. for example: ID\_CARD, PASSPORT, DRIVING\_LICENSE,RESIDENCE\_PERMIT |
| idSubType | STRING | NO  | id doc sub type |
| idCountry | STRING | YES | 2-alpha code in UPPER CASE |
| nationalityCountry | STRING | YES | 2-alpha code in UPPER CASE |
| idNumber | STRING | YES | id Number |
| idExpiry | STRING | NO  | yyyy-MM-dd |
| userSubmitIp | STRING | YES |     |
| idUsState | STRING | NO  |     |
| personalNumber | STRING | NO  |     |
| gender | STRING | NO  |     |
| issuingAuthority | STRING | NO  |     |
| issuingDate | STRING | NO  | yyyy-MM-dd |
| issuingPlace | STRING | NO  |     |
| registrationNumber | STRING | NO  |     |
| city | STRING | NO  |     |
| stateCode | STRING | NO  |     |
| postalCode | STRING | NO  |     |
| address | STRING | NO  |     |

Request Body Example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Kyc-Sharing#request-body-example "Request Body Example的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Introduction | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/Introduction#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Rest API Information[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/Introduction#rest-api-information "Rest API Information的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   The base endpoint for Exchange Link is: **[https://api.binance.com](https://api.binance.com/)
    **
*   The base endpoint for Link and Trade(Spot) is: **[https://api.binance.com](https://api.binance.com/)
    **
*   The base endpoint for Link and Trade(Futures) is: **[https://fapi.binance.com](https://fapi.binance.com/)
    **
*   All endpoints return either a JSON object or array.
*   Data is returned in **ascending** order. Oldest first, newest last.
*   All time and timestamp related fields are in milliseconds.
*   HTTP `4XX` return codes are used for for malformed requests; the issue is on the sender's side.
*   HTTP `429` return code is used when breaking a request rate limit.
*   HTTP `418` return code is used when an IP has been auto-banned for continuing to send requests after receiving `429` codes.
*   HTTP `5XX` return codes are used for internal errors; the issue is on Binance's side. It is important to **NOT** treat this as a failure operation; the execution status is **UNKNOWN** and could have been a success.
*   Any endpoint can return an ERROR; the error payload is as follows:

    {  "code": -1121,  "msg": "Invalid symbol."}

*   Specific error codes and messages defined in another document.
*   For `GET` endpoints, parameters must be sent as a `query string`.
*   For `POST`, `PUT`, and `DELETE` endpoints, the parameters may be sent as a `query string` or in the `request body` with content type `application/x-www-form-urlencoded`. You may mix parameters between both the `query string` and `request body` if you wish to do so.
*   Parameters may be sent in any order.
*   If a parameter sent in both the `query string` and `request body`, the `query string` parameter will be used.

IP Limits[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/Introduction#ip-limits "IP Limits的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Every request will contain `X-MBX-USED-WEIGHT-(intervalNum)(intervalLetter)` in the response headers which has the current used weight for the IP for all request rate limiters defined.
*   Each route has a `weight` which determines for the number of requests each endpoint counts for. Heavier endpoints and endpoints that do operations on multiple symbols will have a heavier `weight`. The default weight for each request is 1, if not specify.
*   When a 429 is received, it's your obligation as an API to back off and not spam the API.
*   **Repeatedly violating rate limits and/or failing to back off after receiving 429s will result in an automated IP ban (HTTP status 418).**
*   IP bans are tracked and **scale in duration** for repeat offenders, **from 2 minutes to 3 days**.
*   A `Retry-After` header is sent with a 418 or 429 responses and will give the **number of seconds** required to wait, in the case of a 429, to prevent a ban, or, in the case of a 418, until the ban is over.
*   **The limits on the API are based on the IPs, not the API keys.**

Endpoint Security Type[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/Introduction#endpoint-security-type "Endpoint Security Type的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Each endpoint has a security type that determines the how you will interact with it.
*   API-keys are passed into the Rest API via the `X-MBX-APIKEY` header.
*   API-keys and secret-keys **are case sensitive**.
*   API-keys can be configured to only access certain types of secure endpoints. For example, one API-key could be used for TRADE only, while another API-key can access everything except for TRADE routes.
*   By default, API-keys can access all secure routes.

| Security Type | Description |
| --- | --- |
| TRADE | Endpoint requires sending a valid API-Key and signature. |
| USER\_DATA | Endpoint requires sending a valid API-Key and signature. |

Note[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/Introduction#note "Note的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/Introduction#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

#### Email address[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/Introduction#email-address "Email address的直接链接")

*   Email address should be encoded. e.g. [alice@test.com](mailto:alice@test.com)
     should be encoded into alice%40test.com
*   Email address should be in lower case.

*   [Rest API Information](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/Introduction#rest-api-information)
    
*   [IP Limits](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/Introduction#ip-limits)
    
*   [Endpoint Security Type](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/Introduction#endpoint-security-type)
    
*   [Note](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/Introduction#note)
    *   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/exchange-link/Introduction#request-parameters)

# Overall Workflow | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Getting Started
===============

Integrating with Binance Link KYC Saas broadly follows the below steps.

1.  Create an Exchange Link sub-account via API.
2.  KYC is processed for the user in one of two methods.
3.  Validate that KYC is passed.
4.  Create an API Key for the sub-account, and proceed from there.

Sub Account Creation Flow with Link Module integration
======================================================

1.  Create a Sub account `POST /sapi/v1/broker/subAccount`
2.  Complete KYC and bind to Sub account via KYC module through one of:
    *   Share KYC API `/bapi/ekyc/v2/public/ekyc/customer/share-kyc-data`
    *   Oauth Link `/bapi/ekyc/v2/public/ekyc/customer/add-account-info-list`
3.  Check KYC Status is passed `/bapi/ekyc/v2/public/ekyc/customer/check-kyc-status`
    *   Requirement: `data.levelInfo.currentLevel.kycStatus` = `PASS`
4.  Create Sub account API Key `POST /sapi/v1/broker/subAccountApi`

---

# Error Code | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Error-Code#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

API Error Code
==============

| Code | Name | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 000002 | ILLEGAL\_PARAM | required param is missing, or invalid/illegal param  <br>  <br>example:  <br>bizEntityKey is wrong  <br>kycType Value is invalid  <br>brokerMainAccountId/brokerSubAccountId includes characters other than numbers  <br>entityCustomerId includes characters other than numbers, letters and + - \_ @ |
| 10040005 | ILLEGAL\_REQUEST | request body format is invalid |
| 10040080 | SIGN\_MISMATCH | sign mismatch  <br>value in the header X-SHA2-Signature is incorrect |
| 10040008 | DUPLICATE\_REQUEST | duplicate request |
| 10040004 | SYS\_ERROR | system error, please contact Binance support |
| 100001001 | SYS\_ERROR | system error, please contact Binance support |
| 10115005 | TOKEN\_TIME\_OUT | token expired, please login again |
| 10115001 | SYS\_ERROR\_NEED\_CONTACT | system error, please contact Binance support |
| 10040082 | SUB\_ACCOUNT\_ALREADY\_LINKED\_TO\_OTHER | This Sub account is already linked to other users |
| 10040101 | USER\_LINKED\_SUB\_ACCOUNTS\_EXCEED\_LIMIT | This user linked sub account ids count exceed limit |
| 10040102 | INVALID\_BROKER\_ACCOUNT | Invalid broker account, please provide correct broker sub account id and matched main account id. |
| 10040103 | CHECK\_BROKER\_ACCOUNT\_ERROR | System error during validating broker accounts. |
| 10040104 | SUB\_ACCOUNT\_ALREADY\_LINKED\_TO\_OTHER\_MAIN\_ACCOUNT | This Sub account was already linked to other Main account. |
| 10040106 | FILE\_TOO\_LARGE | File is too large |
| 10040108 | INVALID\_OAUTH\_BROKER\_OPENID | Invalid broker open id or oauth client id. |
| 10040109 | CHECK\_OAUTH\_BROKER\_OPENID\_ERROR | Error to check broker open id and oauth client id. |

# Introduction | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Rest API Information[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas#rest-api-information "Rest API Information的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Binance Link KYC SaaS is a KYC-as-a-Service solution designed for our Exchange Link clients.

It enables clients to integrate KYC verification for sub-accounts, offering services such as collecting and validating customer information, auditing customer data, and screening for sanctions and politically exposed persons (PEPs).

*   [Rest API Information](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas#rest-api-information)

---

# Query Kyc Status | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Check KYC Status
================

API Description[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status#api-description "API Description的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Check KYC Status

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/bapi/ekyc/v2/public/ekyc/customer/check-kyc-status`

Request Header[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status#request-header "Request Header的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| X-SHA2-Signature | STRING | YES | Request Signature |

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bizEntityKey | STRING | YES | business entity key, each access entity has its own bizEntityKey |
| entityCustomerId | STRING | YES | customer id，that is, the user id of the access entity site |
| kycType | STRING | YES | kyc type，USER |
| brokerMainAccountId | STRING | YES | broker main account id |
| brokerSubAccountId | STRING | YES | broker sub account id |

Response Fields[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status#response-fields "Response Fields的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | STRING | YES | error code, 000000 is success |
| data | StatusVo | NO  |     |

### StatusVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status#statusvo "StatusVo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| statusInfo | KycVerifyStatusInfoVo | KycVerifyStatusInfoVo |
| levelInfo | KycLevelInfoVo | KycLevelInfoVo |
| nonExisted | Boolean | If kyc verify record is existed or not, true - not existed false/null - existed |

### KycVerifyStatusInfoVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status#kycverifystatusinfovo "KycVerifyStatusInfoVo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| failReason | STRING | fail reason |
| basicStatus | STRING | INITIAL,PROCESS,REVIEW,PASS,REJECT |
| identityStatus | STRING | INITIAL,PROCESS,REVIEW,PASS,REJECT |
| faceStatus | STRING | INITIAL,PROCESS,REVIEW,PASS,REJECT,SKIP |
| wckStatus | STRING | INITIAL,PROCESS,REVIEW,PASS,REJECT |
| kycUserId | STRING | kyc user id in SAAS |

### KycLevelInfoVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status#kyclevelinfovo "KycLevelInfoVo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| currentLevel | KycLevelItemVo | Current level status |
| passedLevel | KycLevelItemVo | Current passing KYC status level info |
| kycPass | Boolean | If the current user pass the kyc |

### KycLevelItemVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status#kyclevelitemvo "KycLevelItemVo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| levelName | STRING | kyc level name INTERMEDIATE |
| kycStatus | STRING | PROCESS,REVIEW,REFUSED,PASS,DISABLE |
| kycLevelSubStatus | STRING | WCK\_REJECT,HIGH\_RISK |

Request Body Example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status#request-body-example "Request Body Example的直接链接")

# RFI Records Query | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Records-Query#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Kyc RFI Records Query API
=========================

API Description[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Records-Query#api-description "API Description的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Kyc RFI Record Submit API

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Records-Query#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/bapi/ekyc/v2/public/ekyc/customer/page-query-rfi-records`

Request Header[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Records-Query#request-header "Request Header的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| X-SHA2-Signature | STRING | YES | Request Signature |

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Records-Query#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bizEntityKey | STRING | YES | business entity key, each access entity has its own bizEntityKey |
| entityCustomerId | STRING | NO  | customer id, that is, the user id of the access entity site. |
| kycType | STRING | NO  | kyc type，USER |
| recordId | STRING | NO  | Rfi Record Id |
| status | STRING | NO  | Rfi record status:  <br>PROCESS(under process)  <br>UPLOADING(uploading files)  <br>REVIEW(under review)  <br>PASS(file review pass)  <br>REFUSED(file refused)  <br>EXPIRED(file expired)  <br>CLOSE(close file flow) |
| startTime | STRING | NO  | min create time, yyyy-MM-dd |
| endTime | STRING | NO  | max create time, yyyy-MM-dd |
| page | INT | YES | page number, start from 1 |
| rows | INT | YES | rows |

Response Fields[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Records-Query#response-fields "Response Fields的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | STRING | YES |     |
| data | SearchResult | NO  |     |

### SearchResult[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Records-Query#searchresult "SearchResult的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| total | LONG | total records count |
| rows | List<SimpleKycRfiRecordVo> |     |

### SimpleKycRfiRecordVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Records-Query#simplekycrfirecordvo "SimpleKycRfiRecordVo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| recordId | STRING | Rfi record id |
| bizEntityKey | STRING | business entity key |
| entityCustomerId | STRING | Customer id |
| kycType | STRING | KYC type |
| status | STRING | Rfi record status:PROCESS,UPLOADING,REVIEW,PASS,REFUSED,EXPIRED,CLOSE |
| fileTypes | List<STRING> | Rfi record required file types |
| expireTime | DATE | Expired time |
| recordType | STRING | Rfi record type:IDENTITY,WCK |
| auditor | STRING | auditor |
| auditTime | DATE | Audit time |
| dbCreateTime | DATE | Rfi record create time |

Request Body Example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Records-Query#request-body-example "Request Body Example的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "bizEntityKey": "BROKERKEY",    "entityCustomerId": "45712345678999212345",    "kycType": "USER"}

Response Example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Records-Query#response-example "Response Example的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "code": "000000",    "message": null,    "messageDetail": null,    "data": {        "total": 1,        "rows": [            {                "recordId": "12345",                "bizEntityKey": "BROKERKEY",                "kycUserId": "4276875665261234567",                "entityCustomerId": "45712345678999212345",                "kycType": "USER",                "status": "PROCESS",                "subStatus": "INIT",                "fileTypes": [                    "SOF"                ],                "fileData": null,                "expireTime": 1752105600000,                "requestComment": "test",                "recordType": "IDENTITY",                "reason": null,                "remark": null,                "creator": "test@example.com",                "submitter": null,                "auditor": null,                "auditTime": null,                "completeTime": null,                "dbCreateTime": 1750927524935,                "dbModifyTime": 1750927524935            }        ]    },    "success": true}

# Query Kyc Status | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Check KYC Status
================

API Description[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying#api-description "API Description的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Check KYC Status

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/bapi/ekyc/v2/public/ekyc/customer/check-kyc-status`

Request Header[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying#request-header "Request Header的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| X-SHA2-Signature | STRING | YES | Request Signature |

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bizEntityKey | STRING | YES | business entity key, each access entity has its own bizEntityKey |
| entityCustomerId | STRING | YES | customer id，that is, the user id of the access entity site |
| kycType | STRING | YES | kyc type，USER |
| brokerMainAccountId | STRING | YES | broker main account id |
| brokerSubAccountId | STRING | YES | broker sub account id |

Response Fields[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying#response-fields "Response Fields的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | STRING | YES | error code, 000000 is success |
| data | StatusVo | NO  |     |

### StatusVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying#statusvo "StatusVo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| statusInfo | KycVerifyStatusInfoVo | KycVerifyStatusInfoVo |
| levelInfo | KycLevelInfoVo | KycLevelInfoVo |
| nonExisted | Boolean | If kyc verify record is existed or not, true - not existed false/null - existed |

### KycVerifyStatusInfoVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying#kycverifystatusinfovo "KycVerifyStatusInfoVo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| failReason | STRING | fail reason |
| basicStatus | STRING | INITIAL,PROCESS,REVIEW,PASS,REJECT |
| identityStatus | STRING | INITIAL,PROCESS,REVIEW,PASS,REJECT |
| faceStatus | STRING | INITIAL,PROCESS,REVIEW,PASS,REJECT,SKIP |
| wckStatus | STRING | INITIAL,PROCESS,REVIEW,PASS,REJECT |
| kycUserId | STRING | kyc user id in SAAS |

### KycLevelInfoVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying#kyclevelinfovo "KycLevelInfoVo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| currentLevel | KycLevelItemVo | Current level status |
| passedLevel | KycLevelItemVo | Current passing KYC status level info |
| kycPass | Boolean | If the current user pass the kyc |

### KycLevelItemVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying#kyclevelitemvo "KycLevelItemVo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| levelName | STRING | kyc level name INTERMEDIATE |
| kycStatus | STRING | PROCESS,REVIEW,REFUSED,PASS,DISABLE |
| kycLevelSubStatus | STRING | WCK\_REJECT,HIGH\_RISK |

Request Body Example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying#request-body-example "Request Body Example的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Query Client If New User | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

* * *

id: Query-Client-If-New-User sidebar\_label: 查询是否属于新用户 （USER DATA）[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures#id-query-client-if-new-usersidebar_label-%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E5%B1%9E%E4%BA%8E%E6%96%B0%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7-user-data "id: Query-Client-If-New-User
sidebar_label: 查询是否属于新用户 （USER DATA）的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

查询是否属于新用户 （USER DATA）
=====================

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/fapi/v1/apiReferral/ifNewUser`

权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures#%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "权重的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**100**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必须 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| brokerId | STRING | YES |     |
| type | INT | NO  | 1:U本位合约 2: 币本位合约; 默认：1:U本位合约 |
| revWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   如用户启用统一帐户，请使用对应的 `/papi` 接口

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {	"brokerId": "ABCD1234",	"rebateWorking":false, //true or false,是否满足API返佣条件（不判断新老用户是否返佣）	"ifNewUser": "true" //true 新用户标准，false 老用户标准}

*   [id: Query-Client-If-New-User sidebar\_label: 查询是否属于新用户 （USER DATA）](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures#id-query-client-if-new-usersidebar_label-%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E5%B1%9E%E4%BA%8E%E6%96%B0%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7-user-data)

*   [权重](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures#%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D)
