# KYC Sharing | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

KYC Sharing
===========

API Description[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration#api-description "API Description的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Share Exchange Link User KYC Info API.

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/bapi/ekyc/v2/public/ekyc/customer/share-kyc-data`

Request Header[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration#request-header "Request Header的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| X-SHA2-Signature | STRING | YES | Request Signature |

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bizEntityKey | STRING | YES | business entity key, each access entity has its own bizEntityKey |
| requestNo | STRING | YES | every request unique number, max length is 120 |
| kycInfo | STRING | YES | KycInfo |

### KycInfo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration#kycinfo "KycInfo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| userInfo | UserInfo | YES |     |
| basicInfo | BasicInfo | YES |     |
| identifyInfo | IdentifyInfo | YES |     |

### UserInfo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration#userinfo "UserInfo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bizEntityKey | STRING | YES | business entity key, each access entity has its own bizEntityKey |
| entityCustomerId | STRING | YES | customer id，that is, the user id of the access entity site, max length is 128 |
| brokerMainAccountId | STRING | YES | broker main account id |
| brokerSubAccountId | STRING | YES | broker sub account id |
| notifyUrl | STRING | YES | notify url when kyc status changed |
| extra | STRING | NO  | extra info in JSON format |

### BasicInfo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration#basicinfo "BasicInfo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| firstName | STRING | YES |     |
| middleName | STRING | NO  |     |
| lastName | STRING | YES |     |
| residentialCountry | STRING | YES | country of residence: 2-alpha code in UPPER CASE |
| dob | STRING | YES | yyyy-MM-dd |
| country | STRING | YES | nationality, 2-alpha code in UPPER CASE |
| userSubmitIp | STRING | YES |     |
| address | STRING | YES | max is 400 |
| city | STRING | YES | max is 100 |
| postalCode | STRING | NO  | max is 50 |

### IdentifyInfo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration#identifyinfo "IdentifyInfo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| documentType | STRING | YES | document type, for example: ID\_CARD, PASSPORT, DRIVING\_LICENSE,RESIDENCE\_PERMIT |
| selectCountry | STRING | Yes | user selected country when do Id verification 2-alpha code in UPPER CASE |
| frontFileUrl | STRING | YES | id front image download url |
| backFileUrl | STRING | NO  | id back image download url |
| faceFileUrl | STRING | YES | face image download url |
| firstName | STRING | YES | please ensure this matches the “firstName” under Basic Info table above, if not it will be rejected. |
| middleName | STRING | NO  |     |
| lastName | STRING | YES | please ensure this matches the “lastName” under Basic Info table above, if not it will be rejected. |
| dob | STRING | YES | date of birth: yyyy-MM-dd |
| idType | STRING | YES | id doc type. for example: ID\_CARD, PASSPORT, DRIVING\_LICENSE,RESIDENCE\_PERMIT |
| idSubType | STRING | NO  | id doc sub type |
| idCountry | STRING | YES | 2-alpha code in UPPER CASE |
| nationalityCountry | STRING | YES | 2-alpha code in UPPER CASE |
| idNumber | STRING | YES | id Number |
| idExpiry | STRING | NO  | yyyy-MM-dd |
| userSubmitIp | STRING | YES |     |
| idUsState | STRING | NO  |     |
| personalNumber | STRING | NO  |     |
| gender | STRING | NO  |     |
| issuingAuthority | STRING | NO  |     |
| issuingDate | STRING | NO  | yyyy-MM-dd |
| issuingPlace | STRING | NO  |     |
| registrationNumber | STRING | NO  |     |
| city | STRING | NO  |     |
| stateCode | STRING | NO  |     |
| postalCode | STRING | NO  |     |
| address | STRING | NO  |     |

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Webhook Notifications | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Webhook-Notifications#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Webhook Notifications
=====================

The webhook notifications function can be implemented by passing a `notifyUrl` when calling our KYC endpoints to initialize KYC.

`notifyUrl` is a mandatory parameter when initiating KYC. If not required, you can pass a "." instead.

Binance will send a POST request webhook to your notifyUrl when there are updates to the KYC record.

If the system's request to your notifyUrl fails, the system will auto retry as per the below policy:

*   On first failure, retry in 3 minutes
*   On second failure, retry in 5 minutes
*   On third failure, retry in 10 minutes

Request sample[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Webhook-Notifications#request-sample "Request sample的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {  "bizEntityKey": "BROKERKEY",  "entityCustomerId": "45712345678999212345",  "kycType": "USER",  "eventType": "USER-STATUS",  "eventVo": {    "statusInfo": {      "bizEntityKey": "BROKERKEY",      "entityCustomerId": "45712345678999212345",      "kycUserId": "45712345678999212345",      "userType": "USER",      "kycType": "USER",      "kycStatus": "REJECT",      "failReason": "This ID number has been used. Log in to your original account to complete the transaction.",      "basicStatus": "PASS",      "basicFailReason": "",      "identityStatus": "REJECT",      "identityFailReason": "This ID number has been used. Log in to your original account to complete the transaction.",      "faceStatus": "REJECT",      "faceFailReason": "This ID number has been used. Log in to your original account to complete the transaction.",      "wckStatus": "INITIAL",      "dbCreateTime": 1751010142158,      "dbModifyTime": 1751010192997,      "identityCompleteTime": 1751010192926,      "faceCompleteTime": 1751010192931,      "riskRateLevel": "MEDIUM",      "riskRateScore": 31    },    "levelInfo": {      "currentLevel": {        "levelName": "INTERMEDIATE",        "levelDesc": "INTERMEDIATE",        "kycStatus": "REFUSED",        "limit": {          "fiatCurrency": "USD",          "withdrawFiatDailyLimit": 20000,          "cryptoCurrency": "BTC",          "depositCryptoDailyLimit": -1,          "withdrawCryptoDailyLimit": 100        }      },      "kycPass": false,      "hasMultipleLevels": false,      "passedLevels": []    },    "basicInfo": {      "id": 4581048056761212345,      "bizEntityKey": "BROKERKEY",      "bizKey": "BROKERKEY",      "kycUserId": "45712345678999212345",      "basicType": "USER",      "basicStatus": "PASS",      "firstName": "BO",      "middleName": "testMiddleName",      "lastName": "LI",      "residentialCountry": "AE",      "dob": "1986-08-14",      "postalCode": "123456",      "city": "bbb",      "address": "aaa",      "submitIp": "192.168.1.1",      "dbCreateTime": 1751010142182,      "dbModifyTime": 1751010142182,      "country": "AE",      "requestTime": 1751010142182,      "requestIp": "192.168.1.1"    }  },  "version": 1751010193080}

Notify Webhook Verification[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Webhook-Notifications#notify-webhook-verification "Notify Webhook Verification的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  Receive the webhook request body as String
2.  Use the `HmacSHA256` algorithm to sign the request body String obtained in 1st step, and compare the value of request header - `X-SHA2-Signature` , if they are the same, then the request body is valid, otherwise invalid.

### javascript example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Webhook-Notifications#javascript-example "javascript example的直接链接")

    const crypto = require('crypto')const secret = '<your_secret_key>'const postData = '<webhook_request_body>'const hash = crypto.createHmac('sha256', secret).update(postData).digest('hex')

### java example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Webhook-Notifications#java-example "java example的直接链接")

    import org.apache.commons.codec.binary.Hex;import javax.crypto.Mac;import javax.crypto.spec.SecretKeySpec;import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;import java.security.MessageDigest;public class App {    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {        String rawString = "<webhook_request_body>";        Mac sha256Hmac = Mac.getInstance("HmacSHA256");        SecretKeySpec secretKey = new SecretKeySpec("<your_secret_key>".getBytes(), "HmacSHA256");        sha256Hmac.init(secretKey);        String eventSignature = new String(Hex.encodeHex(sha256Hmac.doFinal(rawString.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8))));        System.err.println(eventSignature);    }}

*   [Request sample](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Webhook-Notifications#request-sample)
    
*   [Notify Webhook Verification](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Webhook-Notifications#notify-webhook-verification)
    *   [javascript example](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Webhook-Notifications#javascript-example)
        
    *   [java example](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Webhook-Notifications#java-example)

---

# Request Specifications | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Request-Specifications#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Request Specifications
======================

General API Information[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Request-Specifications#general-api-information "General API Information的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   The base endpoint is: **[https://cb.link-kycapi.com](https://cb.link-kycapi.com/)
    **
*   All endpoints return either a JSON object or array.
*   All request parameters should be passed in the request body as either a JSON object or array.
*   All endpoints require passing a valid `X-SHA-Signature` header.
    *   Do note that the signature generation method here may not align with the method used for calling other Binance API endpoints (such as [https://fapi.binance.com](https://fapi.binance.com/)
        )
*   All endpoints should be called from whitelisted IP addresses.
    *   Otherwise, it is expected that you would encounter a HTTP `403` return code.

Signature Generation[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Request-Specifications#signature-generation "Signature Generation的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  KYC Data should be sent in the Request Body in JSON format.
2.  Convert the Request Body JSON to a JSON String
3.  Use the **HmacSHA256** algorithm to sign the JSON String, and assign the result to the `X-SHA-Signature` request header.

Examples[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Request-Specifications#examples "Examples的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  Request Body to be sent:

    {    "bizEntityKey": "<your_biz_entity_key>",    "entityCustomerId": "<your_user_id>",    "kycType": "USER",    "extra": {    },    "notifyUrl": "<your_notify_url>"}

2.  Converted Request BODY to JSON String:

    { "bizEntityKey": "<your_biz_entity_key>", "entityCustomerId": "<your_user_id>", "kycType": "USER", "extra": { },"notifyUrl": "<your_notify_url>" }

3.  Sign the JSON String (see below examples).

### NodeJS Example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Request-Specifications#nodejs-example "NodeJS Example的直接链接")

    const crypto = require('crypto')const secret = '<your_secret_key>'const postData = {  bizEntityKey: '<your_biz_entity_key>', // entity key will be decided and given Binance team  entityCustomerId: '<your_user_id>',  kycType: 'USER',  extra: {},  notifyUrl: '<your_notify_url>'}const hash = crypto.createHmac('sha256', secret).update(JSON.stringify(postData)).digest('hex')

### Java Example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Request-Specifications#java-example "Java Example的直接链接")

    import org.apache.commons.codec.binary.Hex;import javax.crypto.Mac;import javax.crypto.spec.SecretKeySpec;import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;import java.security.MessageDigest;public class App {    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {        String rawString = "{ \"bizEntityKey\": \"<your_biz_entity_key>\", \"entityCustomerId\": \"<your_user_id>\", \"kycType\": \"USER\", \"extra\": { }, \"notifyUrl\": \"<your_notify_url>\" }";        Mac sha256Hmac = Mac.getInstance("HmacSHA256");        SecretKeySpec secretKey = new SecretKeySpec("<your_secret_key>".getBytes(), "HmacSHA256");        sha256Hmac.init(secretKey);        String eventSignature = new String(Hex.encodeHex(sha256Hmac.doFinal(rawString.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8))));        System.err.println(eventSignature);    }}

### Python Example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Request-Specifications#python-example "Python Example的直接链接")

    import requestsimport jsonimport hmacimport hashlibbody = {    "bizEntityKey": "<your_biz_entity_key>",    "entityCustomerId": "<your_user_id>",    "kycType": "USER",    "extra": {    },    "notifyUrl": "<your_notify_url>"}api_secret = '<your_secret_key>' ##please replace with your ownjson.dumps(body, separators=(',', ':')) #use this instead to remove extra spacessignature = hmac.new(api_secret.encode(), json_str.encode(), hashlib.sha256).hexdigest()

*   [General API Information](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Request-Specifications#general-api-information)
    
*   [Signature Generation](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Request-Specifications#signature-generation)
    
*   [Examples](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Request-Specifications#examples)
    *   [NodeJS Example](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Request-Specifications#nodejs-example)
        
    *   [Java Example](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Request-Specifications#java-example)
        
    *   [Python Example](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/general-info/Request-Specifications#python-example)

# Introduction | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/Introduction#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Fast API can help users quickly authorize specific account permissions, create API keys, and automatically connect to third-party API link platforms. For more details, please refer to the [FAQ](https://www.binance.com/en/support/faq/what-is-fast-api-and-how-does-it-work-6aa7e2253c544d91b60746bfd03fd75d)
.

Onboarding Steps[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/Introduction#onboarding-steps "Onboarding Steps的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  Log in [Binance Developer center](https://developers.binance.com/en)
     with [verified entity(enterprise) account](https://www.binance.com/en/support/faq/how-to-complete-entity-verification-kyb-on-binance-step-by-step-guide-360015552032)
    
2.  Apply for "**Entity KYB**" & "**OAuth Security KYB**"
3.  Once both passed, client can create "**Client ID**", upload "**logo(60 x60)**" and set up "**callback url**". We will send an Email that include “**Client ID**” and “**Client Secret**”(**please do not share your Client secret with anyone**)
4.  Download the [SDK](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xFvDTEjUQCL8bviGR9FfszzTiV6pN8Ci/view)
     for utilizing the pop up dialogues.
5.  Apply for the oAuth scopes required.
6.  Start development of oAuth and Fast API.

### Minimum requirements for Fast API:[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/Introduction#minimum-requirements-for-fast-api "Minimum requirements for Fast API:的直接链接")

*   **account:status**
*   **create:apikey** (For Spot & Margin trading permission, and Futures trading permission) _Or_ **create:apikey:margin** (For Margin Loan, repay, and Transfer permission) _Or_ **create:apikey:options** (For European Options Trading permission)
*   **user:openId**

Remarks[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/Introduction#remarks "Remarks的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  The baseurl is "[https://www.binanceapis.com/oauth-api](https://www.binanceapis.com/oauth-api)
    "
2.  When Link clients start to use oAuth, they will get their unique “Client ID” and “Client secret”.
3.  When each User grants permission via oAuth, the Link client will get an unique “User’s open ID” and an "Access token".
4.  Access token will be expired once the User’s API key is generated.
5.  **Each user account** can only use the Fast API to connect with **Each Link client Once**.
6.  Link client need to provide a public key for encrypting User’s API key, when requesting the API generation. Additionally, Link clients should be able to decrypt the API key package, and store it safely.
7.  When Link client request to generate a user's API key, it should state clearly if this API key should have certain permission(s). In request params:

*   enableTrade → whether to enable Spot & Margin Trading
*   enableFutureTrade → whether to enable Futures Trading
*   enableMargin → whether to enable Margin Loan, Repay and Transfer
*   enableEuropeanOptions → whether to enable European Options Trading

8.  To know if a user has a Futures account, Link client should use Oauth to check the user's status.and show the necessary Front end UI to allow the user to select. The standard Front end is provided as a SDK.

Common Error messages[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/Introduction#common-error-messages "Common Error messages的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 050009[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/Introduction#050009 "050009的直接链接")

*   Invalid public key. Solution:

1.  Do not use pem format
2.  Encode the Public key

### 050010[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/Introduction#050010 "050010的直接链接")

*   API generation failed.

### 001512[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/Introduction#001512 "001512的直接链接")

*   Each account can only generate one API key for a certain third party via Fast API.

### 001464[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/Introduction#001464 "001464的直接链接")

*   You have reached the API Key limit. Please delete the unused ones to create new API Keys.

### 2000039xxx[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/Introduction#2000039xxx "2000039xxx的直接链接")

*   There may be multi error starting with 2000039, which represents the error message related to compliance.

*   [Onboarding Steps](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/Introduction#onboarding-steps)
    *   [Minimum requirements for Fast API:](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/Introduction#minimum-requirements-for-fast-api)
        
*   [Remarks](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/Introduction#remarks)
    
*   [Common Error messages](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/Introduction#common-error-messages)
    *   [050009](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/Introduction#050009)
        
    *   [050010](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/Introduction#050010)
        
    *   [001512](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/Introduction#001512)
        
    *   [001464](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/Introduction#001464)
        
    *   [2000039xxx](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/Introduction#2000039xxx)

id: Get-Client-Email-Customized-Id sidebar\_label: 查询用户 email 和定制化 Id（USER DATA）（仅支持brokerId拥有者）[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-Client-Email-Customized-Id#id-get-client-email-customized-idsidebar_label-%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7-email-%E5%92%8C%E5%AE%9A%E5%88%B6%E5%8C%96-iduser-data%E4%BB%85%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81brokerid%E6%8B%A5%E6%9C%89%E8%80%85 "id: Get-Client-Email-Customized-Id
sidebar_label: 查询用户 email 和定制化 Id（USER DATA）（仅支持brokerId拥有者）的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

查询用户 email 和定制化 Id（USER DATA）（仅支持brokerId拥有者）
=============================================

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-Client-Email-Customized-Id#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/fapi/v1/apiReferral/customization`

权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-Client-Email-Customized-Id#%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "权重的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**100**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-Client-Email-Customized-Id#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必须 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| customerId | STRING | NO  |     |
| email | STRING | NO  |     |
| page | LONG | NO  | 分页，默认 1 |
| limit | LONG | NO  | 单页条目数，默认 100，最大 1000 |
| revWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   customerId 和 email 不能同时发，返回 broker 自定义的 customization关系

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-Client-Email-Customized-Id#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

id: Get-Income-History sidebar\_label: 获取账户损益资金流水(USER DATA)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-Income-History#id-get-income-historysidebar_label-%E8%8E%B7%E5%8F%96%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E6%8D%9F%E7%9B%8A%E8%B5%84%E9%87%91%E6%B5%81%E6%B0%B4user-data "id: Get-Income-History
sidebar_label: 获取账户损益资金流水(USER DATA)的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

获取账户损益资金流水(USER DATA)
=====================

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-Income-History#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/fapi/v1/income`

权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-Income-History#%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "权重的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**100**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-Income-History#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必须 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| symbol | STRING | NO  | 交易对 |
| incomeType | STRING | NO  | 收益类型 "TRANSFER"，"WELCOME\_BONUS", "REALIZED\_PNL"，"FUNDING\_FEE", "COMMISSION", and "INSURANCE\_CLEAR" |
| startTime | LONG | NO  | 起始时间 |
| endTime | LONG | NO  | 结束时间 |
| limit | INT | NO  | 返回的结果集数量 默认值:100 最大值:1000 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   如果`incomeType`没有发送，返回所有类型账户损益资金流水

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-Income-History#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    [	{		"symbol": "BTCUSDT", // 交易对，仅针对涉及交易对的资金流		"incomeType": "TRANSFER",	// 资金流类型		"income": "-0.37500000", // 资金流数量，正数代表流入，负数代表流出		"asset": "USDT", // 资产内容		"info":"", // 备注信息，取决于流水类型		"time": 1570608000000, // 时间	},	{		"symbol": "BTCUSDT",		"incomeType": "COMMISSION", 		"income": "-0.01000000",		"asset": "USDT",		"info":"",		"time": 1570636800000,	}]

| --- | --- | --- | --- |

| startTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| endTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| limit | INT | NO  | 默认 500, 最大 1000 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-Rebate-Volume#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# FAQ | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

FAQ
===

What is KYC Status Notification URL?[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#what-is-kyc-status-notification-url "What is KYC Status Notification URL?的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

A POST webhook notify function that provides call backs when KYC information changes.  
Retry Policy : Retry at 3rd, 5th, and 10th minute

Where can I get BizEntityKey?[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#where-can-i-get-bizentitykey "Where can I get BizEntityKey?的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You can ask Binance to provide `BizEntityKey` for you.

What is entityCustomerId?[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#what-is-entitycustomerid "What is entityCustomerId?的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

A unique user id in the Exchange Link system.  
Client/user needs to provide this to Binance to link accounts

How to populate the "language" field?[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#how-to-populate-the-language-field "How to populate the "language" field?的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Language code  
For Example: en  

Other possible options:  
{ "en": "English", "ar": "العربية", "ar-BH": "العربية (البحرين)", "bg": "български", "bn": "বাংলা", "cs": "Čeština", "de": "Deutsch", "de-CH": "Deutsch (Schweiz)", "en-AU": "English (Australia)", "en-BH": "English (Bahrain)", "en-GB": "English (Britain)", "en-KZ": "English (Kazakhstan)", "en-NZ": "English (New Zealand)", "es": "Español (Internacional)", "es-AR": "Español (Argentina)", "es-LA": "Español (Latinoamérica)", "fr": "Français", "he": "עברית", "id": "Bahasa Indonesia", "en-IN": "English (India)", "it": "Italiano", "kk-KZ": "Қазақша (Қазақстан)", "ko": "한국어", "kz": "Қазақша", "lv": "latviešu valoda", "ng": "English (Nigeria)", "nl": "Nederlands", "ph": "Filipino", "pl": "Polski", "pt": "Português", "pt-BR": "Português (Brasil)", "pt-PT": "Português (Portugal)", "ro": "Română", "ru": "Русский", "ru-KZ": "Русский (Казахстан)", "sv": "svenska", "th": "ไทย", "tr": "Türkçe", "uk-UA": "Українська", "vi": "Tiếng Việt", "zh-CN": "简体中文", "zh-TC": "繁體中文" }

About Sharing Data?[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#about-sharing-data "About Sharing Data?的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

For KYC records originally initiated through KYC url, you cannot use KYC Sharing even if the KYC record is reset.

For KYC records originally initiated through KYC Sharing, you can reset and generate KYC url to redo it.

Misplaced / Uncredited Deposits?[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#misplaced--uncredited-deposits "Misplaced / Uncredited Deposits?的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### What if my user deposited into a retired wallet address, or into a sub-account that has not completed KYC yet?[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#what-if-my-user-deposited-into-a-retired-wallet-address-or-into-a-sub-account-that-has-not-completed-kyc-yet "What if my user deposited into a retired wallet address, or into a sub-account that has not completed KYC yet?的直接链接")

Since the implementation of KYC restrictions, newly created sub accounts will not be able to create an API key and retrieve a deposit address without first completing KYC, hence this scenario would not be applicable.

For older sub-accounts where users might have saved a copy of the wallet address and did not complete KYC, the deposit will be rejected. In order to retrieve the deposit, please use the SAPI asset recovery API to submit an appeal request. If you do not have the SAPI asset recovery API documentation, please approach our business team or contact our Binance Link team.

Please note that the appeal will be refunded to the source address, and could take up to 30 days to process. Please manage your user accordingly.

Overview of Restrictions[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#overview-of-restrictions "Overview of Restrictions的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 1.Service Restrictions[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#1service-restrictions "1.Service Restrictions的直接链接")

Sub-Account Restrictions

| Services | Restrictions |
| --- | --- |
| Deposits | Restricted |
| Withdrawals | Allowed, unless otherwise specified |
| Spot Trading | Restricted. Cannot place new orders and all existing spot orders will be canceled |
| Futures Trading | Restricted. Cannot place new orders, but can reduce existing positions |
| Margin Trading | Restricted. Cannot place new orders, but can reduce existing positions |

### 2.API Restrictions[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#2api-restrictions "2.API Restrictions的直接链接")

Not allowed to create or permission API keys on a non-KYC-ed sub account Common APIs affected:

*   POST /sapi/v1/broker/subAccountApi
*   POST /sapi/v1/broker/subAccount/futures
*   POST /sapi/v1/broker/subAccountApi/permission

Not allowed to receive deposits into a non-KYC-ed sub account Common APIs affected:

*   POST /sapi/v1/broker/subAccountApi/permission/universalTransfer
*   POST /sapi/v1/broker/transfer
*   POST /sapi/v1/broker/transfer/futures
*   POST /sapi/v1/broker/universalTransfer

Note:

*   Non-KYC-ed Sub account can withdraw to Master account
*   Non-KYC-ed Sub account can withdraw to a sub account that is KYC-ed.
*   Non-KYC-ed Sub account CANNOT withdraw to another non-KYC-ed sub account
*   Master account CANNOT deposit into a non-KYC-ed sub account

*   [What is KYC Status Notification URL?](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#what-is-kyc-status-notification-url)
    
*   [Where can I get BizEntityKey?](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#where-can-i-get-bizentitykey)
    
*   [What is entityCustomerId?](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#what-is-entitycustomerid)
    
*   [How to populate the "language" field?](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#how-to-populate-the-language-field)
    
*   [About Sharing Data?](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#about-sharing-data)
    
*   [Misplaced / Uncredited Deposits?](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#misplaced--uncredited-deposits)
    *   [What if my user deposited into a retired wallet address, or into a sub-account that has not completed KYC yet?](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#what-if-my-user-deposited-into-a-retired-wallet-address-or-into-a-sub-account-that-has-not-completed-kyc-yet)
        
*   [Overview of Restrictions](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#overview-of-restrictions)
    *   [1.Service Restrictions](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#1service-restrictions)
        
    *   [2.API Restrictions](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/Faq#2api-restrictions)

# Link Multiple Accounts | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Link-Multiple-Accounts#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Link Multiple Accounts
======================

API Description[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Link-Multiple-Accounts#api-description "API Description的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If one person has multiple accounts, you can link these accounts together so the customers have to do KYC once. The only step you need to do is call `add-account-info-list` API

This is also the relevant endpoint for utilizing Oauth Link.

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Link-Multiple-Accounts#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/bapi/ekyc/v2/public/ekyc/customer/add-account-info-list`

Request Header[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Link-Multiple-Accounts#request-header "Request Header的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| X-SHA2-Signature | STRING | YES | Request Signature |

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Link-Multiple-Accounts#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bizEntityKey | STRING | YES | business entity key, each access entity has its own bizEntityKey |
| accountList | LIST | YES | Account relation list |

### Account relation list[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Link-Multiple-Accounts#account-relation-list "Account relation list的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| entityCustomerId | STRING | YES | customer id，that is, the user id of the access entity site, Not Required for Oauth Link |
| openId | STRING | NO  | Required for Oauth Link |
| oauthClientId | STRING | NO  | Required for Oauth Link |
| brokerMainAccountId | STRING | YES | Broker main account id |
| brokerSubAccountId | STRING | YES | Broker sub account id |

Response Fields[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Link-Multiple-Accounts#response-fields "Response Fields的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | STRING | YES | error code，000000000 is success |

Request Body Example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Link-Multiple-Accounts#request-body-example "Request Body Example的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "bizEntityKey": "BROKERKEY",    "accountList": [{        "entityCustomerId": "ABC",        "brokerSubAccountId": "2789382993653477377",        "brokerMainAccountId": "123456789"    },    {        "entityCustomerId": "ABC",        "brokerSubAccountId": "2789382993653477377",        "brokerMainAccountId": "123456789"    }        ]}

Response Example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Link-Multiple-Accounts#response-example "Response Example的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "code": "000000",    "message": null,    "messageDetail": null,    "data": null,    "success": true}

*   [API Description](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Link-Multiple-Accounts#api-description)
    
*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Link-Multiple-Accounts#http-request)
    
*   [Request Header](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Link-Multiple-Accounts#request-header)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Link-Multiple-Accounts#request-parameters)
    *   [Account relation list](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Link-Multiple-Accounts#account-relation-list)
        
*   [Response Fields](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Link-Multiple-Accounts#response-fields)
    
*   [Request Body Example](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Link-Multiple-Accounts#request-body-example)
    
*   [Response Example](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-integration/Link-Multiple-Accounts#response-example)

---

# Create API key for User | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/create-api-key#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Create API key for User
=======================

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/create-api-key#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/v1/api-key/create`

**Authorization:** Bearer {access\_token}

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/create-api-key#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| apiName | STRING | YES | custom api name, can be repeated |
| enableTrade | BOOLEAN | YES | `true` or `false` |
| enableFutureTrade | BOOLEAN | YES | `true` or `false` |
| enableMargin | BOOLEAN | NO  | `true` or `false`. If it's not sent or the user doesn't have Margin account, it will be false by default. |
| enableEuropeanOptions | BOOLEAN | NO  | `true` or `false`. If it's not sent or the user doesn't have Options account, it will be false by default. |
| status | ENUM | NO  | `1` or `null` = Access IP unrestricted, `2` = Trusted IPs only, `3` = Trusted Third Party IPs only. If you want to enable any Trade permission(including Spot, Margin or Futures), you must restrict the IP access. |
| ipAddress | STRING | NO  | Trusted IPs. Can be added in batches, separated by commas. Max 30 for an API key |
| thirdPartyName | STRING | NO  | Third party name must match the name in the server side. |
| publicKey | STRING | YES | Your custom public key. The server side will use it to encrypt the apikey, and client decrypts with a private key. Use RSA algorithm, the keysize is customized with client, usually 1024 or 2048 ([Reference](https://www.devglan.com/online-tools/rsa-encryption-decryption)<br>). |
| apiKeyPublicKey | STRING | NO  | The public key for asymmetrical key type(Ed25519 and RSA). Please see [https://www.binance.com/en/support/faq/detail/6b9a63f1e3384cf48a2eedb82767a69a](https://www.binance.com/en/support/faq/detail/6b9a63f1e3384cf48a2eedb82767a69a) |

Response Example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/create-api-key#response-example "Response Example的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {	"code": "000000",	"message": null,	"data": {		"apiKey": "ZN02rGiWOE6*****yjOZg==",		"apiName": "testoauth1",		"secretKey": "rH1cO1374UhZXfn2*********3EJjg/JT6gg==",		"enableTrade": true,		"enableFutureTrade": true,		"enableMargin": false,		"enableEuropeanOptions": true,		"createTime": 1717746281067		},	"success": true }

*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/create-api-key#http-request)
    *   [Header](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/create-api-key#header)
        
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/create-api-key#request-parameters)
    
*   [Response Example](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api/create-api-key#response-example)

---

# Introduction | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Fast API can help users quickly authorize specific account permissions, create API keys, and automatically connect to third-party API link platforms. For more details, please refer to the [FAQ](https://www.binance.com/en/support/faq/what-is-fast-api-and-how-does-it-work-6aa7e2253c544d91b60746bfd03fd75d)
.

Onboarding Steps[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api#onboarding-steps "Onboarding Steps的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  Log in [Binance Developer center](https://developers.binance.com/en)
     with [verified entity(enterprise) account](https://www.binance.com/en/support/faq/how-to-complete-entity-verification-kyb-on-binance-step-by-step-guide-360015552032)
    
2.  Apply for "**Entity KYB**" & "**OAuth Security KYB**"
3.  Once both passed, client can create "**Client ID**", upload "**logo(60 x60)**" and set up "**callback url**". We will send an Email that include “**Client ID**” and “**Client Secret**”(**please do not share your Client secret with anyone**)
4.  Download the [SDK](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xFvDTEjUQCL8bviGR9FfszzTiV6pN8Ci/view)
     for utilizing the pop up dialogues.
5.  Apply for the oAuth scopes required.
6.  Start development of oAuth and Fast API.

### Minimum requirements for Fast API:[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api#minimum-requirements-for-fast-api "Minimum requirements for Fast API:的直接链接")

*   **account:status**
*   **create:apikey** (For Spot & Margin trading permission, and Futures trading permission) _Or_ **create:apikey:margin** (For Margin Loan, repay, and Transfer permission) _Or_ **create:apikey:options** (For European Options Trading permission)
*   **user:openId**

Remarks[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api#remarks "Remarks的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  The baseurl is "[https://www.binanceapis.com/oauth-api](https://www.binanceapis.com/oauth-api)
    "
2.  When Link clients start to use oAuth, they will get their unique “Client ID” and “Client secret”.
3.  When each User grants permission via oAuth, the Link client will get an unique “User’s open ID” and an "Access token".
4.  Access token will be expired once the User’s API key is generated.
5.  **Each user account** can only use the Fast API to connect with **Each Link client Once**.
6.  Link client need to provide a public key for encrypting User’s API key, when requesting the API generation. Additionally, Link clients should be able to decrypt the API key package, and store it safely.
7.  When Link client request to generate a user's API key, it should state clearly if this API key should have certain permission(s). In request params:

*   enableTrade → whether to enable Spot & Margin Trading
*   enableFutureTrade → whether to enable Futures Trading
*   enableMargin → whether to enable Margin Loan, Repay and Transfer
*   enableEuropeanOptions → whether to enable European Options Trading

8.  To know if a user has a Futures account, Link client should use Oauth to check the user's status.and show the necessary Front end UI to allow the user to select. The standard Front end is provided as a SDK.

Common Error messages[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api#common-error-messages "Common Error messages的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 050009[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api#050009 "050009的直接链接")

*   Invalid public key. Solution:

1.  Do not use pem format
2.  Encode the Public key

### 050010[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api#050010 "050010的直接链接")

*   API generation failed.

### 001512[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api#001512 "001512的直接链接")

*   Each account can only generate one API key for a certain third party via Fast API.

### 001464[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api#001464 "001464的直接链接")

*   You have reached the API Key limit. Please delete the unused ones to create new API Keys.

### 2000039xxx[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api#2000039xxx "2000039xxx的直接链接")

*   There may be multi error starting with 2000039, which represents the error message related to compliance.

*   [Onboarding Steps](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api#onboarding-steps)
    *   [Minimum requirements for Fast API:](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api#minimum-requirements-for-fast-api)
        
*   [Remarks](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api#remarks)
    
*   [Common Error messages](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api#common-error-messages)
    *   [050009](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api#050009)
        
    *   [050010](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api#050010)
        
    *   [001512](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api#001512)
        
    *   [001464](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api#001464)
        
    *   [2000039xxx](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/fast-api#2000039xxx)

# OAuth 2.0 APIs for Binance APIs | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-open-api/apis#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

API 1. Get user info[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-open-api/apis#api-1-get-user-info "API 1. Get user info的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    curl 'https://www.binanceapis.com/oauth-api/v1/user-info' \--header 'Authorization: Bearer {access_token}'

**Parameters:**

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| access\_token | String | YES |     |

**Response:**

    {  "code": "000000",  "message": null,  "data": {    "userId": "e10e20b7f20947e7bd206b15ce3dae90"  },  "success": true}

API 2. Revoke access\_token[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-open-api/apis#api-2-revoke-access_token "API 2. Revoke access_token的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    curl --request POST 'https://www.binanceapis.com/oauth-api/v1/revoke-token' \--header 'Authorization: Bearer {access_token}'

**Parameters:**

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| access\_token | String | YES |     |

**Response:**

    {  "code": "000000",  "message": null,  "data": true, // true means clear access_token success  "success": true}

*   [API 1. Get user info](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-open-api/apis#api-1-get-user-info)
    
*   [API 2. Revoke access\_token](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-open-api/apis#api-2-revoke-access_token)

# Query Linked Accounts | Binance Open Platform

Query Linked Accounts Info
==========================

API Description[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Linked-Accounts#api-description "API Description的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Query Linked Accounts Info

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Linked-Accounts#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/bapi/ekyc/v2/public/ekyc/customer/query-linked-accounts`

Request Header[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Linked-Accounts#request-header "Request Header的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| X-SHA2-Signature | STRING | YES | Request Signature |

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bizEntityKey | STRING | YES | business entity key, each access entity has its own bizEntityKey |
| entityCustomerId | STRING | YES | customer id, that is, the user id of the access entity site. Not Required for Oauth Link |
| brokerMainAccountId | STRING | YES | Broker main account id |
| openId | STRING | NO  | Required for Oauth Link |
| oauthClientId | STRING | NO  | Required for Oauth Link |

| data | LinkedBrokerAccountsResponse | NO  |     |

| Name | Type | Description |

| brokerMainAccountId | STRING | Broker main account id |

# 概览 | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Rest 基本信息[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade#rest-%E5%9F%BA%E6%9C%AC%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF "Rest 基本信息的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   現貨接口的baseurl: **[https://api.binance.com](https://api.binance.com/)
    **
*   合約接口的baseurl: **[https://fapi.binance.com](https://fapi.binance.com/)
    **
*   所有接口的响应都是JSON格式
*   响应中如有数组，数组元素以时间升序排列，越早的数据越提前。
*   所有时间、时间戳均为UNIX时间，单位为毫秒
*   HTTP `4XX` 错误码用于指示错误的请求内容、行为、格式。
*   HTTP `403` 错误码表示违反WAF限制(Web应用程序防火墙)。
*   HTTP `429` 错误码表示警告访问频次超限，即将被封IP
*   HTTP `418` 表示收到429后继续访问，于是被封了。
*   HTTP `5XX` 错误码用于指示Binance服务侧的问题。
*   HTTP `504` 表示API服务端已经向业务核心提交了请求但未能获取响应，特别需要注意的是`504`代码不代表请求失败，而是未知。很可能已经得到了执行，也有可能执行失败，需要做进一步确认。
*   每个接口都有可能抛出异常，异常响应格式如下：

    {  "code": -1121,  "msg": "Invalid symbol."}

*   `GET`方法的接口, 参数必须在`query string`中发送.
*   `POST`, `PUT`, 和 `DELETE` 方法的接口, 参数可以在 `query string`中发送，也可以在 `request body`中发送(content type `application/x-www-form-urlencoded`)。允许混合这两种方式发送参数。但如果同一个参数名在query string和request body中都有，query string中的会被优先采用。
*   对参数的顺序不做要求。

IP 访问限制[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade#ip-%E8%AE%BF%E9%97%AE%E9%99%90%E5%88%B6 "IP 访问限制的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   每个请求将包含一个`X-MBX-USED-WEIGHT-(intervalNum)(intervalLetter)`的头，其中包含当前IP所有请求的已使用权重。
*   每个路由都有一个“权重”，该权重确定每个接口计数的请求数。较重的接口和对多个交易对进行操作的接口将具有较重的“权重”。
*   收到429时，您有责任作为API退回而不向其发送更多的请求。
*   **如果屡次违反速率限制和/或在收到429后未能退回，将导致API的IP被禁（http状态418）。**
*   频繁违反限制，封禁时间会逐渐延长 ，**对于重复违反者，将会被封从2分钟到3天**。
*   **访问限制是基于IP的，而不是API Key**

接口鉴权类型[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E9%89%B4%E6%9D%83%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B "接口鉴权类型的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   每个接口都有自己的鉴权类型，鉴权类型决定了访问时应当进行何种鉴权。
*   如果需要 API-keys，应当在HTTP头中以 `X-MBX-APIKEY`字段传递。
*   API-keys 与 secret-keys **是大小写敏感的**。
*   API-keys可以被配置为只拥有访问一些接口的权限。 例如, 一个 API-key 仅可用于发送交易指令, 而另一个 API-key 则可访问除交易指令外的所有路径。
*   默认 API-keys 可访问所有鉴权路径.

| 鉴权类型 | 描述  |
| --- | --- |
| TRADE | 需要有效的 API-Key 和签名 |
| USER\_DATA | 需要有效的 API-Key 和签名 |

备注说明[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade#%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E "备注说明的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

#### Email地址[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade#email%E5%9C%B0%E5%9D%80 "Email地址的直接链接")

*   Email地址作为请求参数，需要转译(encode)。比如 [alice@test.com](mailto:alice@test.com)
     转换成 alice%40test.com
*   Email地址作为请求参数，应为小写。

*   [Rest 基本信息](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade#rest-%E5%9F%BA%E6%9C%AC%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF)
    
*   [IP 访问限制](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade#ip-%E8%AE%BF%E9%97%AE%E9%99%90%E5%88%B6)
    
*   [接口鉴权类型](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E9%89%B4%E6%9D%83%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B)
    
*   [备注说明](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade#%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E)
    *   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)

# Get User’s Customize Id | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Get-User-Customize-Id#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

查询用户定制 Id （USER DATA）
=====================

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Get-User-Customize-Id#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/apiReferral/userCustomization`

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Get-User-Customize-Id#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必须 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| apiAgentCode | STRING | YES | brokerId |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   customerId 必须唯一

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Get-User-Customize-Id#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {	"customerId": "abc123"}

*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Get-User-Customize-Id#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)

# Query Rebate Recent Record (For Client) | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Query-Rebate-Recent-Record-For-Client#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

获取反佣详情历史记录 (仅支持交易者使用)
=====================

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Query-Rebate-Recent-Record-For-Client#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/apiReferral/kickback/recentRecord`

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Query-Rebate-Recent-Record-For-Client#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必须 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| startTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| endTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| limit | INT | NO  | 默认 500，最大 1000 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   只返回过去最近7天数据

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Query-Rebate-Recent-Record-For-Client#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Query-Rebate-Recent-Record-For-Client#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)

# Query Rebate Recent Record (For Partner) | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Query-Rebate-Recent-Record-For-Partner#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

获取反佣详情历史记录 （USER DATA）（仅支持brokerId拥有者）
======================================

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Query-Rebate-Recent-Record-For-Partner#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/apiReferral/rebate/recentRecord`

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Query-Rebate-Recent-Record-For-Partner#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必须 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| customerId | STRING | NO  |     |
| startTime | LONG | YES |     |
| endTime | LONG | YES |     |
| limit | INT | NO  | 最大 500 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   startTime 与 endTime 必须同时传或同时不传
*   若都不传，则返回最近7天
*   若都传，期间必须在7天内

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Query-Rebate-Recent-Record-For-Partner#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    [   {		"customerId": "", // 仅当配置后可见		"email": "om***@***.com",		"income": "0.00240635",		"asset": "USDC",		"symbol": "BNBUSDC",		"time": 1764000370000,		"orderId": 54321678,		"tradeId": 12349876,		"distributeTime": 1764004848000, // 仅在返佣发放后可见		"commissionAsset": "BNB",		"commission": "0.00000284", // 应用比例后的手续费		"convertPrice": "847.30952410"	},	{		"customerId": "abd433",		"email": "abcd*****@gmail.com",		"income": "0.02230096",		"asset":"USDT",		"symbol": "BTCUSDT",		"time":1581580800000,		"orderId": 12345678,		"tradeId": 87654321,		"distributeTime": 1764004848000,		"commissionAsset": "USDT",		"commission": "0.02230000",		"convertPrice": "1.00004321"   }]

*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Query-Rebate-Recent-Record-For-Partner#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)
    
*   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Query-Rebate-Recent-Record-For-Partner#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)
    
*   [响应示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Query-Rebate-Recent-Record-For-Partner#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)

# RFI Record Submission | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Record-Submission#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Kyc RFI Record Submit API
=========================

API Description[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Record-Submission#api-description "API Description的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Kyc RFI Record Submit API

RFI Upload API is in async mode.  
Upon completion, the system will notify the process result via notify webhook with eventType = USER-RFI-SUBMIT-RESULT  
User can also use POST `/bapi/ekyc/v2/public/ekyc/customer/query-submit-rfi-result` to query the RFI status/result.

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Record-Submission#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/bapi/ekyc/v2/public/ekyc/customer/submit-rfi-record`

Request Header[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Record-Submission#request-header "Request Header的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| X-SHA2-Signature | STRING | YES | Request Signature |

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Record-Submission#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bizEntityKey | STRING | YES | business entity key, each access entity has its own bizEntityKey |
| entityCustomerId | STRING | YES | customer id, that is, the user id of the access entity site. |
| kycType | STRING | YES | kyc type，USER |
| recordId | STRING | YES | Rfi Record Id, got from “RFI Records Query API” respons |
| fileDataList | List<KycFileGroupInfoVo> | YES | File data info list, KycFileGroupInfoVo |

### KycFileGroupInfoVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Record-Submission#kycfilegroupinfovo "KycFileGroupInfoVo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| type | STRING | Rfi Record required file type, got from “RFI Records Query API” response |
| files | List<KycFileItemVo> | File url info list. Supported file extensions:jpg, jpeg, png, pdf, mp4, mov;File Size limit: <= 10M |

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| fileUrl | STRING | file download url |

| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | STRING | YES |     |
| data | OuterKycRFISubmitResponse | NO  |     |

OuterKycRFISubmitResponse

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |

# RFI Records Query | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Kyc RFI Records Query API
=========================

API Description[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi#api-description "API Description的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Kyc RFI Record Submit API

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/bapi/ekyc/v2/public/ekyc/customer/page-query-rfi-records`

Request Header[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi#request-header "Request Header的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| X-SHA2-Signature | STRING | YES | Request Signature |

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bizEntityKey | STRING | YES | business entity key, each access entity has its own bizEntityKey |
| entityCustomerId | STRING | NO  | customer id, that is, the user id of the access entity site. |
| kycType | STRING | NO  | kyc type，USER |
| recordId | STRING | NO  | Rfi Record Id |
| status | STRING | NO  | Rfi record status:  <br>PROCESS(under process)  <br>UPLOADING(uploading files)  <br>REVIEW(under review)  <br>PASS(file review pass)  <br>REFUSED(file refused)  <br>EXPIRED(file expired)  <br>CLOSE(close file flow) |
| startTime | STRING | NO  | min create time, yyyy-MM-dd |
| endTime | STRING | NO  | max create time, yyyy-MM-dd |
| page | INT | YES | page number, start from 1 |
| rows | INT | YES | rows |

Response Fields[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi#response-fields "Response Fields的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | STRING | YES |     |
| data | SearchResult | NO  |     |

### SearchResult[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi#searchresult "SearchResult的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| total | LONG | total records count |
| rows | List<SimpleKycRfiRecordVo> |     |

### SimpleKycRfiRecordVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi#simplekycrfirecordvo "SimpleKycRfiRecordVo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| recordId | STRING | Rfi record id |
| bizEntityKey | STRING | business entity key |
| entityCustomerId | STRING | Customer id |
| kycType | STRING | KYC type |
| status | STRING | Rfi record status:PROCESS,UPLOADING,REVIEW,PASS,REFUSED,EXPIRED,CLOSE |
| fileTypes | List<STRING> | Rfi record required file types |
| expireTime | DATE | Expired time |
| recordType | STRING | Rfi record type:IDENTITY,WCK |
| auditor | STRING | auditor |
| auditTime | DATE | Audit time |
| dbCreateTime | DATE | Rfi record create time |

Request Body Example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi#request-body-example "Request Body Example的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "bizEntityKey": "BROKERKEY",    "entityCustomerId": "45712345678999212345",    "kycType": "USER"}

# 概览 | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/Introduction#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Rest 基本信息[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/Introduction#rest-%E5%9F%BA%E6%9C%AC%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF "Rest 基本信息的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   現貨接口的baseurl: **[https://api.binance.com](https://api.binance.com/)
    **
*   合約接口的baseurl: **[https://fapi.binance.com](https://fapi.binance.com/)
    **
*   所有接口的响应都是JSON格式
*   响应中如有数组，数组元素以时间升序排列，越早的数据越提前。
*   所有时间、时间戳均为UNIX时间，单位为毫秒
*   HTTP `4XX` 错误码用于指示错误的请求内容、行为、格式。
*   HTTP `403` 错误码表示违反WAF限制(Web应用程序防火墙)。
*   HTTP `429` 错误码表示警告访问频次超限，即将被封IP
*   HTTP `418` 表示收到429后继续访问，于是被封了。
*   HTTP `5XX` 错误码用于指示Binance服务侧的问题。
*   HTTP `504` 表示API服务端已经向业务核心提交了请求但未能获取响应，特别需要注意的是`504`代码不代表请求失败，而是未知。很可能已经得到了执行，也有可能执行失败，需要做进一步确认。
*   每个接口都有可能抛出异常，异常响应格式如下：

    {  "code": -1121,  "msg": "Invalid symbol."}

*   `GET`方法的接口, 参数必须在`query string`中发送.
*   `POST`, `PUT`, 和 `DELETE` 方法的接口, 参数可以在 `query string`中发送，也可以在 `request body`中发送(content type `application/x-www-form-urlencoded`)。允许混合这两种方式发送参数。但如果同一个参数名在query string和request body中都有，query string中的会被优先采用。
*   对参数的顺序不做要求。

IP 访问限制[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/Introduction#ip-%E8%AE%BF%E9%97%AE%E9%99%90%E5%88%B6 "IP 访问限制的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   每个请求将包含一个`X-MBX-USED-WEIGHT-(intervalNum)(intervalLetter)`的头，其中包含当前IP所有请求的已使用权重。
*   每个路由都有一个“权重”，该权重确定每个接口计数的请求数。较重的接口和对多个交易对进行操作的接口将具有较重的“权重”。
*   收到429时，您有责任作为API退回而不向其发送更多的请求。
*   **如果屡次违反速率限制和/或在收到429后未能退回，将导致API的IP被禁（http状态418）。**
*   频繁违反限制，封禁时间会逐渐延长 ，**对于重复违反者，将会被封从2分钟到3天**。
*   **访问限制是基于IP的，而不是API Key**

接口鉴权类型[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/Introduction#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E9%89%B4%E6%9D%83%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B "接口鉴权类型的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   每个接口都有自己的鉴权类型，鉴权类型决定了访问时应当进行何种鉴权。
*   如果需要 API-keys，应当在HTTP头中以 `X-MBX-APIKEY`字段传递。
*   API-keys 与 secret-keys **是大小写敏感的**。
*   API-keys可以被配置为只拥有访问一些接口的权限。 例如, 一个 API-key 仅可用于发送交易指令, 而另一个 API-key 则可访问除交易指令外的所有路径。
*   默认 API-keys 可访问所有鉴权路径.

| 鉴权类型 | 描述  |
| --- | --- |
| TRADE | 需要有效的 API-Key 和签名 |
| USER\_DATA | 需要有效的 API-Key 和签名 |

备注说明[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/Introduction#%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E "备注说明的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/Introduction#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

#### Email地址[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/Introduction#email%E5%9C%B0%E5%9D%80 "Email地址的直接链接")

*   Email地址作为请求参数，需要转译(encode)。比如 [alice@test.com](mailto:alice@test.com)
     转换成 alice%40test.com
*   Email地址作为请求参数，应为小写。

*   [Rest 基本信息](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/Introduction#rest-%E5%9F%BA%E6%9C%AC%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF)
    
*   [IP 访问限制](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/Introduction#ip-%E8%AE%BF%E9%97%AE%E9%99%90%E5%88%B6)
    
*   [接口鉴权类型](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/Introduction#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E9%89%B4%E6%9D%83%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B)
    
*   [备注说明](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/Introduction#%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E)
    *   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/Introduction#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)
