# Get User’s Customize Id | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-User-Customize-Id#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

* * *

id: Get-User’s-Customize-Id sidebar\_label: 查询用户定制 Id（USER DATA）[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-User-Customize-Id#id-get-users-customize-idsidebar_label-%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7%E5%AE%9A%E5%88%B6-iduser-data "id: Get-User’s-Customize-Id
sidebar_label: 查询用户定制 Id（USER DATA）的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

查询用户定制 Id（USER DATA）
====================

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-User-Customize-Id#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/fapi/v1/apiReferral/userCustomization`

权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-User-Customize-Id#%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "权重的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**100**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-User-Customize-Id#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必须 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| brokerId | STRING | YES |     |
| revWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   customerId 必须唯一
*   如用户启用统一帐户，请使用对应的 `/papi` 接口

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-User-Customize-Id#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "brokerId": "ABCD1234",    "customerId": "abc123"}

*   [id: Get-User’s-Customize-Id sidebar\_label: 查询用户定制 Id（USER DATA）](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-User-Customize-Id#id-get-users-customize-idsidebar_label-%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7%E5%AE%9A%E5%88%B6-iduser-data)
    
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-User-Customize-Id#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)
    
*   [权重](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-User-Customize-Id#%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D)
    
*   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-User-Customize-Id#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)
    
*   [响应示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/futures/Get-User-Customize-Id#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)

# RFI Submission Status | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Submission-Status#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Query Kyc RFI Record Submit Result API
======================================

API Description[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Submission-Status#api-description "API Description的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Query Kyc RFI Record Submit Result API

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Submission-Status#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/bapi/ekyc/v2/public/ekyc/customer/query-submit-rfi-result`

Request Header[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Submission-Status#request-header "Request Header的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| X-SHA2-Signature | STRING | YES | Request Signature |

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Submission-Status#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bizEntityKey | STRING | YES | business entity key, each access entity has its own bizEntityKey |
| entityCustomerId | STRING | YES | customer id, that is, the user id of the access entity site. |
| kycType | STRING | YES | kyc type，USER |
| recordId | STRING | YES | Rfi Record Id |
| requestNo | STRING | YES | Rfi submit record request no, got from " RFI Record Submit API" response |

Response Fields[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Submission-Status#response-fields "Response Fields的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | STRING | YES |     |
| data | QueryRfiSubmitResultResponse | NO  |     |

### QueryRfiSubmitResultResponse[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Submission-Status#queryrfisubmitresultresponse "QueryRfiSubmitResultResponse的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| result | STRING | Rfi record upload result: PROCESS,SUCCESS,FAILED |
| failReason | STRING | fail Reason |

Request Body Example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Submission-Status#request-body-example "Request Body Example的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "bizEntityKey": "BROKERKEY",    "entityCustomerId": "45712345678999212345",    "kycType": "USER",    "recordId": "12345",    "requestNo": "6286de2c976243a38ce4da8bebc403cf"}

Response Example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Submission-Status#response-example "Response Example的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {    "code": "000000",    "message": null,    "messageDetail": null,    "data": {        "result": "SUCCESS",        "failReason": null    },    "success": true}

*   [API Description](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Submission-Status#api-description)
    
*   [HTTP Request](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Submission-Status#http-request)
    
*   [Request Header](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Submission-Status#request-header)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Submission-Status#request-parameters)

    *   [QueryRfiSubmitResultResponse](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/request-for-information-rfi/Rfi-Submission-Status#queryrfisubmitresultresponse)

# Create Order (Deprecated) | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

**The API is deprecated, please migrate to [Create Order V2](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create-v2)
 ASAP**

Create order API used for merchant/partner to initiate acquiring order.

EndPoint[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create#endpoint "EndPoint的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    POST /binancepay/openapi/order

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **subMerchantId** | string | N   | maximum length 19 | The sub merchant account id, issued when sub merchant been created at Binance, The parameter subMerchantId is required when configuring show subMerchant info. |
| **merchantTradeNo** | string | Y   | letter or digit, no other symbol allowed, maximum length 32 | The order id, Unique identifier for the request |
| **tradeType** | string | Y   | "WEB", "APP", "WAP", "MINI\_PROGRAM", "PAYMENT\_LINK", "OTHERS" | operate entrance |
| **totalFee** | decimal | Y   | Amount Range: 0.01 - 20000; Max Unit Range: 8 decimal places | order amount |
| **currency** | string | Y   | only "BUSD","USDT","MBOX" can be accepted, fiat NOT supported. | order currency |
| **productType** | string | N   | maximum length 16 | product type |
| **productName** | string | N   | maximum length 256 | product name |
| **productDetail** | string | N   | maximum length 256 | product detail |
| **returnUrl** | string | N   | maximum length 256 | The URL to redirect to when the payment is successful |
| **cancelUrl** | string | N   | maximum length 256 | The URL to redirect to when payment is failed |
| **orderExpireTime** | long | N   | maximum order time is 1 hour | OrderExpireTime is the time at which order will expire. Please input orderExpireTime in Epoch timestamp in milliseconds. If not specified, order time will be 1 hour |
| **supportPayCurrency** | string | N   | maximum length 1024. Input to be separated by commas, e.g. "BUSD,BNB" | SupportPayCurrency determines the currencies that a customer is allowed to use to pay for the order. If not specified, all Binance Pay supported currencies will be allowed. |
| **universalUrlAttach** | string | N   | maximum length 120. e.g. "countryCode=1&phone=1234567" | the attachment parameter for the response field "universalUrl" |
| **passThroughInfo** | string | N   | maximum length 512 | pass through info, returned as-is in query order API and payment webhook notification |
| **webhookUrl** | string | N   | maximum length 256. Can only start with http or https. | The URL for order notification. If the webhookUrl is passed in the parameter, the webhook url configured on the merchant platform will not take effect, and the currently passed url will be called back first. |

### Sample Request Body[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create#sample-request-body "Sample Request Body的直接链接")

    {  "subMerchantId": "98765987",  "merchantTradeNo": "9825382937292",  "totalFee": 25.17,  "productDetail": "Greentea ice cream cone",  "currency": "USDT",  "returnUrl": "",  "cancelUrl": "",  "tradeType": "APP",  "productType": "Food",  "productName": "Ice Cream"}

Response Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create#response-parameters "Response Parameters的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **status** | string | Y   | "SUCCESS" or "FAIL" | status of the API request |
| **code** | string | Y   | \-  | request result code, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create#result-code) |
| **data** | OrderResult | N   | \-  | response body, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create#order-result) |
| **errorMessage** | string | N   | maximum length 256 |     |

Child Attribute[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create#child-attribute "Child Attribute的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### OrderResult[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create#orderresult "OrderResult的直接链接")

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **prepayId** | string | Y   | maximum length 19 | unique id generated by binance |
| **tradeType** | string | Y   | "WEB", "APP", "WAP", "MINI\_PROGRAM", "PAYMENT\_LINK", "OTHERS" | operate entrance |
| **expireTime** | long | Y   | \-  | expire time in milli seconds |
| **qrcodeLink** | string | Y   | maximum length 256 | qr code img link |
| **qrContent** | string | Y   | maximum length 256 | qr content info |
| **checkoutUrl** | string | Y   | maximum length 256 | binance hosted checkout page url |
| **deeplink** | string | Y   | maximum length 256 | deeplink to open binance app to finish payment |
| **universalUrl** | string | Y   | maximum length 512 | universal url to finish the payment |

### Sample Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create#sample-response "Sample Response的直接链接")

    {  "status": "SUCCESS",  "code": "000000",  "data": {    "prepayId": "29383937493038367292",    "tradeType": "APP",    "expireTime": 121123232223,    "qrcodeLink": "https://qrservice.dev.com/en/qr/dplkb005181944f84b84aba2430e1177012b.jpg",    "qrContent": "https://qrservice.dev.com/en/qr/dplk12121112b",    "checkoutUrl": "https://pay.binance.com/checkout/dplk12121112b",    "deeplink": "bnc://app.binance.com/payment/secpay/xxxxxx",    "universalUrl": "https://app.binance.com/payment/secpay?_dp=xxx=&linkToken=xxx"  },  "errorMessage": ""}

Result Code[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create#result-code "Result Code的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Name** | **Code** | **Reason** | **Solution** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| UNKNOWN\_ERROR | 400000 | An unknown error occurred while processing the request. | Try again later |
| INVALID\_REQUEST | 400001 | Parameter format is wrong or parameter transferring doesn't follow the rules. | Please check whether the parameters are correct. |
| INVALID\_SIGNATURE | 400002 | Incorrect signature result | Check whether the signature parameter and method comply with signature algorithm requirements. |
| INVALID\_TIMESTAMP | 400003 | Timestamp for this request is outside of the time window. | Sync server clock |
| INVALID\_API\_KEY\_OR\_IP | 400004 | API identity key not found or invalid. | Check API identity key |
| BAD\_API\_KEY\_FMT | 400005 | API identity key format invalid. | Check API identity key. |
| BAD\_HTTP\_METHOD | 400006 | Request method not supported. | Check Request method. |
| MEDIA\_TYPE\_NOT\_SUPPORTED | 400007 | Media type not supported. | Check Request Media type. |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_BODY | 400008 | Request body is not a valid json object. | Check Request body |
| MANDATORY\_PARAM\_EMPTY\_OR\_MALFORMED | 400100 | A parameter was missing/empty/null, or malformed. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_LENGTH | 400101 | A parameter was not valid, was empty/null, or too long/short, or wrong format. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_VALUE | 400102 | A parameter was not valid, the value is out of range. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_ILLEGAL\_CHAR | 400103 | A parameter was not valid, contains illegal characters |     |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_TOO\_LARGE | 400104 | Invalid request, content length too large |     |
| INVALID\_MERCHANT\_TRADE\_NO | 400201 | merchantTradeNo is invalid or duplicated |     |
| INVALID\_ACCOUNT\_STATUS | 400203 | Not support for this account, please check account status. |     |
| SUB\_MERCHANT\_INVALID | 400206 | The sub merchant does not exist or is in an unavailable state. |     |

*   [EndPoint](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create#endpoint)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create#request-parameters)
    *   [Sample Request Body](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create#sample-request-body)
        
*   [Response Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create#response-parameters)
    
*   [Child Attribute](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create#child-attribute)
    *   [OrderResult](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create#orderresult)
        
    *   [Sample Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create#sample-response)
        
*   [Result Code](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create#result-code)

# Create Order | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create-v2#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Create order API Version 2 used for merchant/partner to initiate acquiring order.

EndPoint[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create-v2#endpoint "EndPoint的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    POST /binancepay/openapi/v2/order

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create-v2#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes  <br>(1st Level)** | **Attributes  <br>(2nd Level)** | **Attributes  <br>(3rd Level)** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **merchant** |     |     | object | N   |     |
|     | **subMerchantId** |     | string(19\] | N   | The sub merchant account id, issued when sub merchant been created at Binance. |
| **env** |     |     | object | Y   |     |
|     | **terminalType** |     | string | Y   | Terminal type of which the merchant service applies to. Valid values are:  <br>**APP**:  <br>The client-side terminal type is a mobile application.  <br>  <br>**WEB**:  <br>The client-side terminal type is a website that is opened via a PC browser.  <br>  <br>**WAP**:  <br>The client-side terminal type is an HTML page that is opened via a mobile browser.  <br>  <br>**MINI\_PROGRAM**:  <br>The terminal type of the merchant side is a mini program on the mobile phone.  <br>  <br>**OTHERS**:  <br>other undefined type |
|     | **osType** |     | string | N   | OS type. Valid values are:  <br>**IOS**: indicates the operation system is Apple's iOS.  <br>**ANDROID**: indicates the operation system is Google's Android. |
|     | **orderClientIp** |     | string | N   | IP of the client device when submit the order |
|     | **cookieId** |     | string | N   | The cookie ID of the buyer |
| **merchantTradeNo** |     |     | string(32\] | Y   | The order id, Unique identifier for the request letter or digit, no other symbol allowed, maximum length 32 |
| **orderAmount** |     |     | decimal(.8) | N   | When currency is not null. Minimum amount: 0.00000001 |
| **currency** |     |     | string | N   | Currency and fiatCurrency cannot be both null. order currency in upper case. only "BUSD","USDT","MBOX" can be accepted, fiat NOT supported. |
| **fiatAmount** |     |     | decimal(.8) | N   | Minimum amount: 0.00000001 ,We will convert this fiat amount to order amount based on market currency rate. |
| **fiatCurrency** |     |     | string | N   | Currency and fiatCurrency cannot be both null. fiat currency in upper case. ex: "HKD". Order currency will be set to "USDT" if this filed has value. Click [here](https://www.binance.com/bapi/asset/v1/public/asset-service/product/currency)<br> to view supported fiat currencies |
| **goods** |     |     | object | Y   |     |
|     | **goodsType** |     | string | Y   | the type of the goods for the order:  <br>**01**: Tangible Goods  <br>**02**: Virtual Goods |
|     | **goodsCategory** |     | string | Y   | **0000**: Electronics & Computers  <br>**1000**: Books, Music & Movies  <br>**2000**: Home, Garden & Tools  <br>**3000**: Clothes, Shoes & Bags  <br>**4000**: Toys, Kids & Baby  <br>**5000**: Automotive & Accessories  <br>**6000**: Game & Recharge  <br>**7000**: Entertainament & Collection  <br>**8000**: Jewelry  <br>**9000**: Domestic service  <br>**A000**: Beauty care  <br>**B000**: Pharmacy  <br>**C000**: Sports & Outdoors  <br>**D000**: Food, Grocery & Health products  <br>**E000**: Pet supplies  <br>**F000**: Industry & Science  <br>**Z000**: Others |
|     | **referenceGoodsId** |     | string | Y   | The unique ID to identify the goods. |
|     | **goodsName** |     | string(256\] | Y   | Goods name.  <br>Special character is prohibited Example: \\ " or emoji |
|     | **goodsDetail** |     | string(256\] | N   |     |
|     | **goodsUnitAmount** |     | object | N   | Price of goods |
|     |     | **currency** | string | Y   |     |
|     |     | **amount** | decimal | Y   |     |
|     | **goodsQuantity** |     | string | N   | Quantity of goods |
| **shipping** |     |     | object | N   |     |
|     | **shippingName** |     | object | N   | The recipient name |
|     |     | **firstName** | string | Y   |     |
|     |     | **middleName** | string | N   |     |
|     |     | **lastName** | string | Y   |     |
|     | **shippingAddress** |     | object | N   | Shipping address |
|     |     | **region** | string | Y   | The 2-letter country/region code. For more information, see ISO 3166 Country Codes standard. |
|     |     | **state** | string | N   | The state, country, or province name. |
|     |     | **city** | string | N   | The city, district, suburb, town, or village name. |
|     |     | **address** | string | N   | Address, for example, the stress address/PO box/company name |
|     |     | **zipCode** | string | N   | ZIP or postal code |
|     |     | **shippingAddressType** | string | N   | shipping to  <br>**01**: office  <br>**02**: home  <br>**03**: public box  <br>**04**: others |
|     | **shippingPhoneNo** |     | string | N   | The phone number of a recipient (including extension) |
| **buyer** |     |     | object | N   |     |
|     | **referenceBuyerId** |     | string | N   | Restrict specific Binance Pay ID to make payment. Need whitelist to use this feature |
|     | **buyerName** |     | object | N   | Name of buyer full name from merchants |
|     |     | **firstName** | string | Y   |     |
|     |     | **middleName** | string | N   |     |
|     |     | **lastName** | string | Y   |     |
|     | **buyerPhoneCountryCode** |     | string | N   |     |
|     | **buyerPhoneNo** |     | string | N   | Mobile phone number of the buyer from merchants |
|     | **buyerEmail** |     | string | N   | Email of the buyer from merchants |
|     | **buyerRegistrationTime** |     | long | N   | Buyer registration time on merchant side, epoch time milliseconds |
|     | **buyerBrowserLanguage** |     | string | N   | The language of the merchant's platform shows the buyer |
| **returnUrl** |     |     | string(256\] | N   | The URL to redirect to when the payment is successful.  <br>Url must begin with HTTP. Only one parameter is allowed per URL, for e.g.  <br>[https://example.com/search?q=apples](https://example.com/search?q=apples)<br> (✓)  <br>[https://example.com/search?q=apples&p=orange](https://example.com/search?q=apples&p=orange)<br> (✖) |
| **cancelUrl** |     |     | string(256\] | N   | The URL to redirect to when payment is failed.  <br>Url must begin with HTTP. Only one parameter is allowed per URL, for e.g.  <br>[https://example.com/search?q=apples](https://example.com/search?q=apples)<br> (✓)  <br>[https://example.com/search?q=apples&p=orange](https://example.com/search?q=apples&p=orange)<br> (✖) |
| **orderExpireTime** |     |     | long | N   | orderExpireTime determines how long an order is valid for. If not specified, orderExpireTime will be 1 hour;  <br>maximum orderExpireTime is 15 days. Please input in milliseconds. |
| **supportPayCurrency** |     |     | string(1024\] | N   | SupportPayCurrency determines the currencies that a customer is allowed to use to pay for the order. If not specified, all Binance Pay supported currencies will be allowed.  <br>Input to be separated by commas, e.g. "BUSD,BNB" |
| **appId** |     |     | string | N   | The unique ID that is assigned by Binance to identify the mini program app. Note: This field is required when terminalType is **MINI\_PROGRAM**. |
| **universalUrlAttach** |     |     | string(120) | N   | the attachment parameter for the response field "universalUrl", e.g. "countryCode=1&phone=1234567" |
| **passThroughInfo** |     |     | string(512\] | N   | pass through info, returned as-is in query order API and payment webhook notification |
| **webhookUrl** |     |     | string(256\] | N   | The URL for order notification, can only start with http or https.  <br>If the webhookUrl is passed in the parameter, the webhook url configured on the merchant platform will not take effect, and the currently passed url will be called back first. |
| **directDebitContract** |     |     | object | N   | If not empty, it means to create an order and direct debit contract. Use this function order currency can only accept "BUSD","USDT".  <br>  <br>**This function is only available for whitelisted merchants.** |
|     | **merchantContractCode** |     | string(32\] | Y   | The unique ID assigned by the merchant to identify a direct debit contract request. letter or digit, no other symbol allowed. |
|     | **serviceName** |     | string(32\] | Y   | Service name |
|     | **scenarioCode** |     | string | Y   | Scenario code, please [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-create-contract#scenario-code) |
|     | **singleUpperLimit** |     | decimal(.8) | Y   | Upper limit related to scenarioCode, for more please [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-create-contract#scenario-code) |
|     | **periodic** |     | boolean | Y   | This contract support periodic debit or not |
|     | **cycleDebitFixed** |     | boolean | N   | Mandatory if periodic = true. true = fixed amount, false = variable amount |
|     | **cycleType** |     | string | N   | Mandatory if periodic = true. Values: MONTH or DAY |
|     | **cycleValue** |     | integer | N   | Mandatory if periodic = true. Values: if cycleType=MONTH: 1~24, cycleType=DAY: interval days >7  <br>  <br>Combining with another parameter cycleType to determine the deduction period, for example, cycleType is DAY, cycleValue=30, then the deduction period is 30 days; cycleType is MONTH, cycleValue=3, then the deduction period is 3 natural months. |
|     | **firstDeductTime** |     | long | N   | Mandatory if periodic = true. first deduct time, must be a future time in milli seconds. if cycleType=MONTH, the firstDeductTime is not allowed to pass the date after the 28th UTC (can pass the 28th) |
|     | **merchantAccountNo** |     | string(64\] | N   | The userID/user account in merchant side e.g. [xxx@gmail.com](mailto:xxx@gmail.com) |
|     | **contractEndTime** |     | long | N   | If not specified, contractEndTime will be the time after 1095 days (about 3 years). maximum is 1095 days in milliseconds. |
| **orderTags** |     |     | object | N   | Object to tag order for specific features such as profit sharing. |
|     | **ifProfitSharing** |     | boolean | N   | if specified and true, order will be tagged as profit sharing. |

### Sample Request Body[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create-v2#sample-request-body "Sample Request Body的直接链接")

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Create Order in Crypto<br><br>    {  "env": {    "terminalType": "APP"  },  "orderTags": {    "ifProfitSharing": true  },  "merchantTradeNo": "9825382937292",  "orderAmount": 25.17,  "currency": "USDT",  "goods": {    "goodsType": "01",    "goodsCategory": "D000",    "referenceGoodsId": "7876763A3B",    "goodsName": "Ice Cream",    "goodsDetail": "Greentea ice cream cone"  }} | Create Order in Fiat<br><br>    {  "env": {    "terminalType": "APP"  },  "orderTags": {    "ifProfitSharing": true  },  "merchantTradeNo": "9825382937292",  "fiatAmount": 100,  "fiatCurrency": "HKD",  "goods": {    "goodsType": "01",    "goodsCategory": "D000",    "referenceGoodsId": "7876763A3B",    "goodsName": "Ice Cream",    "goodsDetail": "Greentea ice cream cone"  }} |

### Response Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create-v2#response-parameters "Response Parameters的直接链接")

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **status** | string | Y   | "SUCCESS" or "FAIL" | status of the API request |
| **code** | string | Y   | \-  | request result code, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create-v2#result-code) |
| **data** | OrderResult | N   | \-  | response body, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create-v2#order-result) |
| **errorMessage** | string(256\] | N   | \-  |     |

Child Attribute[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create-v2#child-attribute "Child Attribute的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### OrderResult[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create-v2#orderresult "OrderResult的直接链接")

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **prepayId** | string(19\] | Y   | \-  | unique id generated by binance |
| **terminalType** | string(20\] | Y   |     | same as terminalType in request data |
| **expireTime** | long | Y   | \-  | expire time in milli seconds |
| **qrcodeLink** | string(256\] | Y   | \-  | qr code img link |
| **qrContent** | string(256\] | Y   | \-  | qr content info |
| **checkoutUrl** | string(256\] | Y   | \-  | binance hosted checkout page url |
| **deeplink** | string(256\] | Y   | \-  | deeplink to open binance app to finish payment |
| **universalUrl** | string | Y   | maximum length 512 | universal url to finish the payment |
| **currency** | string | Y   |     | order currency |
| **totalFee** | decimal(.8) | Y   |     | order total amount |
| **fiatCurrency** | string | N   |     | order fiat currency ,only return when create in fiat |
| **fiatAmount** | decimal(.8) | N   |     | order fiat amount ,only return when create in fiat |

### Sample Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create-v2#sample-response "Sample Response的直接链接")

|     |     |
| --- | --- |
| Create Order in Crypto<br><br>    {  "status": "SUCCESS",  "code": "000000",  "data": {    "prepayId": "29383937493038367292",    "terminalType": "APP",    "expireTime": 121123232223,    "qrcodeLink": "https://qrservice.dev.com/en/qr/dplkb005181944f84b84aba2430e1177012b.jpg",    "qrContent": "https://qrservice.dev.com/en/qr/dplk12121112b",    "checkoutUrl": "https://pay.binance.com/checkout/dplk12121112b",    "deeplink": "bnc://app.binance.com/payment/secpay/xxxxxx",    "universalUrl": "https://app.binance.com/payment/secpay?_dp=xxx=&linkToken=xxx",    "totalFee": "25.17",    "currency": "USDT"  },  "errorMessage": ""} | Create Order in Fiat<br><br>    {  "status": "SUCCESS",  "code": "000000",  "data": {    "currency": "USDT",    "totalFee": "12.77377391",    "fiatCurrency": "HKD",    "fiatAmount": "100",    "prepayId": "230898625140047872",    "terminalType": "WEB",    "expireTime": 1685360951988,    "qrcodeLink": "https://public.bnbstatic.com/static/payment/20230529/26b9d4ed-0a1d-47ab-802f-d23beecad1ff.jpg",    "qrContent": "https://app.binance.com/qr/dplk677510ff75084d428657718ca71c23e6",    "checkoutUrl": "https://pay.binance.com/en/checkout/362d8131e3c349a08c77455001f2f32b",    "deeplink": "bnc://app.binance.com/payment/secpay?tempToken=1NgAZN9X3VRJWbQkh4viNWWpGYReMuNs",    "universalUrl": "https://app.binance.com/payment/secpay?_dp=xxx=&linkToken=xxx"  }} |

Result Code[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-create-v2#result-code "Result Code的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Name** | **Code** | **Reason** | **Solution** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| UNKNOWN\_ERROR | 400000 | An unknown error occurred while processing the request. | Try again later |
| INVALID\_REQUEST | 400001 | Parameter format is wrong or parameter transferring doesn't follow the rules. | Please check whether the parameters are correct. |
| INVALID\_SIGNATURE | 400002 | Incorrect signature result | Check whether the signature parameter and method comply with signature algorithm requirements. |
| INVALID\_TIMESTAMP | 400003 | Timestamp for this request is outside of the time window. | Sync server clock |
| INVALID\_API\_KEY\_OR\_IP | 400004 | API identity key not found or invalid. | Check API identity key |
| BAD\_API\_KEY\_FMT | 400005 | API identity key format invalid. | Check API identity key. |
| BAD\_HTTP\_METHOD | 400006 | Request method not supported. | Check Request method. |
| MEDIA\_TYPE\_NOT\_SUPPORTED | 400007 | Media type not supported. | Check Request Media type. |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_BODY | 400008 | Request body is not a valid json object. | Check Request body |
| MANDATORY\_PARAM\_EMPTY\_OR\_MALFORMED | 400100 | A parameter was missing/empty/null, or malformed. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_LENGTH | 400101 | A parameter was not valid, was empty/null, or too long/short, or wrong format. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_VALUE | 400102 | A parameter was not valid, the value is out of range. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_ILLEGAL\_CHAR | 400103 | A parameter was not valid, contains illegal characters |     |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_TOO\_LARGE | 400104 | Invalid request, content length too large |     |
| INVALID\_MERCHANT\_TRADE\_NO | 400201 | merchantTradeNo is invalid or duplicated |     |
| INVALID\_ACCOUNT\_STATUS | 400203 | Not support for this account, please check account status. |     |
| SUB\_MERCHANT\_INVALID | 400206 | The sub merchant does not exist or is in an unavailable state. |     |

# Query KYC Status by entityCustomerId | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status-By-EntityCustomerId#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Query KYC status By EntityCustomerId
====================================

API Description[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status-By-EntityCustomerId#api-description "API Description的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Query KYC Detail INFO Query API

HTTP Request[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status-By-EntityCustomerId#http-request "HTTP Request的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/bapi/ekyc/v2/public/ekyc/customer/query-kyc-info`

Request Header[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status-By-EntityCustomerId#request-header "Request Header的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| X-SHA2-Signature | STRING | YES | Request Signature |

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status-By-EntityCustomerId#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bizEntityKey | STRING | YES | business entity key, each access entity has its own bizEntityKey |
| entityCustomerId | STRING | YES | customer id，that is, the user id of the access entity site |
| kycType | STRING | YES | kyc type，USER |

Response Fields[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status-By-EntityCustomerId#response-fields "Response Fields的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | STRING | YES | error code，000000000 is success |
| data | KycInfoVo | NO  |     |

### KycInfoVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status-By-EntityCustomerId#kycinfovo "KycInfoVo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| statusInfo | KycVerifyStatusInfoVo |     |
| basicInfo | KycBasicInfoVo |     |
| identityInfo | KycIdentityInfoVo |     |
| riskScore | UserRiskScoreVo |     |
| levelInfo | KycLevelInfoVo | ref to check-kyc-status |
| wckInfo | KycWckInfoVo |     |

### KycVerifyStatusInfoVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status-By-EntityCustomerId#kycverifystatusinfovo "KycVerifyStatusInfoVo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| failReason | STRING | fail reason |
| basicStatus | STRING | INITIAL,PROCESS,REVIEW,PASS,REJECT |
| identityStatus | STRING | INITIAL,PROCESS,REVIEW,PASS,REJECT |
| faceStatus | STRING | INITIAL,PROCESS,REVIEW,PASS,REJECT,SKIP |
| wckStatus | STRING | INITIAL,PROCESS,REVIEW,PASS,REJECT |
| kycUserId | STRING | kyc user id in SAAS |

### KycBasicInfoVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status-By-EntityCustomerId#kycbasicinfovo "KycBasicInfoVo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| firstName | STRING | First name |
| middleName | STRING | Middle name |
| lastName | STRING | Last Name |
| dob | STRING | Birthday, yyyy-MM-dd |
| residentialCountry | STRING | Country of residence |
| country | STRING | nationality |

### KycIdentityInfoVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status-By-EntityCustomerId#kycidentityinfovo "KycIdentityInfoVo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| bizNo | STRING | Biz no |
| firstName | STRING | First name |
| middleName | STRING | Middle name |
| lastName | STRING | Last name |
| dob | STRING | birthday yyyy-MM-dd |
| idCountry | STRING | Document issuing country 2-alpha code |
| nationalityCountry | STRING | Nationality country 2-alpha code |
| idType | STRING | IdentityDocumentType. for example: ID\_CARD, PASSPORT, DRIVING\_LICENSE,RESIDENCE\_PERMIT |
| idSubType | STRING | id doc sub type |
| idNumber | STRING | id Number |
| idExpiry | STRING | yyyy-MM-dd |
| personalNumber | STRING |     |
| gender | STRING |     |
| issuingAuthority | STRING |     |
| issuingDate | STRING | yyyy-MM-dd |
| issuingPlace | STRING |     |
| registrationNumber | STRING |     |
| city | STRING |     |
| stateCode | STRING |     |
| postalCode | STRING |     |
| address | STRING |     |
| frontFileUrl | STRING | id front image download url |
| backFileUrl | STRING | id back image download url |
| faceFileUrl | STRING | face image download url |
| faceDetectFileUrl | STRING |     |
| vendorsCode | STRING | Channel code: SUMSUB\_SDK,ONFIDO\_SDK |

### UserRiskScoreVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status-By-EntityCustomerId#userriskscorevo "UserRiskScoreVo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| riskScore | INT | Risk score |
| riskLevel | STRING | Risk level: LOWER,LOW,MEDIUM,HIGH,HIGHER,EXTREME |
| dob | STRING | birthday yyyy-MM-dd |
| pep | INT | Is pep |
| sanctionHit | INT | Is sanction hit |
| nationality | STRING |     |
| residenceCountry | STRING |     |

### KycLevelInfoVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status-By-EntityCustomerId#kyclevelinfovo "KycLevelInfoVo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| currentLevel | KycLevelItemVo | Current level status |
| passedLevel | KycLevelItemVo | Current passing KYC status level info |
| kycPass | Boolean | If the current user pass the kyc |

### KycWckInfoVo[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/kyc-saas/kyc-querying/Query-Kyc-Status-By-EntityCustomerId#kycwckinfovo "KycWckInfoVo的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| bizNo | STRING | Biz no |
| status | STRING | Status: PENDING,AUDIT\_FIRST,AUTO\_REJECT,AUTO\_PASS,AUDIT\_REJECT,AUDIT\_PASS |
| type | STRING | Type: INDIVIDUAL |
| name | STRING | Check name |
| birthDate | STRING | yyyy-MM-dd |
| residenceCountry | STRING |     |
| rejectReason | STRING |     |
| completeTime | DATE |     |

# Get Client Email Customized Id | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Get-Client-Email-Customized-Id#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

查询用户email和定制化 Id （USER DATA）（仅支持brokerId拥有者）
============================================

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Get-Client-Email-Customized-Id#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/apiReferral/customization`

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Get-Client-Email-Customized-Id#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必须 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| customerId | STRING | NO  |     |
| email | STRING | NO  |     |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   customerId 和 email 不能同时发，返回 apiAgent 自定义的 customization 关系

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Get-Client-Email-Customized-Id#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    [   {        "customerId":"abc123",       "email":"test12345@126.com"     },    {       "customerId":"abc345",       "email":"testABCD@gmail.com"    }]

*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Get-Client-Email-Customized-Id#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)
    
*   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Get-Client-Email-Customized-Id#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)
    
*   [响应示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Get-Client-Email-Customized-Id#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)

本页总览

用户为自己所在的api返佣推荐码定制 Id （USER DATA）(仅支持交易者使用)
===========================================

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Customize-Id-For-Client-For-Client#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/apiReferral/userCustomization`

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必须 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| customerId | STRING | YES |     |
| apiAgentCode | STRING | YES | brokerId |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |

# Customize Id For Client(For Partner) | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Customize-Id-For-Client-For-Partner#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

为用户定制 Id （USER DATA）（仅支持brokerId拥有者）
====================================

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Customize-Id-For-Client-For-Partner#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v1/apiReferral/customization`

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance_link/link-and-trade/spot/Customize-Id-For-Client-For-Partner#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必须 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| customerId | STRING | YES |     |
| email | STRING | YES |     |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |

===========================

# Binance Pay API: Release Note V1.0.1 | Binance Open Platform

# Query Order | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-query#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Query order API used for merchant/partner to query order status

EndPoint[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-query#endpoint "EndPoint的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    POST /binancepay/openapi/order/query

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-query#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **merchantTradeNo** | string | N   | maximum length 32,letter or digit, no other symbol allowed, can not be empty if prepayId is empty | The order id, Unique identifier for the request |
| **prepayId** | string | N   | maximum length 19,letter or digit, no other symbol allowed, can not be empty if merchantTradeNo is empty | Binance unique order id |

### Sample Request Body[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-query#sample-request-body "Sample Request Body的直接链接")

Query order result by merchantTradeNo:

    {  "merchantTradeNo": "9825382937292",  "prepayId": null}

Query order result by prepayId:

    {  "merchantTradeNo": null,  "prepayId": "9825382937292"}

Response Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-query#response-parameters "Response Parameters的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **status** | string | Y   | "SUCCESS" or "FAIL" | status of the API request |
| **code** | string | Y   | \-  | request result code, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-query#result-code) |
| **data** | QueryOrderResult | N   | \-  | response body, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-query#order-result) |
| **errorMessage** | string | N   | maximum length 256 |     |

Child Attribute[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-query#child-attribute "Child Attribute的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### QueryOrderResult[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-query#queryorderresult "QueryOrderResult的直接链接")

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **merchantId** | long | Y   | \-  | The merchant account id, issued when merchant been created at Binance. |
| **prepayId** | string | Y   | maximum length 19 | unique id generated by binance |
| **transactionId** | string | N   | maximum length 32 | issued once the payment is successful |
| **merchantTradeNo** | string | Y   | maximum length 32 | merchant trade number |
| **tradeType** | string | Y   | "WEB", "APP", "WAP", "MINI\_PROGRAM", "PAYMENT\_LINK", "OTHERS" | operate entrance |
| **status** | string | Y   | "INITIAL", "PENDING", "PAID", "CANCELED", "ERROR", "REFUNDING", "REFUNDED", "EXPIRED" | order status |
| **currency** | string | Y   | \-  | order currency |
| **totalFee** | decimal | Y   | limitation refer to Create Order API order amount | order amount |
| **productName** | string | N   | maximum length 256 | product name |
| **productDetail** | string | N   | maximum length 256 | product detail |
| **openUserId** | string | N   | maximum length 19 | Consumer unique id |
| **passThroughInfo** | string | N   | maximum length 512 | pass through info, from the create order api |
| **transactTime** | long | N   | \-  | UnixTimestamp in milliseconds when transaction happened |
| **createTime** | long | Y   | \-  | UnixTimestamp in milliseconds when order was created |

### Sample Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-query#sample-response "Sample Response的直接链接")

    {  "status": "SUCCESS",  "code": "000000",  "data": {    "merchantId": 98729382672,    "prepayId": "383729303729303",    "transactionId": "23729202729220282",    "merchantTradeNo": "9825382937292",    "tradeType": "APP",    "status": "PAID",    "currency": "USDT",    "totalFee": 10.88,    "productName": "Ice Cream",    "productDetail": "Greentea ice cream cone",    "openUserId": "",    "passThroughInfo": "",    "transactTime": 1425744000123,    "createTime": 1425744000000  },  "errorMessage": ""}

Result Code[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-query#result-code "Result Code的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Name** | **Code** | **Reason** | **Solution** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| UNKNOWN\_ERROR | 400000 | An unknown error occurred while processing the request. | Try again later |
| INVALID\_REQUEST | 400001 | Parameter format is wrong or parameter transferring doesn't follow the rules. | Please check whether the parameters are correct. |
| INVALID\_SIGNATURE | 400002 | Incorrect signature result | Check whether the signature parameter and method comply with signature algorithm requirements. |
| INVALID\_TIMESTAMP | 400003 | Timestamp for this request is outside of the time window. | Sync server clock |
| INVALID\_API\_KEY\_OR\_IP | 400004 | API identity key not found or invalid. | Check API identity key |
| BAD\_API\_KEY\_FMT | 400005 | API identity key format invalid. | Check API identity key. |
| BAD\_HTTP\_METHOD | 400006 | Request method not supported. | Check Request method. |
| MEDIA\_TYPE\_NOT\_SUPPORTED | 400007 | Media type not supported. | Check Request Media type. |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_BODY | 400008 | Request body is not a valid json object. | Check Request body |
| MANDATORY\_PARAM\_EMPTY\_OR\_MALFORMED | 400100 | A parameter was missing/empty/null, or malformed. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_LENGTH | 400101 | A parameter was not valid, was empty/null, or too long/short, or wrong format. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_VALUE | 400102 | A parameter was not valid, the value is out of range. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_ILLEGAL\_CHAR | 400103 | A parameter was not valid, contains illegal characters |     |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_TOO\_LARGE | 400104 | Invalid request, content length too large |     |
| ORDER\_NOT\_FOUND | 400202 | Order not found. |     |
| INVALID\_ACCOUNT\_STATUS | 400203 | Not support for this account, please check account status. |     |

*   [EndPoint](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-query#endpoint)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-query#request-parameters)
    *   [Sample Request Body](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-query#sample-request-body)
        
*   [Response Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-query#response-parameters)
    
*   [Child Attribute](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-query#child-attribute)
    *   [QueryOrderResult](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-order-query#queryorderresult)

# Binance Pay API: Changelog | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Last Updated: 2025-06

2025-06[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay#2025-06 "2025-06的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Release of new Webhook Notification: Merchant QR Code

2025-02[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay#2025-02 "2025-02的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Modification to existing endpoints:

*   A new parameter subMerchantId in Payout API for CP payout order management.
    *   POST /binancepay/openapi/payout/transfer
*   EUR is no longer supported as order currency, MICA user may use USDC
    *   POST /binancepay/openapi/v3/order
    *   POST /binancepay/openapi/direct-debit/contract

2024-08[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay#2024-08 "2024-08的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Modification to existing endpoints:

*   Parameter subMerchantId is now mandatory for CP
    *   POST /binancepay/openapi/v3/order
*   Release of new API to modify submerchant information
    *   POST /binancepay/openapi/submerchant/modify

2024-05[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay#2024-05 "2024-05的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

EUR is supported as order currency for MICA user per MICA rules

*   POST /binancepay/openapi/v3/order
*   POST /binancepay/openapi/direct-debit/contract

2023-06[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay#2023-06 "2023-06的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Release of new Create Order API version, v3 endpoint

*   New mandatory parameter description
    *   POST /binancepay/openapi/v3/order

2023-01[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay#2023-01 "2023-01的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Release of new Direct debit API for recurring and pre-authorize payment

*   POST /binancepay/openapi/direct-debit/contract
*   POST /binancepay/openapi/direct-debit/contract/query
*   POST /binancepay/openapi/direct-debit/contract/termination
*   POST /binancepay/openapi/pay/notify
*   POST /binancepay/openapi/pay/apply

2022-08[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay#2022-08 "2022-08的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Modification to existing endpoints:

*   New option parameter passThroughInfo can be used in the Create Order API for merchant to pass any other information of the order
    *   POST /binancepay/openapi/v2/order
*   New optional parameter webhookUrl can be used in Create Order API for merchant to receive webhook notification in another endpoint
    *   POST /binancepay/openapi/v2/order

*   [2025-06](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay#2025-06)
    
*   [2025-02](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay#2025-02)
    
*   [2024-08](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay#2024-08)
    
*   [2024-05](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay#2024-05)
    
*   [2023-06](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay#2023-06)
    
*   [2023-01](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay#2023-01)

# API Specification Common Rules | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-common#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

For Security Purpose, Binance and IPs will both ensure https-based call back endpoints. And signature checks for APIs.

Protocol Rules[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-common#protocol-rules "Protocol Rules的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following specifies the rules for calling the API when accessing Binance payment.

| **Rule** | **Description** |
| --- | --- |
| **Transfer Mode** | Use HTTPS for secure transactions. |
| **Submit Mode** | POST/GET, depends on the API. |
| **Data Format (content-type)** | Data submitted and response are both in **application/json** format. |
| **Char Encoding** | Use UTF-8 character encoding. |
| **Signature Algorithm** | HMAC-SHA512. |
| **Signature Requirement** | Signature-checking is required for requesting and receiving data. |
| **Logic Judgment** | Determine protocol field, service field and transaction status. |

Request Header[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-common#request-header "Request Header的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **content-type** | string | Y   | application/json | content type |
| **BinancePay-Timestamp** | long | Y   | Binance pay only process request within 1s | UnixTimestamp in milliseconds that the requests send, guarantee the machine time is sync with the network |
| **BinancePay-Nonce** | string | Y   | must be 32 digits | A random string with 32 bytes, e.g. random ascii decimal within a-z and A-Z and loop 32 times to form a random string |
| **BinancePay-Certificate-SN** | string | Y   | \-  | API identity key issued by Binance payment system |
| **BinancePay-Signature** | string | Y   | this should use SHA512, and be in upper case | signature, [signature generation](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-common#signature) |

Signature[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-common#signature "Signature的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Build the content[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-common#build-the-content "Build the content的直接链接")

    String payload = timestamp + "\n" + nonce + "\n" + body + "\n";

### Sign the content[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-common#sign-the-content "Sign the content的直接链接")

    String signature = hex(hmac("sha512", payload, secretKey)).toUpperCase()

* * *

**NOTE**

*   ‘\\n’ is LF, ASCII value is '0x0A'
*   Parameter names are case-sensitive;
*   When checking returned data or a push notification signature, the transferred sign parameter is excluded in this signature as it is compared with the created signature.
*   When post the Json body, carefully check the quote, **'** is not same as **"**

* * *

Hosts[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-common#hosts "Hosts的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    https://bpay.binanceapi.com

Common Business Errors[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-common#common-business-errors "Common Business Errors的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Name** | **Code** | **Reason** | **Solution** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| UNKNOW\_ERROR | 400000 | An unknown error occurred while processing the request. | Try again later |
| INVALID\_REQUEST | 400001 | Parameter format is wrong or parameter transferring doesn't follow the rules. | Please check whether the parameters are correct. |
| INVALID\_SIGNATURE | 400002 | Incorrect signature result | Check whether the signature parameter and method comply with signature algorithm requirements. |
| INVALID\_TIMESTAMP | 400003 | Timestamp for this request is outside of the time window. | Sync server clock |
| INVALID\_API\_KEY\_OR\_IP | 400004 | API identity key not found or invalid. | Check API identity key |
| BAD\_API\_KEY\_FMT | 400005 | API identity key format invalid. | Check API identity key. |
| BAD\_HTTP\_METHOD | 400006 | Request method not supported | Use POST http method |
| MEDIA\_TYPE\_NOT\_SUPPORTED | 400007 | Media type not supported | Add header Content-Type: application/json |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_BODY | 400008 | Request body is not a valid json object | Check the request body format |
| MANDATORY\_PARAM\_EMPTY\_OR\_MALFORMED | 400100 | A parameter was missing/empty/null, or malformed. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_LENGTH | 400101 | A parameter was not valid, was empty/null, or too long/short, or wrong format. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_VALUE | 400102 | A parameter was not valid, the value is out of range. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_ILLEGAL\_CHAR | 400103 | A parameter was not valid, contains illegal characters |     |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_TOO\_LARGE | 400104 | Invalid request, content length too large |     |
| INVALID\_MERCHANT\_TRADE\_NO | 400201 | merchantTradeNo is invalid or duplicated |     |
| ORDER\_NOT\_FOUND | 400202 | Order not found. |     |
| INVALID\_ACCOUNT\_STATUS | 400203 | Not support for this account, please check account status. |     |

*   [Protocol Rules](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-common#protocol-rules)
    
*   [Request Header](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-common#request-header)
    
*   [Signature](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-common#signature)
    *   [Build the content](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-common#build-the-content)
        
    *   [Sign the content](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-common#sign-the-content)
        
*   [Hosts](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-common#hosts)
    
*   [Common Business Errors](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-common#common-business-errors)

# Query Collection Result | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-collection-result-query#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Query collection result API used for 3rd party application to collection order status

EndPoint[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-collection-result-query#endpoint "EndPoint的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    POST https://bpay.binanceapi.com/binancepay/openapi/collection/query

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-collection-result-query#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Attributes | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| orderId | String | NO  | collection order id in binance pay system, either trade no or collection order id should be provided |
| clientTradeNo | String | NO  | maximum length 32, trade no in client system, either trade no or collection order id should be provided |

Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-collection-result-query#response "Response的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| status | String | YES | status of the API request, "SUCCESS" or "FAIL" |
| code | String | YES | request result code, refer to [Result Code](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-collection-result-query#result-code) |
| data | QueryCollectionOrderResp | YES | response body, refer to [QueryCollectionOrderResp](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-collection-result-query#querycollectionorderresp) |
| errorMessage | string | YES |     |

### QueryCollectionOrderResp:[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-collection-result-query#querycollectionorderresp "QueryCollectionOrderResp:的直接链接")

| Attributes | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| orderId | String | YES |     |
| clientTradeNo | String | YES | maximum length 32 |
| status | String | YES | "INITIAL", "PENDING", "PAID" |

Result Code[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-collection-result-query#result-code "Result Code的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Result Code[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-collection-result-query#result-code-1 "Result Code的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Name** | **Code** | **Reason** | **Solution** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| UNKNOWN\_ERROR | 400000 | An unknown error occurred while processing the request. | Try again later |
| INVALID\_REQUEST | 400001 | Parameter format is wrong or parameter transferring doesn't follow the rules. | Please check whether the parameters are correct. |
| INVALID\_SIGNATURE | 400002 | Incorrect signature result | Check whether the signature parameter and method comply with signature algorithm requirements. |
| INVALID\_TIMESTAMP | 400003 | Timestamp for this request is outside of the time window. | Sync server clock |
| INVALID\_API\_KEY\_OR\_IP | 400004 | API identity key not found or invalid. | Check API identity key |
| BAD\_API\_KEY\_FMT | 400005 | API identity key format invalid. | Check API identity key. |
| BAD\_HTTP\_METHOD | 400006 | Request method not supported. | Check Request method. |
| MEDIA\_TYPE\_NOT\_SUPPORTED | 400007 | Media type not supported. | Check Request Media type. |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_BODY | 400008 | Request body is not a valid json object. | Check Request body |
| PAYMENT\_C2C\_COLLECTION\_ORDER\_NOT\_FOUND | 400207 | collection order not found | Check request property value |

*   [EndPoint](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-collection-result-query#endpoint)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-collection-result-query#request-parameters)
    
*   [Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-collection-result-query#response)
    *   [QueryCollectionOrderResp:](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-collection-result-query#querycollectionorderresp)
        
*   [Result Code](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-collection-result-query#result-code)
    
*   [Result Code](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-collection-result-query#result-code-1)

# Binance Pay API: Changelog | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/changelog#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Last Updated: 2025-06

2025-06[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/changelog#2025-06 "2025-06的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Release of new Webhook Notification: Merchant QR Code

2025-02[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/changelog#2025-02 "2025-02的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Modification to existing endpoints:

*   A new parameter subMerchantId in Payout API for CP payout order management.
    *   POST /binancepay/openapi/payout/transfer
*   EUR is no longer supported as order currency, MICA user may use USDC
    *   POST /binancepay/openapi/v3/order
    *   POST /binancepay/openapi/direct-debit/contract

2024-08[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/changelog#2024-08 "2024-08的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Modification to existing endpoints:

*   Parameter subMerchantId is now mandatory for CP
    *   POST /binancepay/openapi/v3/order
*   Release of new API to modify submerchant information
    *   POST /binancepay/openapi/submerchant/modify

2024-05[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/changelog#2024-05 "2024-05的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

EUR is supported as order currency for MICA user per MICA rules

*   POST /binancepay/openapi/v3/order
*   POST /binancepay/openapi/direct-debit/contract

2023-06[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/changelog#2023-06 "2023-06的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Release of new Create Order API version, v3 endpoint

*   New mandatory parameter description
    *   POST /binancepay/openapi/v3/order

2023-01[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/changelog#2023-01 "2023-01的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Release of new Direct debit API for recurring and pre-authorize payment

*   POST /binancepay/openapi/direct-debit/contract
*   POST /binancepay/openapi/direct-debit/contract/query
*   POST /binancepay/openapi/direct-debit/contract/termination
*   POST /binancepay/openapi/pay/notify
*   POST /binancepay/openapi/pay/apply

2022-08[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/changelog#2022-08 "2022-08的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Modification to existing endpoints:

*   New option parameter passThroughInfo can be used in the Create Order API for merchant to pass any other information of the order
    *   POST /binancepay/openapi/v2/order
*   New optional parameter webhookUrl can be used in Create Order API for merchant to receive webhook notification in another endpoint
    *   POST /binancepay/openapi/v2/order

# Binance Web3 Wallet | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Introduction[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w#introduction "Introduction的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Welcome to the Binance Web3 Wallet developer documentation. This guide helps third-party Decentralized Applications (DApps) integrate with the Binance Web3 Wallet using industry-standard protocols — no proprietary SDK required.

Binance Web3 Wallet supports standard connection methods including **WalletConnect v2** and **EIP-1193 injected provider**. If your DApp already supports WalletConnect or injected wallets, it works with Binance Web3 Wallet out of the box.

The Binance Web3 Wallet is built on the latest multi-party computation (MPC) cryptographic standard, providing unmatched security. With this technique, private keys remain secure and confidential, as each party only has access to its own key fragment.

In addition to exceptional security, the Binance Web3 Wallet offers a comprehensive suite of advanced features, including biometric authentication, WalletConnect v2 support, and SoulBound Tokens (SBT).

Features[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w#features "Features的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **WalletConnect v2 compatible** — Binance Web3 Wallet is registered on WalletConnect Cloud. Any DApp that integrates WalletConnect v2 will automatically show Binance Wallet in the wallet list.
*   **Standard injected provider** — Inside the Binance App's DApp browser, `window.binancew3w.ethereum` is available as an EIP-1193 compatible provider.
*   **Multi-chain support** — EVM, Bitcoin, Solana, Sui, Cosmos, Aptos, TON, Tron, and more.
*   **Secure and easy integration** — Support for standard functions such as connecting, signing messages, and sending transactions.
*   **Continuously evolving capabilities** — Unique features like fund transfers between the user's Binance account and Web3 wallet.

Support & Resources[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w#support--resources "Support & Resources的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you encounter any issues or have any questions, please reach out to our support team for assistance.

Support appeal: [https://forms.gle/yWGZHfqmhZfT1E5XA](https://forms.gle/yWGZHfqmhZfT1E5XA)

Provide feedback on this document: [https://forms.gle/zpBnQWCqoFMmby698](https://forms.gle/zpBnQWCqoFMmby698)

*   [Introduction](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w#introduction)
    
*   [Features](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w#features)
    
*   [Support & Resources](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w#support--resources)
