# Merchant API References | Binance Pay | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/introduction#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

What is the Binance Pay
=======================

Binance Pay is a contactless, borderless and secure cryptocurrency payment technology designed by Binance. Binance Pay allows Binance customer to pay and get paid in crypto from your friends and family worldwide.

Scenarios
=========

Merchant Acquiring (C2B) - Payment by QR code[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/introduction#merchant-acquiring-c2b---payment-by-qr-code "Merchant Acquiring (C2B) - Payment by QR code的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

In this scenario, users are able to make payments by scanning QR Codes provided by Binance and shown by merchants.

1.  Merchants cooperate with Binance to get different QR Codes for different products. Merchants display QR Codes for users to scan.
2.  Users open Binance APP and scan QR Codes.
3.  Users confirm payments by entering passcode or by clicking “confirm” button
4.  Binance notify Merchants and users the status of payments.

![img](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/assets/images/BinancePay-Pay-QRCodeV2-c36f5c72e5745d2754be772ee7390aec.png)

Transfer or Send Cryptos (C2C)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/introduction#transfer-or-send-cryptos-c2c "Transfer or Send Cryptos (C2C)的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

In this scenario, users are able to request crypto from others which called "Collection" in 3rd party application.

1.  Binance user grants a 3rd party application the permission to initiate transfer with his/her Binance Pay
2.  Binance user makes collection request from others in 3rd party application.
3.  Users(Payer) open Binance APP and confirm the collection.
4.  Binance notifies 3rd party application the status of the collection.

![img](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/assets/images/BinancePay-Collection-Flow-0c949f622883c7b5afd6392d2908be32.png)

> *   3rd party application uses oauth authentication to initiate the collection request, please contact Binance Merchant Operation ([https://merchant.binance.com/en/help](https://merchant.binance.com/en/help)
>     ) to set up proper permissions of oauth client and refer to [Binance OAuth2 Integration](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/docs/login/web-integration)
>      for oauth integration.
> *   Please refer to [Webhook Common Rules](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-common)
>      for authentication of collection result notification.
> *   In case 3rd party application needs to query the collection result, please contact Binance Merchant Operation ([https://merchant.binance.com/en/help](https://merchant.binance.com/en/help)
>     ) to set up authentication credential and refer to [API Common Rules](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-common)
>      for usage of API identity key and secret key.

*   [Merchant Acquiring (C2B) - Payment by QR code](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/introduction#merchant-acquiring-c2b---payment-by-qr-code)
    
*   [Transfer or Send Cryptos (C2C)](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/introduction#transfer-or-send-cryptos-c2c)

---

# Collection Notification | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/collection-notification#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Once the collection has been paid, Binance Pay will send notification through the endpoint url provided when creating collection.

Request Parameters
==================

| Attributes | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| orderId | Long | YES |     |
| clientTradeNo | String | YES |     |
| status | String | YES | "PAID" |

Response Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/collection-notification#response-parameters "Response Parameters的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **returnCode** | string | Y   | "SUCCESS" or "FAIL" | result code of notification processing, if process fail, Binance Pay will retry |
| **returnMessage** | string | N   | \-  | return message |

### Sample Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/collection-notification#sample-response "Sample Response的直接链接")

    {"returnCode":"SUCCESS","returnMessage":null}

*   [Response Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/collection-notification#response-parameters)
    *   [Sample Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/collection-notification#sample-response)

# Webhook Common Rules | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-common#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

For Security Purpose, Binance will add signature for webhook notification. Partner needs to verify the signature using the public key issued from Binance Pay.

Protocol Rules[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-common#protocol-rules "Protocol Rules的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following specifies the rules for calling the Webhook Notification from Binance payment.

| **Rule** | **Description** |
| --- | --- |
| **Transfer Mode** | Use HTTPS for secure transactions. |
| **Submit Mode** | POST/GET, depends on the API. |
| **Data Format** | Data submitted and response are both in application/json format. |
| **Char Encoding** | Use UTF-8 character encoding. |
| **Signature Algorithm** | RSA, asymmetric cryptographic algorithm |
| **Signature Requirement** | Signature-checking is required for requesting and receiving data. |
| **Logic Judgment** | Determine protocol field, service field and transaction status. |

Request Header[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-common#request-header "Request Header的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Binance Pay Webhook notification will contain the following in the header, which is used to verify the notification authenticity.

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **BinancePay-Certificate-SN** | long | Y   | \-  | MD5 hash value of public key |
| **BinancePay-Nonce** | string | Y   | must be 32 digits | A random string with 32 bytes, e.g. random ascii decimal within a-z and A-Z and loop 32 times to form a random string |
| **BinancePay-Timestamp** | string | Y   | \-  | UnixTimestamp in milliseconds |
| **BinancePay-Signature** | string | Y   | \-  | signature, generated by Binance Pay |

Verify the Signature[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-common#verify-the-signature "Verify the Signature的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Build the payload[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-common#build-the-payload "Build the payload的直接链接")

Java

    String payload = timestamp + "\n" + nonce + "\n" + body + "\n";

PHP

    $payload = $headers['Binancepay-Timestamp'] . "\n" . $headers['Binancepay-Nonce'] . "\n" . $entityBody . "\n";

Note:

*   ‘\\n’ is LF, ASCII value is '0x0A'

### Decode the Signature with Base64[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-common#decode-the-signature-with-base64 "Decode the Signature with Base64的直接链接")

Java

    byte[] decodedSignature = Base64.getDecoder().decode(signature);

PHP

    $decodedSignature = base64_decode ( $headers['Binancepay-Signature'] );

### Verify the content with public key[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-common#verify-the-content-with-public-key "Verify the content with public key的直接链接")

Public key to verify the content can be queried from [Query Certificate API](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-query-certificate)
 - "certPublic"

Note:

*   Hash algorithm should use SHA256

Sample Java code is here, together with org.bouncycastle toolkit.

     // input: pubKeyStr, decodedSignature, payload    PEMParser pubParser = new PEMParser(new StringReader(pubKeyStr))    SubjectPublicKeyInfo pubKeyObj = (SubjectPublicKeyInfo) pubParser.readObject();    AsymmetricKeyParameter pubKey = PublicKeyFactory.createKey(pubKeyObj);    byte[] payloadBytes = payload.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8);    RSADigestSigner verifier = new RSADigestSigner(new SHA256Digest());    verifier.init(false, pubKey);    verifier.update(payloadBytes, 0, payloadBytes.length);    return verifier.verifySignature(decodedSignature);

PHP

    openssl_verify($payload, $decodedSignature, $publicKey, OPENSSL_ALGO_SHA256 );

*   [Protocol Rules](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-common#protocol-rules)
    
*   [Request Header](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-common#request-header)
    
*   [Verify the Signature](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-common#verify-the-signature)
    *   [Build the payload](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-common#build-the-payload)
        
    *   [Decode the Signature with Base64](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-common#decode-the-signature-with-base64)
        
    *   [Verify the content with public key](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-common#verify-the-content-with-public-key)

---

# FAQ | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Frequently Asked Questions

403 ERROR.[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#403-error "403 ERROR.的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Exception Details:

    The request could not be satisfied.Request blocked. We can't connect to the server for this app or website at this time. There might be too much traffic or a configuration error. Try again later, or contact the app or website owner.If you provide content to customers through CloudFront, you can find steps to troubleshoot and help prevent this error by reviewing the CloudFront documentation.

Solution: Please carefully check your request path is following document, for example:

    create order: https://bpay.binanceapi.com/binancepay/openapi/v3/order

Error code "100001001".[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#error-code-100001001 "Error code "100001001".的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Exception Details:

    {"status":"ERROR","type":"SYS","code":"100001001","errorData":"System abnormality"}

Solution:

*   Please check if you used GET, **POST** method should be used.
*   Please check if you didn't put **content-type: application/json** in request header
*   Please check if you didn't post body in request

Error code "400002"[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#error-code-400002 "Error code "400002"的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Exception Details:

    {"code":"400002","msg":"Signature for this request is not valid."}

### Solution A[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#solution-a "Solution A的直接链接")

Please check if your sign logic is incorrect. You can test with below parameters:

Timestamp:

    1611232922428

Nonce:

    5RhaTrZPhknNv0kDSA2UQ67cPMVNS4sA

Notification body:

    {"merchantId":"98765987","subMerchantId":"98765987","merchantTradeNo":"9825382937292","totalFee":25.17,"productDetail":"Greentea ice cream cone","currency":"USDT","returnUrl":"","tradeType":"APP","productType":"Food","productName":"Ice Cream"}

The generated payload must be (there MUST be one new line at the end):

    16112329224285RhaTrZPhknNv0kDSA2UQ67cPMVNS4sA{"merchantId":"98765987","subMerchantId":"98765987","merchantTradeNo":"9825382937292","totalFee":25.17,"productDetail":"Greentea ice cream cone","currency":"USDT","returnUrl":"","tradeType":"APP","productType":"Food","productName":"Ice Cream"}

API Secret Key:

    uahr4nhailyq55yubuhuncnprfac73bcbz2qfafsevic1jruwunioxtoaozy122f

Signature Should be:

    253B9241C7331C0F02A0F5417BDDD4CD88124D3E188C0BA0E3EF121D36844B7F4D1A69AD8A1C3C7FF34901115E35A2530B672CF7430902E9862D69867689FD9F

### Solution B[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#solution-b "Solution B的直接链接")

Please check if your json request body used **'**, should use **"**

### Solution C[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#solution-c "Solution C的直接链接")

Please check if your code changed the request json body after signing. Some may reformat the json.

### Solution D[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#solution-d "Solution D的直接链接")

Please check if you made the signature to upper case

### Solution E[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#solution-e "Solution E的直接链接")

Please check the API Secret used. Ensure the API secret is generated from the merchant dashboard and saved immediately. A hashed API will be displayed after refresh, the hashed secret cannot be used.

Error code "400003"[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#error-code-400003 "Error code "400003"的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Exception Details:

    {"code":"400003","msg":"Timestamp for this request is outside of the recvWindow."}

Solution:

*   Please check the request header field 'BinancePay-Timestamp', it should be UnixTimestamp in milliseconds, not in seconds.
*   Please check if the request timestamp was within 1s to Binance Server.

Error code "400606"[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#error-code-400606 "Error code "400606"的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Exception Details:

    {"code":"400606","errorMessage": "Account has no accessibility to this function"."}

400606 error typically occurs when there’s an issue with your merchant account or API keys used.

Solution:

*   Check the API key and secret used are generated from the merchant dashboard and are saved immediately. As hashed keys will be displayed shortly, these hashed keys cannot be used.
*   The necessary access for the API keys has been enabled, such as Process Payment.
*   Check if there’s any outstanding action required from your end to activate your merchant account.

Error code “400004”[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#error-code-400004 "Error code “400004”的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Exception Details:

    {"code":"400004" "errorMessage": "Invalid API-key, IP, or permissions for action, request ip: 44.xx.xx"}

400004 error typically occurs when there’s an issue with the API keys used or on your whitelisted IP address.

Solution:

*   Check the API key and secret used is generated from the merchant dashboard and saved immediately. As hashed keys will be displayed shortly, these hashed keys cannot be used.
*   Please check if there’s any IP input in the "IP Access Restrictions" field on the merchant dashboard. Ensure that API call is from the IP input.

Webhook[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#webhook "Webhook的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Unable to verify signature[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#unable-to-verify-signature "Unable to verify signature的直接链接")

Failed to verify the signature in webhook notification

#### Solution A[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#solution-a-1 "Solution A的直接链接")

       Please check if your sign logic is incorrect. Test your code logic with these parameters, if it's not successful, then you need to double check your code logic.

### Order notification showing different BizId[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#order-notification-showing-different-bizid "Order notification showing different BizId的直接链接")

Timestamp:

    1611232922428

Nonce:

    5RhaTrZPhknNv0kDSA2UQ67cPMVNS4sA

Notification body:

    {"bizType":"PAY","data":"{\"merchantTradeNo\":\"9825382937292\",\"totalFee\":0.88000000,\"transactTime\":1619508939664,\"currency\":\"EUR\",\"commission\":0,\"openUserId\":\"1211HS10K81f4273ac031\",\"productType\":\"Food\",\"productName\":\"Ice Cream\",\"tradeType\":\"WEB\",\"transactionId\":\"M_R_282737362839373\"}","bizId":29383937493038367292,"bizStatus":"PAY_SUCCESS"}

The generated payload must be (there MUST be one new line at the end):

    16112329224285RhaTrZPhknNv0kDSA2UQ67cPMVNS4sA{"bizType":"PAY","data":"{\"merchantTradeNo\":\"9825382937292\",\"totalFee\":0.88000000,\"transactTime\":1619508939664,\"currency\":\"EUR\",\"commission\":0,\"openUserId\":\"1211HS10K81f4273ac031\",\"productType\":\"Food\",\"productName\":\"Ice Cream\",\"tradeType\":\"WEB\",\"transactionId\":\"M_R_282737362839373\"}","bizId":29383937493038367292,"bizStatus":"PAY_SUCCESS"}

Public key:

    -----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----MIGfMA0GCSqGSIb3DQEBAQUAA4GNADCBiQKBgQCVAMXVTMIuttHcP1kvSk9V39S7BqDbY+LC9JfwMzyoubo3fdsqBf4EmB1PfBUigcOL5YBqMKGEE6xmVw6SXCTH4JwXdqJ4IRiXf76YMt6PB0dMzu/qCmhaGFGkqT6vJM0hHyEbtS/P3FR9ZU+eaOvynLWbFvXTzIoctZM1IvDrCwIDAQAB-----END PUBLIC KEY-----

Verification must be passed against this original signature in header:

    VtniwOFAi4oBKFnvHhY6UZ+wPARf7+yWVbE61Hc7JVdRgqKJ40Yk9k5Gb2Y0S0VLUYOOOhUNUsD7R8GDEr6WH84sAEf8bXa1xYMiyjgeGleTg1MxRJCtrHcxMeMCEXPWmKTeLhn6O+cdvDGq4ZpcTTiQnEvk5xHPcxFrBT637zg=

### Solution B[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#solution-b-1 "Solution B的直接链接")

If above testing is working fine, please check if you formatted the notification body and used the formatted body for signature check

Pay Order Webhook notification showing different BizIds.[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#pay-order-webhook-notification-showing-different-bizids "Pay Order Webhook notification showing different BizIds.的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This is a common error if you are using nodejs. What we sent over are actually the same BizIds, however there is a problem with nodejs parsing and processing large numbers, hence resulting in this error.

### Solution A[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#solution-a-2 "Solution A的直接链接")

Treating the whole body as string instead.

### Solution B[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#solution-b-2 "Solution B的直接链接")

Please turn off any body parser middleware if you are using it.

### Solution C[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#solution-c-1 "Solution C的直接链接")

Turn off any body parser middleware and treat the whole body as string.

*   [403 ERROR.](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#403-error)
    
*   [Error code "100001001".](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#error-code-100001001)
    
*   [Error code "400002"](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#error-code-400002)
    *   [Solution A](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#solution-a)
        
    *   [Solution B](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#solution-b)

    *   [Solution E](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/faq#solution-e)

# OAuth API : Create Collection | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/oauth-api-collection-create#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Query c2c supported currencies.

> *   The host of OAuth API is [https://accounts.binance.com](https://accounts.binance.com/)
>     
> *   The request parameter of OAuth API is transferred as query string of requested url.
> *   No need to add signature and API identity key to request header of OAuth API.

    POST https://accounts.binance.com/oauth-api/v1/pay/c2c/collection/create

Parameters(Query String of Requested URL):[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/oauth-api-collection-create#parametersquery-string-of-requested-url "Parameters(Query String of Requested URL):的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| access\_token | String | YES |     |
| amount | BigDecimal | YES | collection order amount |
| currency | String | YES | collection order currency |
| description | String(50) | NO  | collection order note |
| clientTradeNo | String(32) | YES | trade no in client system, used as idempotent check |
| clientUserId | String(32) | NO  | user id in client system |
| clientUserMobile | String(32) | NO  | user mobile in client system |
| notificationUrl | String | NO  | url for collection order status notification |

Response:[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/oauth-api-collection-create#response "Response:的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code | String | YES | when success=false, the value is the result code |
| message | String | NO  | when success=false, the value is error description |
| data | CreateCollectionOrderResp | NO  | when success=true, the value is the create collection result, refer to [CreateCollectionOrderResp](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/oauth-api-collection-create#createcollectionorderresp) |
| success | boolean | YES |     |

### CreateCollectionOrderResp:[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/oauth-api-collection-create#createcollectionorderresp "CreateCollectionOrderResp:的直接链接")

| Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| orderId | String | YES |     |
| clientTradeNo | String | YES |     |
| type | String | YES | collection order type, it always equals to pain text 'COLLECTION' |

    {  "code": "000000",  "message": null,  "data": {    "orderId": "12345",    "clientTradeNo": "re3432",    "type" : "COLLECTION"  },  "success": true}

### Result Code[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/oauth-api-collection-create#result-code "Result Code的直接链接")

| Name | Code | Reason |
| --- | --- | --- |
| PAYMENT\_INVALID\_CURRENCY | 403031 | Requested currency is not supported |
| PAYMENT\_ILLEGAL\_AMOUNT | 403040 | The amount is illegal, too small |
| PAYMENT\_C2C\_TRADE\_NO\_DUPLICATED | 403211 | clientTradeNo is duplicated |
| PAYMENT\_RECEIVER\_EXCEED\_RECEIVE\_LIMIT | 403706 | Recipient has exceeded fund receiving limit. |

*   [Parameters(Query String of Requested URL):](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/oauth-api-collection-create#parametersquery-string-of-requested-url)
    
*   [Response:](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/oauth-api-collection-create#response)
    *   [CreateCollectionOrderResp:](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/oauth-api-collection-create#createcollectionorderresp)
        
    *   [Result Code](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/oauth-api-collection-create#result-code)

# How To Enroll Mini Program KYB | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/dc-kyb#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

How To Enroll Mini Program KYB
==============================

Before you try to Binance mini program platform, you need to enroll the kyb. Two kyb are required for mini program.

*   Entity KYB
*   Mini prgoram KYB

Steps[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/dc-kyb#steps "Steps的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 1\. Submit the Entity KYB[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/dc-kyb#1-submit-the-entity-kyb "1. Submit the Entity KYB的直接链接")

To submit the Entity KYB, your account must be an enterpise account. If you don't have an enterprise account, please get the enterprise account [here](https://accounts.binance.com/en/register-business?loginChannel=homepage&return_to=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmluYW5jZS5jb20vZW4vbXkvZGFzaGJvYXJk)

Login with the enterpise account, go to [kyb list page](https://developers.binance.com/en/kyb/list)
. Click the enroll button of Entity KYB. Fill the info and submit it.

![kyb list](https://bin.bnbstatic.com/static/images/developer-center/mp-kyb.png)

### 2\. Submit the Mini Program KYB[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/dc-kyb#2-submit-the-mini-program-kyb "2. Submit the Mini Program KYB的直接链接")

After submit the Entity KYB, you are now able to submit the Mini Program KYB. Go to [kyb list page](https://developers.binance.com/en/kyb/list)
, Click the enroll button of Mini Program KYB. Fill the info and submit it.

### 3\. Add the members into Entity[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/dc-kyb#3-add-the-members-into-entity "3. Add the members into Entity的直接链接")

Go to entity member management page

![entity member management](https://bin.bnbstatic.com/static/images/developer-center/member-management-entry.png)

Add your team users into this entity.

There are two Roles of Entity currently:

*   Entity Admin
*   Entity User

|     | Entity Admin | Entity User |
| --- | --- | --- |
| KYB Management | √   |     |
| Entity Member Management | √   |     |
| View Console Panel | √   | √   |

*   [Steps](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/dc-kyb#steps)
    *   [1\. Submit the Entity KYB](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/dc-kyb#1-submit-the-entity-kyb)
        
    *   [2\. Submit the Mini Program KYB](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/dc-kyb#2-submit-the-mini-program-kyb)
        
    *   [3\. Add the members into Entity](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/dc-kyb#3-add-the-members-into-entity)

---

本页总览

For Security Purpose, Binance will add signature for webhook notification. Partner need to verify the signature using the public key issued from Binance Pay. Public key can be queried from this API

EndPoint[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-query-certificate#endpoint "EndPoint的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **certSerial** | string | Y   | \-  | public key hash value |
| **certPublic** | string | Y   | \-  | public key |

*   [EndPoint](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-query-certificate#endpoint)
    
*   [Response Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-query-certificate#response-parameters)

# Binance Pay API: Authentication | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/authentication#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

The Binance Pay API uses API keys to authenticate requests. You can view and manage your API keys in the [Binance Merchant Admin Portal](https://merchant.binance.com/en)
.

Your API keys carry many privileges, so be sure to keep them secure! Do not share your secret API keys in publicly accessible areas such as GitHub, client-side code, and so forth.

All API requests must be made over HTTPS. Calls made over plain HTTP will fail. API requests without authentication will also fail.

Apply API identity key and API secret key[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/authentication#apply-api-identity-key-and-api-secret-key "Apply API identity key and API secret key的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  Register Merchant Account at Binance
2.  Login merchant account and create new API identity key/API secret key [Binance Merchant Admin Portal](https://merchant.binance.com/en)
    .

Decryption instructions for merchant data sharing[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/authentication#decryption-instructions-for-merchant-data-sharing "Decryption instructions for merchant data sharing的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Decryption Steps:

1.  **Convert the Secret Key to an AES Key**: Use the secret key used for order creation via OPEN API to generate an AES key. This is done by hashing the secret key with the SHA-256 algorithm.
2.  **Extract IV and Encrypted Data**: Base64 decode the shared data string (like payerDetail) to get a byte array. The first 12 bytes represent the initialization vector (IV) and the remaining bytes represent the encrypted data.
3.  **Decrypt the Data**: Initialize a decryption cipher using the AES key and IV. Decrypt the encrypted data and convert the resulting byte array into a UTF-8 encoded string.

Sample java code

    import javax.crypto.Cipher;import javax.crypto.spec.GCMParameterSpec;import javax.crypto.spec.SecretKeySpec;import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;import org.apache.commons.codec.binary.Base64;import org.apache.commons.codec.digest.DigestUtils;class Scratch {  public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {    String secretKey = "<secretKey>"; // Replace with the secretKey used during the order creation via OPEN API    String sharedData = "<sharedData>"; // Replace with your shared data string    String decryptedContent = decrypt(sharedData, secretKey);    System.out.println(decryptedContent);  }  public static String decrypt(String sharedData, String secretKey) throws Exception {    // Convert the secretKey from the order creation via OPEN API to an AES key using SHA-256    byte[] aesKeyBytes = DigestUtils.sha256(secretKey.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));    // Decode Base64 shared data and extract IV and encrypted data    byte[] decodedContent = Base64.decodeBase64(sharedData);    byte[] iv = new byte[12];    byte[] encryptedData = new byte[decodedContent.length - 12];    System.arraycopy(decodedContent, 0, iv, 0, 12);    System.arraycopy(decodedContent, 12, encryptedData, 0, encryptedData.length);    // Decrypt data using the AES key and IV    SecretKeySpec secretKeySpec = new SecretKeySpec(aesKeyBytes, "AES");    Cipher cipher = Cipher.getInstance("AES/GCM/NoPadding");    cipher.init(Cipher.DECRYPT_MODE, secretKeySpec, new GCMParameterSpec(128, iv));    byte[] decryptedBytes = cipher.doFinal(encryptedData);    // Convert decrypted byte array back to string    return new String(decryptedBytes, StandardCharsets.UTF_8);  }}

Sample Input

    String secretKey = "eqzxjex2apzoei900ubweocnlkfuhxhox0fgbmrjjbwr6qc1qdgou7uj50nmfujr";String sharedData = "qlbXoEGDxFVMo2+emWFmS2Unesyi7fMnSV0XTIS0J7ErxGjWZ/3yWAJ/NKalJwTzyXFXJpINNFEoMLGlteRlyqR4V330WIuaJmMAMUyXwdrFaNWHw+wPvs3eGm+radsdNnIJ56xqbH57ya4h/nSzyOw=";

Sample Output

    {"firstName":"Chris","lastName":"Paul","dateOfBirth":"1994-02-04","nationality":"BR","countryOfResidence":"BR"}

*   [Apply API identity key and API secret key](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/authentication#apply-api-identity-key-and-api-secret-key)
    
*   [Decryption instructions for merchant data sharing](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/authentication#decryption-instructions-for-merchant-data-sharing)

---

# Avail Provider | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w/avail-provider#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Avail Provider API[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w/avail-provider#avail-provider-api "Avail Provider API的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Binance Web3 Wallet's Avail API is fully compliant with the [polkadot extension](https://polkadot.js.org/docs/extension/)
. Dapps can use it to integrate with Binance Web3 Wallet.

### Provider Detection[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w/avail-provider#provider-detection "Provider Detection的直接链接")

We will inject the `window.injectedWeb3` object into the global scope. The object contains the `binancew3w` object, which is the bridge object for the Avail protocol.

    window.injectedWeb3 = {  'binancew3w': {    // semver for the package    version: '1.0.0',    // this is called to enable the injection, and returns an injected    // object containing the accounts, signer and provider interfaces    // (or it will reject if not authorized)    enable (originName: string): Promise<Injected>  }}

You can get the provider object by calling `window.injectedWeb3['binancew3w'].enable('my dapp')`. and then use the `accounts` and `signer` interfaces to interact with the injected account.

    const provider = await window.injectedWeb3['subwallet-js'].enable('my dapp')const allAccounts = provider.accounts.get()const AVAIL_GENESIS_HASH = isTest  ? '0xd3d2f3a3495dc597434a99d7d449ebad6616db45e4e4f178f31cc6fa14378b70'  : '0xb91746b45e0346cc2f815a520b9c6cb4d5c0902af848db0a80f85932d2e8276a'if (allAccounts.length > 0) {  console.log('Injected accounts:', allAccounts)  for (let i = 0; i < allAccounts.length; i++) {    if (allAccounts[i].genesisHash === AVAIL_GENESIS_HASH) {      console.log('Injected avail account:', allAccounts[i])    }  }}

You can also use the `@polkadot/extension-dapp` package to detect the provider:

    const AVAIL_GENESIS_HASH = isTest  ? '0xd3d2f3a3495dc597434a99d7d449ebad6616db45e4e4f178f31cc6fa14378b70'  : '0xb91746b45e0346cc2f815a520b9c6cb4d5c0902af848db0a80f85932d2e8276a'const allAccounts = await web3Accounts()if (allAccounts.length > 0) {  console.log('Injected accounts:', allAccounts)  for (let i = 0; i < allAccounts.length; i++) {    if (allAccounts[i].genesisHash === AVAIL_GENESIS_HASH) {      console.log('Injected avail account:', allAccounts[i])    }  }}

Injection information[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w/avail-provider#injection-information "Injection information的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

And here is the related interfaces:

    interface Injected {  // the interface for Accounts, as detailed below  readonly accounts: Accounts;  // the standard Signer interface for the API, as detailed below  readonly signer: Signer;}interface Account = {  // ss-58 encoded address  readonly address: string;  // the genesisHash for this account (empty if applicable to all)  readonly genesisHash?: string;  // (optional) name for display  readonly name?: string;};// exposes accountsinterface Accounts {  // retrieves the list of accounts for right now  get: () => Promise<Account[]>;  // (optional) subscribe to all accounts, updating as they change  subscribe?: (cb: (accounts: Account[]) => any) => () => void}// a signer that communicates with the extension via sendMessageinterface Signer {    /**     * @description signs an extrinsic payload from a serialized form     */    signPayload?: (payload: SignerPayloadJSON) => Promise<SignerResult>;    /**     * @description signs a raw payload, only the bytes data as supplied     */    signRaw?: (raw: SignerPayloadRaw) => Promise<SignerResult>;}

Provide metadata[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w/avail-provider#provide-metadata "Provide metadata的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You may need to provide metadata for the wallet, such as the chain name, chain type, color, genesis hash, icon, and meta calls.

    // the address we use to use for signing, as injectedconst SENDER = '5DTestUPts3kjeXSTMyerHihn1uwMfLj8vU8sqF7qYrFabHE';// finds an injector for an addressconst injector = await web3FromAddress(SENDER);injector.metadata.provide({    chain: 'Avail DA Mainnet',    chainType: 'substrate',    color: '#1B1E26',    genesisHash: '0xb91746b45e0346cc2f815a520b9c6cb4d5c0902af848db0a80f85932d2e8276a',    icon: 'substrate',    metaCalls: ...})

signAndSend[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w/avail-provider#signandsend "signAndSend的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You can use the `signAndSend` method to sign and send a transaction.

    import { web3Accounts, web3Enable, web3FromAddress } from '@polkadot/extension-dapp';// returns an array of all the injected sources// (this needs to be called first, before other requests)const allInjected = await web3Enable('my cool dapp');// returns an array of { address, meta: { name, source } }// meta.source contains the name of the extension that provides this accountconst allAccounts = await web3Accounts();// the address we use to use for signing, as injectedconst SENDER = '5DTestUPts3kjeXSTMyerHihn1uwMfLj8vU8sqF7qYrFabHE';// finds an injector for an addressconst injector = await web3FromAddress(SENDER);// sign and send our transaction - notice here that the address of the account// (as retrieved injected) is passed through as the param to the `signAndSend`,// the API then calls the extension to present to the user and get it signed.// Once complete, the api sends the tx + signature via the normal processapi.tx.balances  .transfer('5C5555yEXUcmEJ5kkcCMvdZjUo7NGJiQJMS7vZXEeoMhj3VQ', 123456)  .signAndSend(SENDER, { signer: injector.signer }, (status) => { ... });

*   [Avail Provider API](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w/avail-provider#avail-provider-api)
    *   [Provider Detection](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w/avail-provider#provider-detection)
        
*   [Injection information](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w/avail-provider#injection-information)
    
*   [Provide metadata](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w/avail-provider#provide-metadata)
    
*   [signAndSend](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w/avail-provider#signandsend)

---

# How To Enroll Mini Program KYB | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/dc-kyb/mp-kyb#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

How To Enroll Mini Program KYB
==============================

Before you try to Binance mini program platform, you need to enroll the kyb. Two kyb are required for mini program.

*   Entity KYB
*   Mini prgoram KYB

Steps[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/dc-kyb/mp-kyb#steps "Steps的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 1\. Submit the Entity KYB[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/dc-kyb/mp-kyb#1-submit-the-entity-kyb "1. Submit the Entity KYB的直接链接")

To submit the Entity KYB, your account must be an enterpise account. If you don't have an enterprise account, please get the enterprise account [here](https://accounts.binance.com/en/register-business?loginChannel=homepage&return_to=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmluYW5jZS5jb20vZW4vbXkvZGFzaGJvYXJk)

Login with the enterpise account, go to [kyb list page](https://developers.binance.com/en/kyb/list)
. Click the enroll button of Entity KYB. Fill the info and submit it.

![kyb list](https://bin.bnbstatic.com/static/images/developer-center/mp-kyb.png)

### 2\. Submit the Mini Program KYB[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/dc-kyb/mp-kyb#2-submit-the-mini-program-kyb "2. Submit the Mini Program KYB的直接链接")

After submit the Entity KYB, you are now able to submit the Mini Program KYB. Go to [kyb list page](https://developers.binance.com/en/kyb/list)
, Click the enroll button of Mini Program KYB. Fill the info and submit it.

### 3\. Add the members into Entity[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/dc-kyb/mp-kyb#3-add-the-members-into-entity "3. Add the members into Entity的直接链接")

Go to entity member management page

![entity member management](https://bin.bnbstatic.com/static/images/developer-center/member-management-entry.png)

Add your team users into this entity.

There are two Roles of Entity currently:

*   Entity Admin
*   Entity User

|     | Entity Admin | Entity User |
| --- | --- | --- |
| KYB Management | √   |     |
| Entity Member Management | √   |     |
| View Console Panel | √   | √   |

*   [Steps](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/dc-kyb/mp-kyb#steps)
    *   [1\. Submit the Entity KYB](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/dc-kyb/mp-kyb#1-submit-the-entity-kyb)
        
    *   [2\. Submit the Mini Program KYB](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/dc-kyb/mp-kyb#2-submit-the-mini-program-kyb)
        
    *   [3\. Add the members into Entity](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/dc-kyb/mp-kyb#3-add-the-members-into-entity)

---

# Wallet Balance Query V2 | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

API used to query one or more wallet balance.

EndPoint[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#endpoint "EndPoint的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    POST /binancepay/openapi/v2/balance

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **wallet** | string | Y   | Enum string | Binance wallet to query, currently supported enum valus:  <br>  <br>**FUNDING\_WALLET**  <br>**SPOT\_WALLET** |
| **currency** | string | N   | Valid currency, must be in uppercase | Currency to query, for e.g, "USDC","USDT" & "BNB". If no currency was sent, return all assets. |

### Sample Request Body[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#sample-request-body "Sample Request Body的直接链接")

    {    "wallet": "SPOT_WALLET",    "currency": "USDT"}

Response Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#response-parameters "Response Parameters的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **status** | string | Y   | "SUCCESS" or "FAIL" | status of the API request |
| **code** | string | Y   | \-  | request result code, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#result-code) |
| **data** | AssetQueryRespV2 | N   | \-  | response body, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#balance-response) |
| **errorMessage** | string | N   | maximum length 256 |     |

Child Attribute[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#child-attribute "Child Attribute的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### AssetQueryRespV2[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#assetqueryrespv2 "AssetQueryRespV2的直接链接")

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **balance** | AssetQueryData | N   |     | Currency data, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#balance-response-data) |
| **wallet** | string | Y   |     | Wallet that contains the currencies |
| **updateTime** | string | Y   |     | Update time of the data |
| **fiat** | string | Y   |     | Fiat name, for fiat valuation |

### AssetQueryData[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#assetquerydata "AssetQueryData的直接链接")

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **available** | decimal | Y   | Amount Range: 0.00000001 - 999999999999999.99999999; Max Unit Range: 8 decimal places | Current balance free to use |
| **freeze** | decimal | Y   | Amount Range: 0.00000001 - 999999999999999.99999999; Max Unit Range: 8 decimal places | Current balance frozen |
| **asset** | string | Y   |     | Asset/currency name |
| **availableFiatValuation** | decimal | Y   | Amount Range: 0.00000001 - 999999999999999.99999999; Max Unit Range: 8 decimal places | Available fiat valuation |
| **availableBtcValuation** | decimal | Y   | Amount Range: 0.00000001 - 999999999999999.99999999; Max Unit Range: 8 decimal places | Available BTC valuation |

### Sample Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#sample-response "Sample Response的直接链接")

    {  "status": "SUCCESS",  "code": "000000",  "data": {    "balance": [      {        "available": 990000.00000000,        "freeze": 0E-8,        "asset": "USDT",        "availableFiatValuation": 989991.90516600,        "availableBtcValuation": 22.98780000      }    ],    "wallet": "FUNDING_WALLET",    "updateTime": 1666937353019,    "fiat": "USD"  }}

    {    "status": "FAIL",    "code": "400003",    "errorMessage": "Timestamp for this request is outside of the recvWindow."}

Result Code[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#result-code "Result Code的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Name** | **Code** | **Reason** | **Solution** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| UNKNOWN\_ERROR | 400000 | An unknown error occurred while processing the request. | Try again later |
| INVALID\_REQUEST | 400001 | Parameter format is wrong or parameter transferring doesn't follow the rules. | Please check whether the parameters are correct. |
| INVALID\_SIGNATURE | 400002 | Incorrect signature result | Check whether the signature parameter and method comply with signature algorithm requirements. |
| INVALID\_TIMESTAMP | 400003 | Timestamp for this request is outside of the time window. | Sync server clock |
| INVALID\_API\_KEY\_OR\_IP | 400004 | API identity key not found or invalid. | Check API identity key |
| BAD\_API\_KEY\_FMT | 400005 | API identity key format invalid. | Check API identity key. |
| BAD\_HTTP\_METHOD | 400006 | Request method not supported. | Check Request method. |
| MEDIA\_TYPE\_NOT\_SUPPORTED | 400007 | Media type not supported. | Check Request Media type. |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_BODY | 400008 | Request body is not a valid json object. | Check Request body |
| MANDATORY\_PARAM\_EMPTY\_OR\_MALFORMED | 400100 | A parameter was missing/empty/null, or malformed. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_LENGTH | 400101 | A parameter was not valid, was empty/null, or too long/short, or wrong format. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_VALUE | 400102 | A parameter was not valid, the value is out of range. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_ILLEGAL\_CHAR | 400103 | A parameter was not valid, contains illegal characters |     |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_TOO\_LARGE | 400104 | Invalid request, content length too large |     |

*   [EndPoint](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#endpoint)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#request-parameters)
    *   [Sample Request Body](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#sample-request-body)
        
*   [Response Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#response-parameters)
    
*   [Child Attribute](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#child-attribute)
    *   [AssetQueryRespV2](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#assetqueryrespv2)
        
    *   [AssetQueryData](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#assetquerydata)
        
    *   [Sample Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#sample-response)
        
*   [Result Code](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query-v2#result-code)

API used to query wallet balance.

EndPoint[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query#endpoint "EndPoint的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    POST /binancepay/openapi/balance

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **wallet** | string | Y   | Enum string | Binance wallet to query, currently supported enum valus:  <br>  <br>**FUNDING\_WALLET**  <br>**SPOT\_WALLET** |
| **currency** | string | Y   | Valid currency, must be in uppercase | Currency to query, for e.g, "USDC","USDT" & "BNB" |

### Sample Request Body[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query#sample-request-body "Sample Request Body的直接链接")

Response Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query#response-parameters "Response Parameters的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **status** | string | Y   | "SUCCESS" or "FAIL" | status of the API request |
| **code** | string | Y   | \-  | request result code, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query#result-code) |
| **data** | AssetQueryResp | N   | \-  | response body, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query#balance-response) |
| **errorMessage** | string | N   | maximum length 256 |     |

Child Attribute[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query#child-attribute "Child Attribute的直接链接")

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **balance** | decimal | Y   | Amount Range: 0.00000001 - 999999999999999.99999999; Max Unit Range: 8 decimal places | Current balance free to use |
| **asset** | string | Y   |     | Asset/currency name |

Result Code[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-balance-query#result-code "Result Code的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Name** | **Code** | **Reason** | **Solution** |

| INVALID\_REQUEST | 400001 | Parameter format is wrong or parameter transferring doesn't follow the rules. | Please check whether the parameters are correct. |
| INVALID\_SIGNATURE | 400002 | Incorrect signature result | Check whether the signature parameter and method comply with signature algorithm requirements. |
| INVALID\_TIMESTAMP | 400003 | Timestamp for this request is outside of the time window. | Sync server clock |
| INVALID\_API\_KEY\_OR\_IP | 400004 | API identity key not found or invalid. | Check API identity key |
| BAD\_API\_KEY\_FMT | 400005 | API identity key format invalid. | Check API identity key. |
| BAD\_HTTP\_METHOD | 400006 | Request method not supported. | Check Request method. |
| MEDIA\_TYPE\_NOT\_SUPPORTED | 400007 | Media type not supported. | Check Request Media type. |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_BODY | 400008 | Request body is not a valid json object. | Check Request body |
| MANDATORY\_PARAM\_EMPTY\_OR\_MALFORMED | 400100 | A parameter was missing/empty/null, or malformed. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_LENGTH | 400101 | A parameter was not valid, was empty/null, or too long/short, or wrong format. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_VALUE | 400102 | A parameter was not valid, the value is out of range. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_ILLEGAL\_CHAR | 400103 | A parameter was not valid, contains illegal characters |     |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_TOO\_LARGE | 400104 | Invalid request, content length too large |     |

# 公告 | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/announcement#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

公告
==

*   当 Binance 发布英文公告（语言代码：`en`）时，系统会向已订阅的用户推送公告信息。

主题[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/announcement#%E4%B8%BB%E9%A2%98 "主题的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   `com_announcement_en`

返回内容[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/announcement#%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E5%86%85%E5%AE%B9 "返回内容的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   例子中由于公告内容较长，用`...`代表省略的内容。

#### 返回示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/announcement#%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "返回示例的直接链接")

    {  "type": "DATA",  "topic": "com_announcement_en",  "data": "{\"catalogId\":161,\"catalogName\":\"Delisting\",\"publishDate\":1753257631403,\"title\":\"Notice of...\",\"body\":\"This is...\",\"disclaimer\":\"Trade on-the-go...\"}"}

#### 公告内容说明[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/announcement#%E5%85%AC%E5%91%8A%E5%86%85%E5%AE%B9%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E "公告内容说明的直接链接")

*   公告具体内容包含在 `data` 字段中，去除字符串转义后，结构如下：

    {    "catalogId": 161,                     --栏目ID    "catalogName": "Delisting",           --栏目名称    "publishDate": 1753257631403,         --发布时间戳    "title": "Notice of...",              --公告标题    "body": "This is...",                 --公告内容    "disclaimer": "Trade on-the-go..."    --免责申明}

*   [主题](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/announcement#%E4%B8%BB%E9%A2%98)
    
*   [返回内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/announcement#%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E5%86%85%E5%AE%B9)

---

# Integrate Binance Pay with your App | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Binance Pay is a contactless, borderless and secure cryptocurrency payment technology designed by Binance. Binance Pay allows Binance customer to pay and get paid in crypto from your friends and family worldwide.

To begin, register your application with Binance Accounts, and get the `SDK` . For now, please contact us.

### Signature Rule (For server engineer)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#signature-rule-for-server-engineer "Signature Rule (For server engineer)的直接链接")

Binance Pay backend will check the signature against pay param, including "certSn", "merchantId", "noncestr", "prepayId" and "timeStamp".

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **certSn** | string | Y   | \-  | API identity key issued by Binance payment system |
| **merchantId** | long | Y   | \-  | The merchant account id, issued when merchant been created at Binance. |
| **noncestr** | string | Y   | must be 32 digits | A random string with 32 bytes, e.g. random ascii decimal within a-z and A-Z and loop 32 times to form a random string |
| **prepayId** | string | Y   | \-  | unique id generated by binance |
| **timeStamp** | long | Y   | Binance pay only process request within 1s | UnixTimestamp in millis that the requests send, guarantee the machine time is sync with the network |

Signature generation logic is as below, please follow the parameters order. Use "=" connect field and value, use "&" to separate fields.

    String payload = "certSn=317c110ebf7baf641e8f49ab6851331737dbe98541947c53b9dbba27f8c8414f" + "&" + "merchantId=98765987" + "&" + "noncestr=5K8264ILTKCH16CQ2502SI8ZNMTM67VS" + "&" + "prepayId=98765987" + "&"+ "timeStamp=1618302830073";String signature = hex(hmac("sha512", payload, secretKey)).toUpperCase();

### Integrate SDK for Android[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#integrate-sdk-for-android "Integrate SDK for Android的直接链接")

#### Requirements[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#requirements "Requirements的直接链接")

*   Android 4.1+
*   Support AndroidX

#### Import SDK[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#import-sdk "Import SDK的直接链接")

1.  Download [binance\_pay\_sdk\_v1.0.0.aar](https://ftp.binance.com/sdk/binance-pay/binance_pay_sdk_v1.1.0.aar)
    
2.  Add `binance_pay_sdk_v1.0.0.aar` into libs directory
3.  Add dependence for app module, just like this:
    
        android{    repositories {        flatDir {            dirs 'libs'        }    }}dependencies {    implementation fileTree(include: ['*.jar'], dir: 'libs')    implementation (name: 'binance_pay_sdk_v1.0.0', ext: 'aar')
    
4.  Sync project

#### Usage[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#usage "Usage的直接链接")

##### 1\. Create `BinancePayListener`[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#1-create-binancepaylistener "1-create-binancepaylistener的直接链接")

    class PayListener : BinancePayListener {   override fun onSuccess() {       // When the payment is successful, this will be called       }   override fun onCancel() {       // When the payment is canceled, this will be called     }   override fun onError(exception: BinancePayException) {       // When there is an error in the payment process，this will be called     }}val listener = PayListener()

##### 2\. To Pay[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#2-to-pay "2. To Pay的直接链接")

**2.1 Crypto payments(C2B)**

    val param = BinancePayParam(merchantId, prepayId, timeStamp, nonceStr, certSn, sign)val binancePay = BinancePayFactory.getBinancePay(context)binancePay.pay(param, listener)

**2.2 Transfer or send cryptos(C2C)**

    val binancePay = BinancePayFactory.getBinancePay(context)binancePay.pay(orderId, type, listener)

> Error Types：  
> Maybe you will encounter several situations：

*   UnInstall Error：This means that you have not installed the Binance app, and then a pop-up window will be displayed to guide you to download
*   UnSupported Error：This means that your Binance app version is too low, and then a pop-up window will be displayed to guide you to get the latest Binance app
*   Other Error：Will be called back to you via BinancePayListener

### Integrate SDK for iOS[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#integrate-sdk-for-ios "Integrate SDK for iOS的直接链接")

#### Requirements[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#requirements-1 "Requirements的直接链接")

*   iOS 10+
*   Swift 5.1+

#### Installation[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#installation "Installation的直接链接")

##### Munual[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#munual "Munual的直接链接")

1.  Download [BinancePaySDK.xcframework](https://ftp.binance.com/sdk/binance-pay/BinancePaySDK.xcframework.zip)
    
2.  Add `BinancePaySDK.xcframework` into `Frameworks, Libraries and Embeded Content` of your target
3.  Embed Type should be `Embed & Sign`

#### Usage[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#usage-1 "Usage的直接链接")

##### Pay[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#pay "Pay的直接链接")

1.  Create `Request Parameters`:

    // Crypto payments(C2B) parameterspublic struct OrderInitParameters {    let merchantId: String    let prepayId: String    let timestamp: Int64    let noncestr: String    let certSn: String    let sign: String    let redirectScheme: String}// Transfer or send cryptos(C2C) parameterspublic struct C2CInitParameters {    let id: String    let type: String    let redirectScheme: String}

2.  Call api:

    BinancePay.shared.pay(with: parameters, containerView: self.view) { (result) in   switch result {   case .success:    print("success")   case .failure(let error):    print("failure \(error)")   }}

> BinancePaySDK will show up an alert if user doesn't install Binance app on his/her device. The alert will show on the `containerView`.

3.  Error Types: Here are the errors you may get from `BinancePaySDK`:

    public enum PayError: Error {    case invalidParameters(OrderInitParametersError)    case binanceAppNotInstalled    case binanceAppNotSupported    case openAppFailed    case fromBinanceApp(code: Int, message: String)}public enum OrderInitParametersError: Error {    case invalidMerchantId    case invalidPrepayId    case invalidTimestamp    case invalidNonceStr    case invalidCertSn    case invalidSign    case invalidRedirectScheme}

#### Language[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#language "Language的直接链接")

    public enum languageMode {    case automatic                  // SDK automatically use the same language as iOS system    case manual(Language: Language) // You can specify the language}BinancePay.shared.languageMode = .automatic

#### FAQ[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#faq "FAQ的直接链接")

##### Unable to trigger the Binance App[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#unable-to-trigger-the-binance-app "Unable to trigger the Binance App的直接链接")

Include Binance Pay in the plist file to trigger Binance app

    <key>LSApplicationQueriesSchemes</key><array><string>com.binance.app.binance</string><string>com.binance.pay.support</string></array>

##### Unable to redirect from Binance App back to your App[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#unable-to-redirect-from-binance-app-back-to-your-app "Unable to redirect from Binance App back to your App的直接链接")

1.  Add your url scheme in Info Url Types
2.  Set this url-scheme as redirectScheme when using BinancePaySDK ![img](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/assets/images/ios_integration_FAQ_1-41a21d924b5a27def05d5eff67c1c8c4.png)

##### Did not receive callback[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#did-not-receive-callback "Did not receive callback的直接链接")

Under AppDelegate: include the BinancePay.shared.handle function to receive callback.

        func application(_ app: UIApplication, open url: URL, options:        [UIApplication.OpenURLOptionsKey : Any[ = [:]) -> Bool {        BinancePay.shared.handle(openURL: url)        }\
\
*   [Signature Rule (For server engineer)](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#signature-rule-for-server-engineer)\
    \
*   [Integrate SDK for Android](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#integrate-sdk-for-android)\
    \
*   [Integrate SDK for iOS](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/app-integration#integrate-sdk-for-ios)

# Introduction | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/introduction#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

Build with Binance Connect Prime
================================

Binance Connect Prime is a turnkey solution that enables banks, fintechs, and platforms to offer crypto services directly inside their own apps — without building complex infrastructure from scratch.

What It Does:

1.  Lets your customers buy and sell crypto seamlessly within your app.
2.  Provides real-time quotes, execution, balances, and transaction history through a simple API integration.
3.  Handles the liquidity, order execution, and crypto infrastructure on Binance’s side, while you keep control over your fiat operations and customer relationship.

---

# 快速开始 | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/quick-start#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

快速开始
====

API Key 权限设置[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/quick-start#api-key-%E6%9D%83%E9%99%90%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE "API Key 权限设置的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   新创建的API的默认权限是 `只读`。
*   如果需要通过API提款, 需要在UI修改权限, 选中 `允许提现`。

账户[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/quick-start#%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7 "账户的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 现货账户[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/quick-start#%E7%8E%B0%E8%B4%A7%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7 "现货账户的直接链接")

新注册的币安账号都会有一个现货(`SPOT`)账号。

### 杠杆账户[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/quick-start#%E6%9D%A0%E6%9D%86%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7 "杠杆账户的直接链接")

为了开设杠杆(`MARGIN`)账户, 可以参考[Binance杠杆交易账户设置指南](https://www.binance.vision/zh/tutorials/binance-margin-trading-guide)

API 代码库[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/quick-start#api-%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%E5%BA%93 "API 代码库的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Connectors[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/quick-start#connectors "Connectors的直接链接")

以下有一些轻量级的代码库，使不同语言的用户能够直接调用现货的 Binance 公共 API：

*   Python [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-python](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-python)
    
*   JavaScript [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-js](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-js)
    
*   Ruby [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-ruby](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-ruby)
    
*   DotNET C# [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-dotnet](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-dotnet)
    
*   Java [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-java](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-java)
    
*   Rust [https://github.com/binance/binance-spot-connector-rust](https://github.com/binance/binance-spot-connector-rust)
    
*   PHP [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-php](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-php)
    
*   Go [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-go](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-go)
    

### Postman Collections[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/quick-start#postman-collections "Postman Collections的直接链接")

Postman 集合现已推出。推荐给寻求快速和轻松地开始使用 API 的新用户。

[https://github.com/binance/binance-api-postman](https://github.com/binance/binance-api-postman)

### Swagger[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/quick-start#swagger "Swagger的直接链接")

以下有提供包含 RESTful API 的 OpenAPI 规范的 YAML 文件，以及可供参考的 Swagger UI 页面。

[https://github.com/binance/binance-api-swagger](https://github.com/binance/binance-api-swagger)

*   [API Key 权限设置](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/quick-start#api-key-%E6%9D%83%E9%99%90%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE)
    
*   [账户](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/quick-start#%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7)
    *   [现货账户](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/quick-start#%E7%8E%B0%E8%B4%A7%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7)
        
    *   [杠杆账户](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/quick-start#%E6%9D%A0%E6%9D%86%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7)
        
*   [API 代码库](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/quick-start#api-%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%E5%BA%93)
    *   [Connectors](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/quick-start#connectors)
        
    *   [Postman Collections](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/quick-start#postman-collections)
        
    *   [Swagger](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/quick-start#swagger)

更新日志
====

2025-12-26[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c#2025-12-26 "2025-12-26的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 时效性通知[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c#%E6%97%B6%E6%95%88%E6%80%A7%E9%80%9A%E7%9F%A5 "时效性通知的直接链接")

*   **以下有关于REST API变更将在 2026-01-15 07:OO UTC 发生:**  
    调用需要签名的接口时，请在计算签名之前对 payload 进行百分比编码（percent-encode）。不符合此顺序的请求将被拒绝，并返回错误代码 [`-1022 签名不正确`](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/error-code#-1022-invalid_signature)
    。请检查并相应地更新您代码中的签名逻辑部分。

### REST API[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c#rest-api "REST API的直接链接")

*   更新了 REST API 文档中有关于 [签名请求示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/general-info#post-apiv3order-%E7%9A%84%E7%AD%BE%E5%90%8D%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)
     的部分。

* * *

2021-08-05[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c#2021-08-05 "2021-08-05的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   新增C2C接口:
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/c2c/orderMatch/listUserOrderHistory` 以查询用户C2C交易历史记录

# Change Log | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/change-log#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Change Log
==========

### Mar 27, 2026[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/change-log#mar-27-2026 "Mar 27, 2026的直接链接")

*   Added new API endpoint `Get Symbol Detail` for retrieving cryptocurrency details (market cap, volume, rank, circulating supply, etc.).
*   Added new API endpoint `Get Kline Data` for retrieving K-line/candlestick data with support for 3m, 1h, 1d intervals.
*   Added new API endpoint `Get Discover Price` for retrieving cryptocurrency quotation prices and 24-hour changes.

### Nov 07, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/change-log#nov-07-2025 "Nov 07, 2025的直接链接")

*   Updated typical buy/sell sequence diagrams and flow descriptions.
*   Added new merchant side API requirements.
*   Added curl examples for all APIs.

### Nov 03, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/change-log#nov-03-2025 "Nov 03, 2025的直接链接")

*   Updated the get-fiat-crypto-limits API to include new fields for more accurate limits.

### Oct 20, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/change-log#oct-20-2025 "Oct 20, 2025的直接链接")

*   Added new field `webhookEventType` in the webhook payload.

### Oct 15, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/change-log#oct-15-2025 "Oct 15, 2025的直接链接")

*   Support 1024-bits RSA keys for enhanced security.

### Sep 30, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/change-log#sep-30-2025 "Sep 30, 2025的直接链接")

*   Added new API endpoint for getting fiat and crypto amount limits.
*   Updated typical buy/sell sequence diagrams and flow descriptions.
*   Removed fiat/crypto amount limit details from get-trading-pair API.

### Sep 22, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/change-log#sep-22-2025 "Sep 22, 2025的直接链接")

*   Added typical buy/sell sequence diagrams and flow descriptions.
*   Update the get-quote API to replace the request field `spreadLevel` with `customSpread`.

### Sep 05, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/change-log#sep-05-2025 "Sep 05, 2025的直接链接")

*   Initial release of Connect Prime with core features and functionalities.

*   [Mar 27, 2026](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/change-log#mar-27-2026)
    
*   [Nov 07, 2025](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/change-log#nov-07-2025)
    
*   [Nov 03, 2025](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/change-log#nov-03-2025)
    
*   [Oct 20, 2025](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/change-log#oct-20-2025)
    
*   [Oct 15, 2025](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/change-log#oct-15-2025)

# Get Flexible Loan LTV Adjustment History (USER_DATA) | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-LTV-Adjustment-History#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

查询活期借币质押率调整历史
=============

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-LTV-Adjustment-History#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

查询活期借币质押率调整历史

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-LTV-Adjustment-History#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v2/loan/flexible/ltv/adjustment/history`

GET `/sapi/v1/loan/flexible/ltv/adjustment/history` 可用于查看2024-02-27 08:00之前的数据

请求权重(UID)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-LTV-Adjustment-History#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Duid "请求权重(UID)的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**400**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-LTV-Adjustment-History#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必须 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| loanCoin | STRING | NO  |     |
| collateralCoin | STRING | NO  |     |
| startTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| endTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| current | LONG | NO  | Current querying page. Start from 1; default: 1; max: 1000 |
| limit | LONG | NO  | Default: 10; max: 100 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

> *   如果没有发送 startTime 和 endTime，默认返回最近 90 天的数据。
> *   startTime 和 endTime 的最大间隔为 180 天。

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-LTV-Adjustment-History#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {  "rows": [    {    "loanCoin": "BUSD",    "collateralCoin": "BNB",    "direction": "ADDITIONAL",    "collateralAmount": "5.235",    "preLTV": "0.78",    "afterLTV": "0.56",    "adjustTime": 1575018510000     }  ],  "total": 1}

*   [接口描述](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-LTV-Adjustment-History#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0)
    
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-LTV-Adjustment-History#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)
    
*   [请求权重(UID)](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-LTV-Adjustment-History#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Duid)
    
*   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-LTV-Adjustment-History#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)
    
*   [响应示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-LTV-Adjustment-History#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)
