# Execute Quote | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-execute-quote#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

API used to execute convert quote.

\*This API is only available for whitelisted merchants. If you need any help, you can contact us: [merchant@binance.com](mailto:merchant@binance.com)

EndPoint[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-execute-quote#endpoint "EndPoint的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    POST /binancepay/openapi/otc-portal/execute-quote

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-execute-quote#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **quoteId** | string | Y   |     | Quote ID for execute quote |

### Sample Request Body[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-execute-quote#sample-request-body "Sample Request Body的直接链接")

    {    "quoteId": "e53bb5ea9a384277b4ed971235816a9f"}

Response Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-execute-quote#response-parameters "Response Parameters的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **status** | string | Y   | "SUCCESS" or "FAIL" | status of the API request |
| **code** | string | Y   | \-  | request result code, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-execute-quote#result-code) |
| **data** | AcceptQuoteResp | N   | \-  | response body, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-execute-quote#accept-quote-response) |
| **errorMessage** | string | N   | maximum length 256 |     |

Child Attribute[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-execute-quote#child-attribute "Child Attribute的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### AcceptQuoteResp[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-execute-quote#acceptquoteresp "AcceptQuoteResp的直接链接")

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **orderId** | string | Y   |     | Order ID of the executed convert order. |
| **createTime** | decimal | Y   |     | Timestamp order created |
| **orderStatus** | string | Y   | SUCCESS/FAIL/PROCESS | Order status |
| **quotePrice** | decimal | Y   |     | From:To quote price |
| **inversePrice** | decimal | Y   |     | To:From quote price |
| **fromCoin** | string | Y   |     | From Asset |
| **fromCoinAmount** | decimal | Y   |     | Amount debited |
| **toCoin** | string | Y   |     | To Asset |
| **toCoinAmount** | decimal | Y   |     | Amount credited |

### Sample Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-execute-quote#sample-response "Sample Response的直接链接")

    {  "status": "SUCCESS",  "code": "000000",  "data": {    "orderId": "1309477640981204290",    "createTime": 1667179261865,    "orderStatus": "PROCESS",    "quotePrice": 0.00445577,    "inversePrice": 224.428,    "fromCoin": "USDT",    "fromCoinAmount": 179.54201695,    "toCoin": "BNB",    "toCoinAmount": 0.8  }}

    {  "status": "FAIL",  "code": "345231",  "errorMessage": "System failed to execute the quote, which has expired. Please request for quote again."}

Result Code[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-execute-quote#result-code "Result Code的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Name** | **Code** | **Reason** | **Solution** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| TIME\_OUT | 345231 | System failed to execute the quote, which has expired. Please request for quote again |     |
| UNKNOWN\_ERROR | 400000 | An unknown error occurred while processing the request. | Try again later |
| INVALID\_REQUEST | 400001 | Parameter format is wrong or parameter transferring doesn't follow the rules. | Please check whether the parameters are correct. |
| INVALID\_SIGNATURE | 400002 | Incorrect signature result | Check whether the signature parameter and method comply with signature algorithm requirements. |
| INVALID\_TIMESTAMP | 400003 | Timestamp for this request is outside of the time window. | Sync server clock |
| INVALID\_API\_KEY\_OR\_IP | 400004 | API identity key not found or invalid. | Check API identity key |
| BAD\_API\_KEY\_FMT | 400005 | API identity key format invalid. | Check API identity key. |
| BAD\_HTTP\_METHOD | 400006 | Request method not supported. | Check Request method. |
| MEDIA\_TYPE\_NOT\_SUPPORTED | 400007 | Media type not supported. | Check Request Media type. |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_BODY | 400008 | Request body is not a valid json object. | Check Request body |
| MANDATORY\_PARAM\_EMPTY\_OR\_MALFORMED | 400100 | A parameter was missing/empty/null, or malformed. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_LENGTH | 400101 | A parameter was not valid, was empty/null, or too long/short, or wrong format. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_VALUE | 400102 | A parameter was not valid, the value is out of range. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_ILLEGAL\_CHAR | 400103 | A parameter was not valid, contains illegal characters |     |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_TOO\_LARGE | 400104 | Invalid request, content length too large |     |

*   [EndPoint](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-execute-quote#endpoint)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-execute-quote#request-parameters)
    *   [Sample Request Body](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-execute-quote#sample-request-body)
        
*   [Response Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-execute-quote#response-parameters)
    
*   [Child Attribute](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-execute-quote#child-attribute)
    *   [AcceptQuoteResp](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-execute-quote#acceptquoteresp)
        
    *   [Sample Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-execute-quote#sample-response)
        
*   [Result Code](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-execute-quote#result-code)

# Get C2C Trade History | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/rest-api#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

获取C2C交易历史记录(USER\_DATA)
=======================

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/rest-api#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

获取C2C交易历史记录

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/rest-api#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/c2c/orderMatch/listUserOrderHistory`

请求权重(IP)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/rest-api#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Dip "请求权重(IP)的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**1**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/rest-api#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| tradeType | STRING | NO  | BUY, SELL |
| startTimestamp | LONG | NO  |     |
| endTimestamp | LONG | NO  |     |
| page | INT | NO  | default 1 |
| rows | INT | NO  | default 100, max 100 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

> *   若startTimestamp和endTimestamp均未发送,只返回最近30天数据。
> *   startTimestamp和endTimestamp的最大时间间隔为30天。
> *   只能查询最近 6 个月的数据。如果需要产看全部C2C订单，你可以前往 [https://c2c.binance.com/zh-CN/fiatOrder](https://c2c.binance.com/zh-CN/fiatOrder)
>     

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/rest-api#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {   "code": "000000",   "message": "success",   "data": [   {      "orderNumber":"20219644646554779648",      "advNo": "11218246497340923904",      "tradeType": "SELL",        "asset": "BUSD",       "fiat": "CNY",      "fiatSymbol": "￥",      "amount": "5000.00000000",  // Quantity (in Crypto)      "totalPrice": "33400.00000000",      "unitPrice": "6.68", // Unit Price (in Fiat)      "orderStatus": "COMPLETED",  // PENDING, TRADING, BUYER_PAYED, DISTRIBUTING, COMPLETED, IN_APPEAL, CANCELLED, CANCELLED_BY_SYSTEM      "createTime": 1619361369000,      "commission": "0",  // Transaction Fee (in Crypto)      "counterPartNickName": "阿涛❤***",      "advertisementRole": "TAKER"             }   ],   "total": 1,   "success": true}

*   [接口描述](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/rest-api#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0)
    
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/rest-api#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)
    
*   [请求权重(IP)](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/rest-api#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Dip)
    
*   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/rest-api#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)
    
*   [响应示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/rest-api#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)

# Change Log | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Change Log
==========

### Mar 27, 2026[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime#mar-27-2026 "Mar 27, 2026的直接链接")

*   Added new API endpoint `Get Symbol Detail` for retrieving cryptocurrency details (market cap, volume, rank, circulating supply, etc.).
*   Added new API endpoint `Get Kline Data` for retrieving K-line/candlestick data with support for 3m, 1h, 1d intervals.
*   Added new API endpoint `Get Discover Price` for retrieving cryptocurrency quotation prices and 24-hour changes.

### Nov 07, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime#nov-07-2025 "Nov 07, 2025的直接链接")

*   Updated typical buy/sell sequence diagrams and flow descriptions.
*   Added new merchant side API requirements.
*   Added curl examples for all APIs.

### Nov 03, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime#nov-03-2025 "Nov 03, 2025的直接链接")

*   Updated the get-fiat-crypto-limits API to include new fields for more accurate limits.

### Oct 20, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime#oct-20-2025 "Oct 20, 2025的直接链接")

*   Added new field `webhookEventType` in the webhook payload.

### Oct 15, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime#oct-15-2025 "Oct 15, 2025的直接链接")

*   Support 1024-bits RSA keys for enhanced security.

### Sep 30, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime#sep-30-2025 "Sep 30, 2025的直接链接")

*   Added new API endpoint for getting fiat and crypto amount limits.
*   Updated typical buy/sell sequence diagrams and flow descriptions.
*   Removed fiat/crypto amount limit details from get-trading-pair API.

### Sep 22, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime#sep-22-2025 "Sep 22, 2025的直接链接")

*   Added typical buy/sell sequence diagrams and flow descriptions.
*   Update the get-quote API to replace the request field `spreadLevel` with `customSpread`.

### Sep 05, 2025[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime#sep-05-2025 "Sep 05, 2025的直接链接")

*   Initial release of Connect Prime with core features and functionalities.

*   [Mar 27, 2026](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime#mar-27-2026)
    
*   [Nov 07, 2025](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime#nov-07-2025)
    
*   [Nov 03, 2025](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime#nov-03-2025)
    
*   [Oct 20, 2025](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime#oct-20-2025)
    
*   [Oct 15, 2025](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime#oct-15-2025)
    
*   [Sep 30, 2025](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime#sep-30-2025)
    
*   [Sep 22, 2025](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime#sep-22-2025)
    
*   [Sep 05, 2025](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime#sep-05-2025)

# Direct Debit/Pre Authorization Create Contract | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-create-contract#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

This API is for merchant/partner to create direct debit/ pre authorization contract for user authorization.

*   This API is only available for whitelisted merchants. You may apply for direct debit on the [merchant dashboard](https://merchant.binance.com/en/dashboard/debit-management)
     under Products > Debit Management. Alternatively, you may contact us at [merchant@binance.com](mailto:merchant@binance.com)
    , along with your Merchant ID, background and use case.

EndPoint[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-create-contract#endpoint "EndPoint的�直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    POST /binancepay/openapi/direct-debit/contract

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-create-contract#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **subMerchantId** | string | N   | maximum length 19 | The sub merchant account id, issued when sub merchant been created at Binance. |
| **merchantContractCode** | string | Y   | letter or digit, no other symbol allowed, maximum length 32 | The unique ID assigned by the merchant to identify a direct debit contract request. |
| **serviceName** | string | Y   | maximum length 32 | service name |
| **scenarioCode** | string | Y   | eg. General\_Travel, for more please [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-create-contract#scenario-code) |     |
| **singleUpperLimit** | decimal | Y   | Max Unit Range: 8 decimal places | upper limit related to scenarioCode, for more please [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-create-contract#scenario-code) |
| **currency** | string | Y   | only "USDT" or "USDC" is accepted and "USDC" for mica user, fiat not supported | Order currency also the settlement currency |
| **periodic** | boolean | Y   | true/false | this contract support periodic debit or not |
| **cycleDebitFixed** | boolean | N   | true/false | mandatory if periodic = true. true = fixed amount, false = variable amount |
| **cycleType** | string | N   | MONTH or DAY | mandatory if periodic = true. Values: MONTH or DAY |
| **cycleValue** | integer | N   | \-  | mandatory if periodic = true. Values: if cycleType=MONTH: 1~24, cycleType=DAY: interval days >7  <br>  <br>Combining with another parameter cycleType to determine the deduction period, for example, cycleType is DAY, cycleValue=30, then the deduction period is 30 days; cycleType is MONTH, cycleValue=3, then the deduction period is 3 natural months. |
| **firstDeductTime** | long | N   | \-  | mandatory if periodic = true. first deduct time, must be a future time in milli seconds. if cycleType=MONTH, the firstDeductTime is not allowed to pass the date after the 28th UTC (can pass the 28th) |
| **merchantAccountNo** | string | N   | maximum length 64 | the userID/user account in merchant side e.g. [xxx@gmail.com](mailto:xxx@gmail.com) |
| **requestExpireTime** | long | N   | \-  | If not specified, requestExpireTime will be 1 hour. maximum is 1 hour in milliseconds. |
| **contractEndTime** | long | N   | \-  | If not specified, contractEndTime will be the time after 1095 days (about 3 years). maximum is 1095 days in milliseconds. |
| **returnUrl** | string | N   | maximum length 256 | The URL to redirect to when the contract is signed successfully. **Only available to whitelisted merchant.** |
| **cancelUrl** | string | N   | maximum length 256 | The URL to redirect to when the contract signing fails. **Only available to whitelisted merchant.** ｜ |

### scenario-code[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-create-contract#scenario-code "scenario-code的直接链接")

| **Scenario Code** | **Default Upper limit** |
| --- | --- |
| General\_Ecommerce\_Platform | 50 USD equivalent |
| General\_Travel | 50 USD equivalent |
| Car\_Rental | 50 USD equivalent |
| Car\_Parking | 50 USD equivalent |
| Lease | 50 USD equivalent |
| Catering | 50 USD equivalent |
| Digital\_Media | 50 USD equivalent |
| Membership | 50 USD equivalent |
| Utility | 50 USD equivalent |
| Repayment | 50 USD equivalent |
| Investment | 50 USD equivalent |
| Ticket | 50 USD equivalent |
| Mobile\_Communication | 50 USD equivalent |
| Virtual\_Goods | 50 USD equivalent |
| Others | 50 USD equivalent |

### Sample Request Body[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-create-contract#sample-request-body "Sample Request Body的直接链接")

    {    "merchantContractCode": "c0ecfb465e454560a5d8e307bbc407c5",    "serviceName": "Tra Direct Debit",    "scenarioCode":"Membership",    "currency": "USDT",    "singleUpperLimit": "30",    "periodic": true,    "cycleDebitFixed":true,    "cycleType": "DAY",    "cycleValue": 8,    "firstDeductTime": 1677628800000,    "merchantAccountNo": "sss@gmail.com"}

Response Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-create-contract#response-parameters "Response Parameters的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **status** | string | Y   | "SUCCESS" or "FAIL" | status of the API request |
| **code** | string | Y   | \-  | request result code, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-create-contract#result-code) |
| **data** | DataObject | N   | \-  | response body, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-create-contract#data-object) |
| **errorMessage** | string | N   | maximum length 256 |     |

Child Attribute[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-create-contract#child-attribute "Child Attribute的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### DataObject[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-create-contract#dataobject "DataObject的直接链接")

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **merchantId** | Long | Y   | number | merchant Id in binance |
| **preContractId** | string | Y   | maximum length 19 | unique id generated by binance |
| **contractEndTime** | long | Y   | \-  | contract will be expired at this time |
| **requestExpireTime** | long | Y   | \-  | user can not sign contract after this time |
| **qrContent** | string | Y   | maximum length 256 | qr content info |
| **qrcodeLink** | string | Y   | maximum length 256 | qr code img link |
| **deeplink** | string | Y   | maximum length 256 | deeplink to open binance app to sign contract |

### Sample Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-create-contract#sample-response "Sample Response的直接链接")

#### applied success[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-create-contract#applied-success "applied success的直接链接")

    {    "status": "SUCCESS",    "code": "000000",    "data": {        "merchantId": 1000855410,        "preContractId": "203616506788478976",        "requestExpireTime": 1672656724308,        "contractEndTime": 1767261124308,        "qrContent": "https://app.binance.com/qr/xxx",        "qrcodeLink": "https://public.bnbstatic.com/static/payment/20230405/xxx.jpg",        "deeplink": "bnc://app.binance.com/mp/app?appId=V6tETccUyFTfoyMsGYH6aK&startPagePath=cGFnZXMvY29udHJhY3Qtc2lnbi9pbmRleA&startPageQuery=cHJlQ29udHJhY3RJZD0yMDM2MTY1MDY3ODg0Nzg5NzY="    }}

Result Code[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-create-contract#result-code "Result Code的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Name** | **Code** | **Reason** | **Solution** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| UNKNOWN\_ERROR | 400000 | An unknown error occurred while processing the request. | Try again later |
| INVALID\_REQUEST | 400001 | Parameter format is wrong or parameter transferring doesn't follow the rules. | Please check whether the parameters are correct. |
| INVALID\_SIGNATURE | 400002 | Incorrect signature result | Check whether the signature parameter and method comply with signature algorithm requirements. |
| INVALID\_TIMESTAMP | 400003 | Timestamp for this request is outside of the time window. | Sync server clock |
| INVALID\_API\_KEY\_OR\_IP | 400004 | API identity key not found or invalid. | Check API identity key |
| BAD\_API\_KEY\_FMT | 400005 | API identity key format invalid. | Check API identity key. |
| BAD\_HTTP\_METHOD | 400006 | Request method not supported. | Check Request method. |
| MEDIA\_TYPE\_NOT\_SUPPORTED | 400007 | Media type not supported. | Check Request Media type. |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_BODY | 400008 | Request body is not a valid json object. | Check Request body |
| MANDATORY\_PARAM\_EMPTY\_OR\_MALFORMED | 400100 | A parameter was missing/empty/null, or malformed. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_LENGTH | 400101 | A parameter was not valid, was empty/null, or too long/short, or wrong format. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_VALUE | 400102 | A parameter was not valid, the value is out of range. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_ILLEGAL\_CHAR | 400103 | A parameter was not valid, contains illegal characters |     |
| PAYMENT\_INVALID\_PARAM | 400702 | Invalid request parameter |     |
| MERCHANT\_ACCESS\_FORBIDDEN | 400606 | Account has no accessibility to this function |     |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_CURRENCY\_NOT\_SUPPORTED | 400105 | Invalid request, currency is not supported |     |
| PAYMENT\_DIRECT\_DEBIT\_EXCEED\_LIMIT | 406200 | The singleUpperLimit exceed direct debit limit |     |
| PAYMENT\_DIRECT\_DEBIT\_CONTRACT\_CODE\_INVALID | 406201 | merchantContractCode is invalid or duplicated |     |
| PAYMENT\_DIRECT\_DEBIT\_AMOUNT\_PRECISION\_INVALID | 406202 | The singleUpperLimit precision is not valid |     |

# List All Convert Pairs | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-get-to-selector#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

API used to list all convert pairs.

EndPoint[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-get-to-selector#endpoint "EndPoint的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    POST /binancepay/openapi/otc-portal/get-to-selector

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-get-to-selector#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **fromAsset** | string | Y   | Valid currency, must be in uppercase | Currency to query, for e.g, USDT |

### Sample Request Parameter[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-get-to-selector#sample-request-parameter "Sample Request Parameter的直接链接")

    {    "fromAsset": USDT}

Response Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-get-to-selector#response-parameters "Response Parameters的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **status** | string | Y   | "SUCCESS" or "FAIL" | status of the API request |
| **code** | string | Y   | \-  | request result code, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-get-to-selector#result-code) |
| **data** | ConvertPairResp | N   | \-  | response body, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-get-to-selector#quote-response) |
| **errorMessage** | string | N   | maximum length 256 |     |

Child Attribute[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-get-to-selector#child-attribute "Child Attribute的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### ConvertPairResp[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-get-to-selector#convertpairresp "ConvertPairResp的直接链接")

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **toList** | ConvertPairData | Y   |     | Convert data, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-get-to-selector#quote-response-data) |
| **coin** | string | Y   |     | Currency from the request parameter |

### ConvertPairData[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-get-to-selector#convertpairdata "ConvertPairData的直接链接")

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **coin** | string | Y   |     | To asset |
| **fromMin** | decimal | Y   |     | From asset minimum amount |
| **fromMax** | decimal | Y   |     | From asset maximum amount |
| **toMin** | decimal | Y   |     | To asset minimum amount |
| **toMax** | decimal | Y   |     | To asset maximum amount |
| **reverse** | boolean | Y   |     | Reverse convert available |
| **base** | boolean | Y   |     | Is base |

### Sample Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-convert-get-to-selector#sample-response "Sample Response的直接链接")

    {  "status": "SUCCESS",  "code": "000000",  "data": {    "coin": "USDT",    "toList": [      {        "coin": "BTC",        "fromMin": 2E+1,        "fromMax": 7E+5,        "toMin": 0.0008,        "toMax": 35.1,        "reverse": true,        "base": true      }    ]  }}

    {    "status": "FAIL",    "code": "400003",    "errorMessage": "Timestamp for this request is outside of the recvWindow."}

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| UNKNOWN\_ERROR | 400000 | An unknown error occurred while processing the request. | Try again later |
| INVALID\_REQUEST | 400001 | Parameter format is wrong or parameter transferring doesn't follow the rules. | Please check whether the parameters are correct. |
| INVALID\_SIGNATURE | 400002 | Incorrect signature result | Check whether the signature parameter and method comply with signature algorithm requirements. |
| INVALID\_TIMESTAMP | 400003 | Timestamp for this request is outside of the time window. | Sync server clock |
| INVALID\_API\_KEY\_OR\_IP | 400004 | API identity key not found or invalid. | Check API identity key |
| BAD\_API\_KEY\_FMT | 400005 | API identity key format invalid. | Check API identity key. |
| BAD\_HTTP\_METHOD | 400006 | Request method not supported. | Check Request method. |
| MEDIA\_TYPE\_NOT\_SUPPORTED | 400007 | Media type not supported. | Check Request Media type. |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_BODY | 400008 | Request body is not a valid json object. | Check Request body |
| MANDATORY\_PARAM\_EMPTY\_OR\_MALFORMED | 400100 | A parameter was missing/empty/null, or malformed. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_LENGTH | 400101 | A parameter was not valid, was empty/null, or too long/short, or wrong format. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_VALUE | 400102 | A parameter was not valid, the value is out of range. |     |

# Direct Debit/Pre Authorization Payment | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-apply#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

This API is used for Merchant/Partner to apply for payment (like periodic and non-periodic debit), requests will be processed asynchronously and result will be notified via webhook.

\*This API is only available for whitelisted merchants. If you need any help, you can contact us: [merchant@binance.com](mailto:merchant@binance.com)

EndPoint[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-apply#endpoint "EndPoint的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    POST /binancepay/openapi/pay/apply

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-apply#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **subMerchantId** | string | N   | maximum length 19 | The sub merchant account id, issued when sub merchant been created at Binance, The parameter subMerchantId is required when configuring show subMerchant info. |
| **merchantRequestId** | string | Y   | letter or digit, no other symbol allowed, maximum length 32 | The order id, Unique identifier for the request, idempotent result will be returned for same requestId |
| **tradeMode** | string | Y   | "DIRECT\_DEBIT" |     |
| **bizId** | Long | Y   | number | business orderId like contractId |
| **preBizId** | Long | N   | number | prerequisite orderId like pay notification orderId for periodic debit scenario |
| **amount** | decimal | Y   | Max Unit Range: 8 decimal places | Amount to be deducted, please ensure the amount do not exceed the singleUpperLimit of the contract. |
| **productType** | string | N   | maximum length 16 | product type |
| **productName** | string | Y   | maximum length 256 | product name |
| **productDetail** | string | N   | maximum length 256 | product detail |
| **webhookUrl** | string | N   | maximum length 256. Can only start with http or https. | The URL for order notification. If the webhookUrl is passed in the parameter, the webhook url configured on the merchant platform will not take effect, and the currently passed url will be called back first. |
| **orderTags** | Object | N   |     | order tags [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-apply#order-tags) |

### orderTags[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-apply#ordertags "orderTags的直接链接")

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **ifProfitSharing** | boolean | N   |     | if specified and true, order will be tagged as profitsharing. |

### Sample Request Body[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-apply#sample-request-body "Sample Request Body的直接链接")

    {    "subMerchantId": 123,    "merchantRequestId": "abcd",    "tradeMode": "DIRECT_DEBIT",    "bizId":123,    "productName": "test payment",    "amount": 6,    "webhookUrl": "https://abc.com"}

Response Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-apply#response-parameters "Response Parameters的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **status** | string | Y   | "SUCCESS" or "FAIL" | status of the API request |
| **code** | string | Y   | \-  | request result code, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-apply#result-code) |
| **data** | DataObject | N   | \-  | response body, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-apply#data-object) |
| **errorMessage** | string | N   | maximum length 256 |     |

Child Attribute[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-apply#child-attribute "Child Attribute的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### DataObject[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-apply#dataobject "DataObject的直接链接")

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **orderId** | string | Y   | maximum length 19 | unique id generated by binance |
| **prepayId** | string | Y   | maximum length 19 | prepay id, the same as returned by the create order API, tracking order status, refund, etc. |
| **merchantRequestId** | string | Y   | letter or digit, no other symbol allowed, maximum length 32 | The order id, Unique identifier for the request |
| **appliedTime** | long | Y   | \-  | transaction time in milli seconds |
| **status** | string | Y   | "SUCCESS" or "FAILED" or "INIT" or "PROCESSING" | status of the order |

### Sample Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-apply#sample-response "Sample Response的直接链接")

#### applied success[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-apply#applied-success "applied success的直接链接")

    {    "status": "SUCCESS",    "code": "000000",    "data": {        "merchantRequestId": "abcd",        "orderId": "1111",        "prepayId": "1112",        "appliedTime": 1672755315849,        "status": "INIT"    }}

Result Code[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-apply#result-code "Result Code的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Name** | **Code** | **Reason** | **Solution** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| UNKNOWN\_ERROR | 400000 | An unknown error occurred while processing the request. | Try again later |
| INVALID\_REQUEST | 400001 | Parameter format is wrong or parameter transferring doesn't follow the rules. | Please check whether the parameters are correct. |
| INVALID\_SIGNATURE | 400002 | Incorrect signature result | Check whether the signature parameter and method comply with signature algorithm requirements. |
| INVALID\_TIMESTAMP | 400003 | Timestamp for this request is outside of the time window. | Sync server clock |
| INVALID\_API\_KEY\_OR\_IP | 400004 | API identity key not found or invalid. | Check API identity key |
| BAD\_API\_KEY\_FMT | 400005 | API identity key format invalid. | Check API identity key. |
| BAD\_HTTP\_METHOD | 400006 | Request method not supported. | Check Request method. |
| MEDIA\_TYPE\_NOT\_SUPPORTED | 400007 | Media type not supported. | Check Request Media type. |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_BODY | 400008 | Request body is not a valid json object. | Check Request body |
| MANDATORY\_PARAM\_EMPTY\_OR\_MALFORMED | 400100 | A parameter was missing/empty/null, or malformed. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_LENGTH | 400101 | A parameter was not valid, was empty/null, or too long/short, or wrong format. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_VALUE | 400102 | A parameter was not valid, the value is out of range. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_ILLEGAL\_CHAR | 400103 | A parameter was not valid, contains illegal characters |     |
| MERCHANT\_TRANSFER\_MERCHANT\_TYPE\_INVALID | 406107 | Merchant type not valid not support individual merchant |     |
| MERCHANT\_TRANSFER\_MERCHANT\_TOO\_FREQUENT | 406108 | Fail rate is high, please try again later |     |

# Direct Debit Payment Notification | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-notify#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

This API is used for Merchant/Partner to notify the upcoming direct debit payment. Please do note that there will be a 24H frozen period to apply the payment. This API is not needed for non-periodic payment. For periodic payment, please call the API 2-5 days prior to inform user of the deduction.

\*This API is only available for whitelisted merchants. If you need any help, you can contact us: [merchant@binance.com](mailto:merchant@binance.com)

EndPoint[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-notify#endpoint "EndPoint的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    POST /binancepay/openapi/pay/notify

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-notify#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **subMerchantId** | string | N   | maximum length 19 | The sub merchant account id, issued when sub merchant been created at Binance, The parameter subMerchantId is required when configuring show subMerchant info. |
| **merchantRequestId** | string | Y   | letter or digit, no other symbol allowed, maximum length 32 | The order id, Unique identifier for the request, idempotent result will be returned for same requestId |
| **tradeMode** | string | Y   | "DIRECT\_DEBIT" |     |
| **bizId** | Long | Y   | number | business orderId like contractId |
| **estimatedAmount** | decimal | Y   | Max Unit Range: 8 decimal places | Amount to be deducted, please ensure the amount do not exceed the singleUpperLimit of the contract. |
| **currency** | string | Y   | only "USDT" can be accepted, fiat NOT supported. | order currency |

### Sample Request Body[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-notify#sample-request-body "Sample Request Body的直接链接")

    {    "subMerchantId": 123,    "merchantRequestId": "abcd",    "tradeMode": "DIRECT_DEBIT",    "bizId":123,    "estimatedAmount": 6,    "currency":"USDT"}

Response Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-notify#response-parameters "Response Parameters的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **status** | string | Y   | "SUCCESS" or "FAIL" | status of the API request |
| **code** | string | Y   | \-  | request result code, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-notify#result-code) |
| **data** | DataObject | N   | \-  | response body, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-notify#data-object) |
| **errorMessage** | string | N   | maximum length 256 |     |

Child Attribute[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-notify#child-attribute "Child Attribute的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### DataObject[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-notify#dataobject "DataObject的直接链接")

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **orderId** | string | Y   | maximum length 19 | unique id generated by binance |
| **merchantRequestId** | string | Y   | letter or digit, no other symbol allowed, maximum length 32 | The order id, Unique identifier for the request |
| **transactionTime** | long | Y   | \-  | transaction time in milli seconds |

### Sample Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-notify#sample-response "Sample Response的直接链接")

#### applied success[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-notify#applied-success "applied success的直接链接")

    {    "status": "SUCCESS",    "code": "000000",    "data": {        "merchantRequestId": "a0e29ab291fe6eeec5f13031b38ae284",        "orderId": "203740009645850624",        "transactionTime": 1672710635911    }}

Result Code[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-notify#result-code "Result Code的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Name** | **Code** | **Reason** | **Solution** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| UNKNOWN\_ERROR | 400000 | An unknown error occurred while processing the request. | Try again later |
| INVALID\_REQUEST | 400001 | Parameter format is wrong or parameter transferring doesn't follow the rules. | Please check whether the parameters are correct. |
| INVALID\_SIGNATURE | 400002 | Incorrect signature result | Check whether the signature parameter and method comply with signature algorithm requirements. |
| INVALID\_TIMESTAMP | 400003 | Timestamp for this request is outside of the time window. | Sync server clock |
| INVALID\_API\_KEY\_OR\_IP | 400004 | API identity key not found or invalid. | Check API identity key |
| BAD\_API\_KEY\_FMT | 400005 | API identity key format invalid. | Check API identity key. |
| BAD\_HTTP\_METHOD | 400006 | Request method not supported. | Check Request method. |
| MEDIA\_TYPE\_NOT\_SUPPORTED | 400007 | Media type not supported. | Check Request Media type. |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_BODY | 400008 | Request body is not a valid json object. | Check Request body |
| MANDATORY\_PARAM\_EMPTY\_OR\_MALFORMED | 400100 | A parameter was missing/empty/null, or malformed. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_LENGTH | 400101 | A parameter was not valid, was empty/null, or too long/short, or wrong format. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_VALUE | 400102 | A parameter was not valid, the value is out of range. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_ILLEGAL\_CHAR | 400103 | A parameter was not valid, contains illegal characters |     |
| MERCHANT\_TRANSFER\_MERCHANT\_TYPE\_INVALID | 406107 | Merchant type not valid not support individual merchant |     |
| MERCHANT\_TRANSFER\_MERCHANT\_TOO\_FREQUENT | 406108 | Fail rate is high, please try again later |     |

*   [EndPoint](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-directdebit-pay-notify#endpoint)

# Webhook | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/webhook#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Webhook
=======

Whenever a key event (currently only "order status change") occurs, Binance Connect will send a webhook message, and the partner (client) can receive this message at the webhook callback url and react accordingly, such as updating order data and frontend UI.

### Request Headers[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/webhook#request-headers "Request Headers的直接链接")

| **Field** | **Type** | **Remarks** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| X-BN-Connect-Timestamp | timestamp | timestamp |
| X-BN-Connect-Signature | string | SHA256withRSA(**requestBody** + **X-Connect-Timestamp**) |
| X-BN-Connect-For | string | Same with your client id (X-Tesla-ClientId) |

### Request Body[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/webhook#request-body "Request Body的直接链接")

| Field | Type | Remarks |
| --- | --- | --- |
| webhookEventType | string | fixed value: prime\_order\_event |
| orderId | string | Binance order ID |
| clientOrderId | string | Client side order ID |
| direction | string | BUY or SELL |
| fiatCurrency | string | Fiat currency |
| cryptoCurrency | string | Crypto currency |
| fiatAmount | decimal | Fiat amount |
| cryptoAmount | decimal | Crypto Amount |
| price | decimal | Price. 1 crypto currency = {price} fiat currency |
| status | string | FILLED/FAILED |
| createTime | timestamp | Order creation time (UTC) |
| settleTime | timestamp | Settlement time (UTC) |

### Response Body[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/webhook#response-body "Response Body的直接链接")

*   HTTP status code is 200
*   Response body is in JSON format.

| **Field** | **Type** | **Remarks** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| returnCode | string | SUCCESS or other code you wish to return to Binance Connect |
| returnMessage | string | the message you wish to return to Binance Connect |

### How signature works[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/webhook#how-signature-works "How signature works的直接链接")

The encryption/decryption and verification process of webhook is exactly the opposite/mirrored of API request process. The sender and receiver of the two are opposite, but they are both processes that signed by the sender with a private key and verified by the receiver with a public key.

For API requests, the partner (client) generates a pair of keys. The private key is kept securely and privately by the partner (client). Then the partner (client) uses the private key to sign when initiating API requests. The public key is shared to Bianance Connect, with which Binance will verify the signature of the API request to ensure that the request is indeed initiated by the partner (client).

For webhook, it's an opposite/mirrored process. Binance Connect generates a pair of keys. The private key is kept securely and privately by Binance Connect. Then Binance Connect uses the private key to sign when initiating the webhook message. The public key is shared to the partner (client), with which the partner (client) can verify the signature of the webhook message to ensure that the message is indeed initiated by Binance.

#### The webhook signature flow is as follows:[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/webhook#the-webhook-signature-flow-is-as-follows "The webhook signature flow is as follows:的直接链接")

![signature-Webhook.png](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/assets/images/signature-Webhook-prime-14434a2391af0cfa81d8ed040b1e2334.png)

### Verify signature[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/webhook#verify-signature "Verify signature的直接链接")

As mentioned above, Binance Connect initiates a webhook request to the webhook callback url provided by the partner ( client). And the partner (client) should verify the identity of the request initiator based on the public key provided by Binance Connect.

The example code below shows how to verify signature with public key:

    public static boolean verify(String srcData, PublicKey publicKey, String sign) throws Exception {    Signature signature = Signature.getInstance("SHA256withRSA");    signature.initVerify(publicKey);    signature.update(srcData.getBytes());    return signature.verify(Base64.decodeBase64(sign.getBytes()));}

### Example[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/webhook#example "Example的直接链接")

Request Body:

    {  "webhookEventType": "prime_order_event",  "orderId": "1234567890",  "clientOrderId": "myOrder001",  "direction": "BUY",  "fiatCurrency": "EUR",  "cryptoCurrency": "BTC",  "fiatAmount": 100,  "cryptoAmount": 0.00102181,  "price": 97849.27,  "status": "FILLED",  "createTime": 1692951399,  "settleTime": 1692954999}

*   [Request Headers](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/webhook#request-headers)
    
*   [Request Body](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/webhook#request-body)
    
*   [Response Body](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/webhook#response-body)
    
*   [How signature works](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/webhook#how-signature-works)
    
*   [Verify signature](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/webhook#verify-signature)
    
*   [Example](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/connect_prime/webhook#example)

---

=======================

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

获取C2C交易历史记录

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/rest-api/Get-C2C-Trade-History#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v1/c2c/orderMatch/listUserOrderHistory`

请求权重(IP)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/rest-api/Get-C2C-Trade-History#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Dip "请求权重(IP)的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**1**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/rest-api/Get-C2C-Trade-History#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| tradeType | STRING | NO  | BUY, SELL |
| startTimestamp | LONG | NO  |     |
| endTimestamp | LONG | NO  |     |
| page | INT | NO  | default 1 |
| rows | INT | NO  | default 100, max 100 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

> *   若startTimestamp和endTimestamp均未发送,只返回最近30天数据。
> *   startTimestamp和endTimestamp的最大时间间隔为30天。
> *   只能查询最近 6 个月的数据。如果需要产看全部C2C订单，你可以前往 [https://c2c.binance.com/zh-CN/fiatOrder](https://c2c.binance.com/zh-CN/fiatOrder)
>     

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/c2c/rest-api/Get-C2C-Trade-History#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Binance Web3 Wallet | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w/introduction#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Introduction[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w/introduction#introduction "Introduction的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Welcome to the Binance Web3 Wallet developer documentation. This guide helps third-party Decentralized Applications (DApps) integrate with the Binance Web3 Wallet using industry-standard protocols — no proprietary SDK required.

Binance Web3 Wallet supports standard connection methods including **WalletConnect v2** and **EIP-1193 injected provider**. If your DApp already supports WalletConnect or injected wallets, it works with Binance Web3 Wallet out of the box.

The Binance Web3 Wallet is built on the latest multi-party computation (MPC) cryptographic standard, providing unmatched security. With this technique, private keys remain secure and confidential, as each party only has access to its own key fragment.

In addition to exceptional security, the Binance Web3 Wallet offers a comprehensive suite of advanced features, including biometric authentication, WalletConnect v2 support, and SoulBound Tokens (SBT).

Features[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w/introduction#features "Features的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **WalletConnect v2 compatible** — Binance Web3 Wallet is registered on WalletConnect Cloud. Any DApp that integrates WalletConnect v2 will automatically show Binance Wallet in the wallet list.
*   **Standard injected provider** — Inside the Binance App's DApp browser, `window.binancew3w.ethereum` is available as an EIP-1193 compatible provider.
*   **Multi-chain support** — EVM, Bitcoin, Solana, Sui, Cosmos, Aptos, TON, Tron, and more.
*   **Secure and easy integration** — Support for standard functions such as connecting, signing messages, and sending transactions.
*   **Continuously evolving capabilities** — Unique features like fund transfers between the user's Binance account and Web3 wallet.

Support & Resources[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w/introduction#support--resources "Support & Resources的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you encounter any issues or have any questions, please reach out to our support team for assistance.

Support appeal: [https://forms.gle/yWGZHfqmhZfT1E5XA](https://forms.gle/yWGZHfqmhZfT1E5XA)

Provide feedback on this document: [https://forms.gle/zpBnQWCqoFMmby698](https://forms.gle/zpBnQWCqoFMmby698)

*   [Introduction](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-w3w/introduction#introduction)

# Query Balance Report | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-download-balance-report-query#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Query Balance Report API used to query the downloaded report status and get the file path of the report.

EndPoint[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-download-balance-report-query#endpoint "EndPoint的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    POST /binancepay/openapi/balance-report/query

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-download-balance-report-query#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **downloadId** | string | Y   | \-  | the data retuned at download balance report API |

### Sample Request Body[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-download-balance-report-query#sample-request-body "Sample Request Body的直接链接")

    {  "downloadId": "1232213"}

Response Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-download-balance-report-query#response-parameters "Response Parameters的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **exist** | boolean | Y   | \-  | exist or not |
| **status** | string | Y   | \-  | PROCESSING FAILED EXPIRED SUCCESS |
| **downloadUrl** | string | N   | \-  | the doanload url |

Child Attribute[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-download-balance-report-query#child-attribute "Child Attribute的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Sample Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-download-balance-report-query#sample-response "Sample Response的直接链接")

    {  "exist": true,  "downloadUrl": "",  "status": "PROCESSING"}

Result Code[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-download-balance-report-query#result-code "Result Code的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Name** | **Code** | **Reason** | **Solution** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| UNKNOWN\_ERROR | 400000 | An unknown error occurred while processing the request. | Try again later |
| INVALID\_REQUEST | 400001 | Parameter format is wrong or parameter transferring doesn't follow the rules. | Please check whether the parameters are correct. |
| INVALID\_SIGNATURE | 400002 | Incorrect signature result | Check whether the signature parameter and method comply with signature algorithm requirements. |
| INVALID\_TIMESTAMP | 400003 | Timestamp for this request is outside of the time window. | Sync server clock |
| INVALID\_API\_KEY\_OR\_IP | 400004 | API identity key not found or invalid. | Check API identity key |
| BAD\_API\_KEY\_FMT | 400005 | API identity key format invalid. | Check API identity key. |
| MANDATORY\_PARAM\_EMPTY\_OR\_MALFORMED | 400100 | A parameter was missing/empty/null, or malformed. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_LENGTH | 400101 | A parameter was not valid, was empty/null, or too long/short, or wrong format. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_VALUE | 400102 | A parameter was not valid, the value is out of range. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_ILLEGAL\_CHAR | 400103 | A parameter was not valid, contains illegal characters |     |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_TOO\_LARGE | 400104 | Invalid request, content length too large |     |
| INVALID\_MERCHANT\_TRADE\_NO | 400201 | merchantTradeNo is invalid or duplicated |     |
| ORDER\_NOT\_FOUND | 400202 | Order not found. |     |
| INVALID\_ACCOUNT\_STATUS | 400203 | Not support for this account, please check account status. |     |

*   [EndPoint](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-download-balance-report-query#endpoint)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-download-balance-report-query#request-parameters)
    *   [Sample Request Body](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-download-balance-report-query#sample-request-body)
        
*   [Response Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-download-balance-report-query#response-parameters)
    
*   [Child Attribute](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-download-balance-report-query#child-attribute)
    *   [Sample Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-download-balance-report-query#sample-response)
        
*   [Result Code](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-download-balance-report-query#result-code)

# Query Transfer Result | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-wallet-transfer-query#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Query Transfer Result API used for merchant/partner to query transfer result.

EndPoint[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-wallet-transfer-query#endpoint "EndPoint的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    POST /binancepay/openapi/wallet/transfer/query

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-wallet-transfer-query#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **tranId** | string | Y   | \-  | the value of requestId of provoking Transfer Fund API |

### Sample Request Body[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-wallet-transfer-query#sample-request-body "Sample Request Body的直接链接")

    {  "tranId": "100002021071407140001"}

Response Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-wallet-transfer-query#response-parameters "Response Parameters的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **status** | string | Y   | "SUCCESS" or "FAIL" | status of the API request |
| **code** | string | Y   | \-  | request result code, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-wallet-transfer-query#result-code) |
| **data** | TransferResult | N   | \-  | response body, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-wallet-transfer-query#transfer-result) |
| **errorMessage** | string | N   | maximum length 256 |     |

Child Attribute[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-wallet-transfer-query#child-attribute "Child Attribute的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### TransferResult[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-wallet-transfer-query#transferresult "TransferResult的直接链接")

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **tranId** | string | Y   | \-  | Used to query the transfer status, query the necessary fields for the transfer status |
| **status** | string | Y   | SUCCESS OR FAILURE OR PROCESS | SUCCESS (indicating that the transfer is completely successful), FAILURE (indicating that the transfer has failed, it may be that the transferor has a problem with the transferee), PROCESS (the transfer is in progress) |

### Sample Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/api-wallet-transfer-query#sample-response "Sample Response的直接链接")

    {  "status": "SUCCESS",  "code": "000000",  "data": {    "tranId": "100002021071407140001",    "status": "SUCCESS"  },  "errorMessage": ""}

| INVALID\_REQUEST | 400001 | Parameter format is wrong or parameter transferring doesn't follow the rules. | Please check whether the parameters are correct. |
| INVALID\_SIGNATURE | 400002 | Incorrect signature result | Check whether the signature parameter and method comply with signature algorithm requirements. |
| INVALID\_TIMESTAMP | 400003 | Timestamp for this request is outside of the time window. | Sync server clock |
| INVALID\_API\_KEY\_OR\_IP | 400004 | API identity key not found or invalid. | Check API identity key |
| BAD\_API\_KEY\_FMT | 400005 | API identity key format invalid. | Check API identity key. |
| BAD\_HTTP\_METHOD | 400006 | Request method not supported. | Check Request method. |
| MEDIA\_TYPE\_NOT\_SUPPORTED | 400007 | Media type not supported. | Check Request Media type. |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_BODY | 400008 | Request body is not a valid json object. | Check Request body |
| MANDATORY\_PARAM\_EMPTY\_OR\_MALFORMED | 400100 | A parameter was missing/empty/null, or malformed. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_LENGTH | 400101 | A parameter was not valid, was empty/null, or too long/short, or wrong format. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_WRONG\_VALUE | 400102 | A parameter was not valid, the value is out of range. |     |
| INVALID\_PARAM\_ILLEGAL\_CHAR | 400103 | A parameter was not valid, contains illegal characters |     |
| INVALID\_REQUEST\_TOO\_LARGE | 400104 | Invalid request, content length too large |     |
| INVALID\_ACCOUNT\_STATUS | 400203 | Not support for this account, please check account status. |     |
| TRANSFER\_TRAN\_ID\_NOT\_FOUND | 400401 | can not find the transfer |     |

# Binance Pay: Refund Order Notification | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/refund-order-notification#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Webhook Endpoints[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/refund-order-notification#webhook-endpoints "Webhook Endpoints�的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Binance Pay will send refund order events with final status only when partner use refund open api to partner for notification.

*   Successful close result for the close refund order request will be notified through this webhook bizStatus is "REFUND\_SUCCESS" or "REFUND\_REJECTED"

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/refund-order-notification#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **bizType** | string | Y   | \-  | "PAY\_REFUND" |
| **bizId** | string | Y   | maximum length 19 | prepay id ,unique id generated by binance |
| **bizIdStr** | string | Y   | \-  | biz id as string |
| **bizStatus** | string | Y   | \-  | "REFUND\_SUCCESS","REFUND\_REJECTED" |
| **data** | string | Y   | \-  | JSON string, data details [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/refund-order-notification#notification-data) |

Child Attribute[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/refund-order-notification#child-attribute "Child Attribute的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Notification Data[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/refund-order-notification#notification-data "Notification Data的直接链接")

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **merchantTradeNo** | string | Y   | letter or digit, no other symbol allowed | The order id, Unique identifier for the request |
| **productType** | string | Y   | maximum length 16 | product type |
| **productName** | string | Y   | maximum length 256 | product name |
| **tradeType** | string | Y   | "WEB", "APP", "WAP", "MINI\_PROGRAM", "PAYMENT\_LINK", "OTHERS" | operate entrance |
| **totalFee** | decimal | Y   | limitation refer to Create Order API order amount | order amount |
| **currency** | string | Y   | \-  | order currency |
| **openUserId** | string | N   | maximum length 19 | Consumer unique id |
| **refundInfo** | string | N   | only merchant got approved by Binance Operation's approval will receive this payerInfo | payer information, [refer to](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/refund-order-notification#ayerinfo-data) |

### RefundInfo Data[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/refund-order-notification#refundinfo-data "RefundInfo Data的直接链接")

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **refundRequestId** | string | Y   | maximum length 64 | The unique ID assigned by the merchant to identify a refund request. |
| **prepayId** | string | Y   | maximum length 19 | The unique ID assigned by Binance for the original order to be refunded. |
| **orderAmount** | string | Y   | limitation refer to Create Order API order amount | The total amount of prepay order. |
| **refundedAmount** | string | Y   | limitation refer to Create Order API order amount | The total refunded amount included this refund request. |
| **refundAmount** | string | Y   | limitation refer to Create Order API order amount | The refund amount of this refund request. |
| **refundedCommission** | string | Y   | \-  | The total refunded transaction fees included this refund request. |
| **refundCommission** | string | Y   | \-  | The refund transaction fees of this refund request. |
| **remainingAttempts** | int | Y   | \-  | The remaining attempts of this original order. If this value becomes 1, then your next refund request amount will be ignored. We will refund all the remaing amount of this original order. |
| **payerOpenId** | string | Y   | maximum length 32 | The payer open id of this refund which is the merchant open id. |
| **duplicateRequest** | string | Y   | \-  | The flag to mark this request refundRequestId is duplicate or not. It will be 'Y' or 'N' |

### Sample Payload[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/refund-order-notification#sample-payload "Sample Payload的直接链接")

    {  "bizType": "PAY_REFUND",  "data": "{\"merchantTradeNo\":\"6177e6ae81ce6f001b4a6233\",\"totalFee\":0.01,\"transactTime\":1635248421335,\"refundInfo\":{\"orderAmount\":\"0.01000000\",\"duplicateRequest\":\"N\",\"payerOpenId\":\"9aa0a8bb21cf5fbf049aad7db35dc3d3\",\"prepayId\":\"123289163323899904\",\"refundRequestId\":\"68711039982968853\",\"refundedAmount\":\"0.01000000\",\"remainingAttempts\":9,\"refundAmount\":\"0.01000000\"},\"currency\":\"USDT\",\"commission\":0,\"openUserId\":\"b5ec36baaa5ab9a5cfb1c29c2057bd81\",\"productType\":\"LIVE_STREAM\",\"productName\":\"LIVE_STREAM\",\"tradeType\":\"APP\"}",  "bizIdStr": "123289163323899904",  "bizId": 123289163323899904,  "bizStatus": "REFUND_SUCCESS"}

Response Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/refund-order-notification#response-parameters "Response Parameters的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **returnCode** | string | Y   | "SUCCESS" or "FAIL" | result code of notification processing, if process fail, Binance Pay will retry |
| **returnMessage** | string | N   | \-  | return message |

### Sample Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/refund-order-notification#sample-response "Sample Response的直接链接")

**After receiving a webhook with your endpoint, please respond with an HTTP 200 OK.**

    {"returnCode":"SUCCESS","returnMessage":null}

*   [Webhook Endpoints](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/refund-order-notification#webhook-endpoints)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/refund-order-notification#request-parameters)
    
*   [Child Attribute](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/refund-order-notification#child-attribute)
    *   [Notification Data](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/refund-order-notification#notification-data)
        
    *   [RefundInfo Data](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/refund-order-notification#refundinfo-data)
        
    *   [Sample Payload](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/refund-order-notification#sample-payload)
        
*   [Response Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/refund-order-notification#response-parameters)
    *   [Sample Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/refund-order-notification#sample-response)

# Batch Payout Notification | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-payout#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

Binance Pay will send the status of Payout order event to partner/merchant webhook endpoint configure on the Merchant Management Platform.

In situations where an event notification receives sending failure, the webhook will retry up to 6 times to resend the event. This is applicable to if the merchant/partner did not return HTTP 200 SUCCESS to the webhook as well.

Webhook Endpoints[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-payout#webhook-endpoints "Webhook Endpoints的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Request Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-payout#request-parameters "Request Parameters的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **bizType** | string | Y   | \-  | **PAYOUT** |
| **bizId** | long | Y   | \-  | Payout ID |
| **bizIdStr** | string | Y   | \-  | biz id as string |
| **bizStatus** | string | Y   | \-  | Same as Payout Query batchStatus |
| **data** | TransferQueryResult | Y   | \-  | JSON string |

Child Attribute[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-payout#child-attribute "Child Attribute的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### TransferQueryResult[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-payout#transferqueryresult "TransferQueryResult的直接链接")

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **requestId** | string | Y   | Maximum length 32 | The passed-in request ID |
| **batchStatus** | string | Y   | Enum string | **ACCEPTED**: accepted the request, will process it soon.  <br>**PROCESSING**: batch under processing  <br>**SUCCESS**: All payout performed successfully, user have received fund in Binance funding wallet  <br>**PART\_SUCCESS**: transfers partially succeeded.  <br>Reasons:  <br>1.Insufficient funds: there’s insufficient fund in your account  <br>2.Awaiting recipient: pending user to create Binance account and perform KYC  <br>3.Partial refund: user failed to complete KYC in 72 hours, fund will be funded to merchant account  <br>**FAILED**: all transfers failed  <br>**CANCELED**: Transfer request canceled by Binance due to unknown system errors after retry limit, will not retry further |
| **merchantId** | long | Y   |     |     |
| **currency** | string | Y   | Valid crypto currency | The request currency. |
| **totalAmount** | decimal | Y   |     | Total transfer amount in this batch. |
| **totalNumber** | int | Y   | Maximum length 1000 | Total number of transfers in the batch. |

### Sample Payload[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-payout#sample-payload "Sample Payload的直接链接")

    {  "bizType": "PAYOUT",  "data": "{\"batchStatus\":\"SUCCESS\",\"currency\":\"USDT\",\"merchantId\":100100006288,\"requestId\":\"gg8127129\",\"totalAmount\":2.00000000,\"totalNumber\":2}",  "bizIdStr": "29383937493038367292",  "bizId": 29383937493038367292,  "bizStatus": "SUCCESS"}

Response Parameters[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-payout#response-parameters "Response Parameters的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| **Attributes** | **Type** | **Required** | **Limitation** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **returnCode** | string | Y   | "SUCCESS" or "FAIL" | result code of notification processing, if process fail, Binance Pay will retry |
| **returnMessage** | string | N   | \-  | return message |

### Sample Response[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-payout#sample-response "Sample Response的直接链接")

**After receiving a webhook with your endpoint, please respond with an HTTP 200 OK.**

    {"returnCode":"SUCCESS","returnMessage":null}

*   [Webhook Endpoints](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-payout#webhook-endpoints)
    
*   [Request Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-payout#request-parameters)
    
*   [Child Attribute](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-payout#child-attribute)
    *   [TransferQueryResult](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-payout#transferqueryresult)
        
    *   [Sample Payload](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-payout#sample-payload)
        
*   [Response Parameters](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-payout#response-parameters)
    *   [Sample Response](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/binance-pay/webhook-payout#sample-response)
