请求权重(IP)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/market-data/Get-Flexible-Loan-Collateral-Assets-Data#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Dip "请求权重(IP)的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**400**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/market-data/Get-Flexible-Loan-Collateral-Assets-Data#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必须 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| collateralCoin | STRING | NO  |     |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/market-data/Get-Flexible-Loan-Collateral-Assets-Data#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {  "rows": [    {      "collateralCoin": "BNB",      "initialLTV": "0.65",      "marginCallLTV": "0.75",      "liquidationLTV": "0.83",      "maxLimit": "1000000"    }  ],  "total": 1}

*   [接口描述](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/market-data/Get-Flexible-Loan-Collateral-Assets-Data#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0)
    
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/market-data/Get-Flexible-Loan-Collateral-Assets-Data#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)

# 基本信息 | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/general-info#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

WebSocket API基本信息
=================

*   接口需要用户的 API Key，如何创建API-KEY请参考[这里](https://www.binance.com/cn/support/articles/360002502072)
    
*   Base url为：**wss://api.binance.com/sapi/wss**
*   每个到 base URL 的链接有效期不超过24小时，请妥善处理断线重连。
*   WebSocket 客户端建议每30秒主动发送 PING 消息。
    *   如果 WebSocket 服务器没有在一分钟之内收到 PING 消息，连接会被断开。
    *   对于这些 PING 消息，建议payload为空。
*   必须通过获取除签名之外的所有请求参数并按字母顺序按名称排序来生成签名payload
*   除非另有说明，否则所有时间戳均以 UTC 中的毫秒为单位。
*   除非另有说明，否则所有字段名称和值均区分大小写。

WEB SOCKET 连接限制[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/general-info#web-socket-%E8%BF%9E%E6%8E%A5%E9%99%90%E5%88%B6 "WEB SOCKET 连接限制的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   Websocket服务器每秒最多接受5个消息。消息包括:
    *   PING帧
    *   PONG帧
    *   JSON格式的消息, 比如订阅, 断开订阅.
*   如果用户发送的消息超过限制，连接会被断开连接。反复被断开连接的IP有可能被服务器屏蔽。

WebSocket API 请求方式[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/general-info#websocket-api-%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%96%B9%E5%BC%8F "WebSocket API 请求方式的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

接入地址: **wss://api.binance.com/sapi/wss?random={{random}}&topic={{topic}}&recvWindow={{recvWindow}}&timestamp={{timestamp}}&signature={{signature}}**  
其中变量{{xxx}}请替换成相应的值。

*   格式示例：
    *   `wss://api.binance.com/sapi/wss?random=56724ac693184379ae23ffe5e910063c&topic=topic1&recvWindow=30000&timestamp=1753244327210&signature=341098eff29e3ef395ed4ea85035bd7fe9e9356d2b0d4f1f97655c74516a2d65`
*   参数说明：
    *   `random`：随机数或字符串，建议长度不超过32，用于保证签名的随机性和有效性。
        *   例如：`random=56724ac693184379ae23ffe5e910063`
    *   `topic`：支持订阅一个或多个主题，多个主题用竖线 | 分隔。
        *   例如：`topic=topic1|topic2`
    *   `recvWindow`：允许的时间延迟，单位为毫秒，最大不能超过60000。
        *   例如：`recvWindow=30000`
    *   `timestamp`：当前时间戳，单位为毫秒。
        *   例如：`timestamp=1753244327210`
    *   `signature`: 当前请求的签名。

### WebSocket API 身份验证[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/general-info#websocket-api-%E8%BA%AB%E4%BB%BD%E9%AA%8C%E8%AF%81 "WebSocket API 身份验证的直接链接")

建立链接时需要用到用户的 API Key进行身份验证, 需要在wss请求头中以 `X-MBX-APIKEY`字段传递。

### 时间同步安全[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/general-info#%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4%E5%90%8C%E6%AD%A5%E5%AE%89%E5%85%A8 "时间同步安全的直接链接")

*   签名接口均需要传递 `timestamp`参数，其值应当是请求发送时刻的unix时间戳(毫秒)。
*   服务器收到请求时会判断请求中的时间戳，如果是5000毫秒之前发出的，则请求会被认为无效。这个时间空窗值可以通过发送可选参数 `recvWindow`来定义。

### 签名[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/general-info#%E7%AD%BE%E5%90%8D "签名的直接链接")

以下是在 linux bash 环境下使用 echo openssl 和 curl 工具实现的一个生成签名的示例  
apikey、secret仅供示范

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| apiKey | vmPUZE6mv9SD5VNHk4HlWFsOr6aKE2zvsw0MuIgwCIPy6utIco14y7Ju91duEh8A |
| secretKey | NhqPtmdSJYdKjVHjA7PZj4Mge3R5YNiP1e3UZjInClVN65XAbvqqM6A7H5fATj0j |

需要对接入地址的所有参数计算签名: random={{random}}&topic={{topic}}&recvWindow={{recvWindow}}&timestamp={{timestamp}}  
**示例**

> **HMAC SHA256 signature:**

        $ echo -n "random=56724ac693184379ae23ffe5e910063c&topic=topic1&recvWindow=30000&timestamp=1753244327210" | openssl dgst -sha256 -hmac "Avqz4IQjoZSJOowMFSo3QZEd4ovfwLH7Kie8ZliTtP8ktDnqcX8bpCP7WluFtrfn"    SHA2-256(stdin)= 8346d214e0da7165a0093043395f67e08c63f61b5d6e25779d513c11450e691b

实时订阅/取消订阅[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/general-info#%E5%AE%9E%E6%97%B6%E8%AE%A2%E9%98%85%E5%8F%96%E6%B6%88%E8%AE%A2%E9%98%85 "实时订阅/取消订阅的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

在连接之后, 可以继续通过websocket发送以实现订阅或取消订阅频道(支持同时操作多个频道, 以|分隔)。示例如下。

### 订阅[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/general-info#%E8%AE%A2%E9%98%85 "订阅的直接链接")

> **请求**

    {  "command": "SUBSCRIBE",  "value": "topic1"}

> **响应**

    {  "type": "COMMAND",  "data": "SUCCESS",  "subType": "SUBSCRIBE",  "code": "00000000"}

### 取消订阅[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/general-info#%E5%8F%96%E6%B6%88%E8%AE%A2%E9%98%85 "取消订阅的直接链接")

> **请求**

    {  "command": "UNSUBSCRIBE",  "value": "topic1"}

> **响应**

    {  "type": "COMMAND",  "data": "SUCCESS",  "subType": "UNSUBSCRIBE",  "code": "00000000"}

接入代码示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/general-info#%E6%8E%A5%E5%85%A5%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "接入代码示例的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

> **JS 脚本**

    const WebSocket = require('ws');const CryptoJS = require('crypto-js');const uri = 'wss://api.binance.com/sapi/wss?random=56724ac693184379ae23ffe5e910063c&topic=topic1&recvWindow=30000&timestamp=${timestamp}&signature=${signature}';const binance_api_key = "替换成您的 API Key";const binance_api_secret = "加载您的 Secret Key"; // 加载 private key。private key 建议使用强密码以提高安全性。const ts = Date.now();let paramsObject = {};const queryString = uri.substring(uri.indexOf('?') + 1);const parameters = queryString.split('&')    .filter(param => param.includes('='))    .map(param => {        const [key, value] = param.split('=');        return {key, value};    });parameters.map((param) => {    if (param.key !== 'signature' &&        param.key !== 'timestamp') {        paramsObject[param.key] = param.value;    }})Object.assign(paramsObject, {'timestamp': ts});const tmp = Object.keys(paramsObject).map((key) => {    return `${key}=${paramsObject[key]}`;}).join('&');const signature = CryptoJS.HmacSHA256(tmp, binance_api_secret).toString();Object.assign(paramsObject, {'signature': signature});const result = Object.keys(paramsObject).map((key) => {    return `${key}=${paramsObject[key]}`;}).join('&');const baseUri = uri.substring(0, uri.indexOf("?"))console.log("final uri: " + baseUri + '?' + result)const ws = new WebSocket(baseUri + '?' + result, [], {  headers: {    "X-MBX-APIKEY": binance_api_key  }});ws.on('open', function open() {    console.log('Connected to the server');});ws.on('message', function incoming(data) {    console.log(`Data from server: ${data}`);});ws.on('close', function close() {    console.log('Disconnected from server');});ws.on('error', function error(err) {    console.error(`Error: ${err.message}`);});// TODO setup your ping and reconnect logic

*   [WEB SOCKET 连接限制](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/general-info#web-socket-%E8%BF%9E%E6%8E%A5%E9%99%90%E5%88%B6)
    
*   [WebSocket API 请求方式](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/general-info#websocket-api-%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%96%B9%E5%BC%8F)
    *   [WebSocket API 身份验证](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/general-info#websocket-api-%E8%BA%AB%E4%BB%BD%E9%AA%8C%E8%AF%81)
        
    *   [时间同步安全](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/general-info#%E6%97%B6%E9%97%B4%E5%90%8C%E6%AD%A5%E5%AE%89%E5%85%A8)
        
    *   [签名](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/general-info#%E7%AD%BE%E5%90%8D)
        
*   [实时订阅/取消订阅](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/general-info#%E5%AE%9E%E6%97%B6%E8%AE%A2%E9%98%85%E5%8F%96%E6%B6%88%E8%AE%A2%E9%98%85)
    *   [订阅](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/general-info#%E8%AE%A2%E9%98%85)
        
    *   [取消订阅](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/general-info#%E5%8F%96%E6%B6%88%E8%AE%A2%E9%98%85)
        
*   [接入代码示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/cms/general-info#%E6%8E%A5%E5%85%A5%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)

# 更新日志 | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/change-log#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

更新日志
====

2025-12-26[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/change-log#2025-12-26 "2025-12-26的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 时效性通知[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/change-log#%E6%97%B6%E6%95%88%E6%80%A7%E9%80%9A%E7%9F%A5 "时效性通知的直接链接")

*   **以下有关于REST API变更将在 2026-01-15 07:OO UTC 发生:**  
    调用需要签名的接口时，请在计算签名之前对 payload 进行百分比编码（percent-encode）。不符合此顺序的请求将被拒绝，并返回错误代码 [`-1022 签名不正确`](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/error-code#-1022-invalid_signature)
    。请检查并相应地更新您代码中的签名逻辑部分。

### REST API[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/change-log#rest-api "REST API的直接链接")

*   更新了 REST API 文档中有关于 [签名请求示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/general-info#post-apiv3order-%E7%9A%84%E7%AD%BE%E5%90%8D%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)
     的部分。

* * *

2024-01-24[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/change-log#2024-01-24 "2024-01-24的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   新增闪兑接口:
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/convert/limit/placeOrder`：创建闪兑限价单
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/convert/limit/cancelOrder`：取消闪兑限价单
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/convert/limit/queryOpenOrders`：查询闪兑限价单

* * *

2022-11-22[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/change-log#2022-11-22 "2022-11-22的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   新增闪兑接口：
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/convert/exchangeInfo`: 查询可交易的币对的信息，以及它们分别所支持交易金额的上下限。
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/convert/assetInfo`: 查询每个可交易币种的精度信息。
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/convert/getQuote`: 对所需的币对发送获取报价请求。
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/convert/acceptQuote`: 通过 quote ID 来接受报价。
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/convert/orderStatus`: 通过 order ID 来查询订单状态。

* * *

2022-08-18[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/change-log#2022-08-18 "2022-08-18的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   更新闪兑接口：
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/convert/tradeFlow`: 权重自 Weight(IP) 3000 改至 Weight(UID) 3000。

* * *

2022-07-01[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/change-log#2022-07-01 "2022-07-01的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   更新闪兑接口：
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/convert/tradeFlow`：权重自 3000 改至 100。

* * *

2021-11-30[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/change-log#2021-11-30 "2021-11-30的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   新增闪兑接口:
    *   新增接口 `GET /sapi/v1/convert/tradeFlow` 以支持用户查询闪兑交易历史记录

*   [2025-12-26](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/change-log#2025-12-26)
    *   [时效性通知](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/change-log#%E6%97%B6%E6%95%88%E6%80%A7%E9%80%9A%E7%9F%A5)
        
    *   [REST API](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/change-log#rest-api)
        
*   [2024-01-24](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/change-log#2024-01-24)

# 快速开始 | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/quick-start#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

快速开始
====

API Key 权限设置[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/quick-start#api-key-%E6%9D%83%E9%99%90%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE "API Key 权限设置的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   新创建的API的默认权限是 `只读`。
*   如果需要通过API提款, 需要在UI修改权限, 选中 `允许提现`。

账户[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/quick-start#%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7 "账户的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 现货账户[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/quick-start#%E7%8E%B0%E8%B4%A7%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7 "现货账户的直接链接")

新注册的币安账号都会有一个现货(`SPOT`)账号。

### 杠杆账户[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/quick-start#%E6%9D%A0%E6%9D%86%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7 "杠杆账户的直接链接")

为了开设杠杆(`MARGIN`)账户, 可以参考[Binance杠杆交易账户设置指南](https://www.binance.vision/zh/tutorials/binance-margin-trading-guide)

API 代码库[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/quick-start#api-%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%E5%BA%93 "API 代码库的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Connectors[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/quick-start#connectors "Connectors的直接链接")

以下有一些轻量级的代码库，使不同语言的用户能够直接调用现货的 Binance 公共 API：

*   Python [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-python](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-python)
    
*   JavaScript [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-js](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-js)
    
*   Ruby [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-ruby](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-ruby)
    
*   DotNET C# [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-dotnet](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-dotnet)
    
*   Java [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-java](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-java)
    
*   Rust [https://github.com/binance/binance-spot-connector-rust](https://github.com/binance/binance-spot-connector-rust)
    
*   PHP [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-php](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-php)
    
*   Go [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-go](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-go)
    

### Postman Collections[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/quick-start#postman-collections "Postman Collections的直接链接")

Postman 集合现已推出。推荐给寻求快速和轻松地开始使用 API 的新用户。

[https://github.com/binance/binance-api-postman](https://github.com/binance/binance-api-postman)

### Swagger[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/quick-start#swagger "Swagger的直接链接")

以下有提供包含 RESTful API 的 OpenAPI 规范的 YAML 文件，以及可供参考的 Swagger UI 页面。

[https://github.com/binance/binance-api-swagger](https://github.com/binance/binance-api-swagger)

*   [API Key 权限设置](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/quick-start#api-key-%E6%9D%83%E9%99%90%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE)
    
*   [账户](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/quick-start#%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7)
    *   [现货账户](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/quick-start#%E7%8E%B0%E8%B4%A7%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7)
        
    *   [杠杆账户](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/quick-start#%E6%9D%A0%E6%9D%86%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7)
        
*   [API 代码库](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/quick-start#api-%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%E5%BA%93)
    *   [Connectors](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/quick-start#connectors)
        
    *   [Postman Collections](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/quick-start#postman-collections)
        
    *   [Swagger](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/convert/quick-start#swagger)

# Get Flexible Loan Borrow History (USER_DATA) | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Borrow-History#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

查询活期借币历史记录(USER\_DATA)
======================

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Borrow-History#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

查询活期借币历史记录

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Borrow-History#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v2/loan/flexible/borrow/history`

GET `/sapi/v1/loan/flexible/borrow/history` 可查询2024-02-27 08:00之前数据

请求权重(IP)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Borrow-History#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Dip "请求权重(IP)的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**400**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Borrow-History#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必须 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| loanCoin | STRING | NO  |     |
| collateralCoin | STRING | NO  |     |
| startTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| endTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| current | LONG | NO  | 当前查询页数，从 1 开始。默认值：1；最大：1000。 |
| limit | LONG | NO  | 默认值：10；最大：100。 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

> *   如果没有发送 startTime 和 endTime，默认返回最近 90 天的数据。
> *   startTime 和 endTime 的最大间隔为 180 天。

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Borrow-History#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {  "rows": [    {      "loanCoin": "BUSD",      "initialLoanAmount": "10000",      "collateralCoin": "BNB",      "initialCollateralAmount": "49.27565492",      "borrowTime": 1575018510000,      "status": "SUCCESS" //SUCCESS, FAILED, PENDING    }  ],  "total": 1}

*   [接口描述](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Borrow-History#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0)
    
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Borrow-History#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)
    
*   [请求权重(IP)](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Borrow-History#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Dip)
    
*   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Borrow-History#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)
    
*   [响应示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Borrow-History#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)

| endTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| current | LONG | NO  | 当前查询页面。从1开始；默认: 1；最大: 1000 |
| limit | LONG | NO  | 默认: 10；最大: 100 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

*   如果没有发送startTime和endTime，默认返回最近90天的数据。
*   startTime和endTime的最大间隔为180天。

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Liquidation-History#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {  "rows": [    {      "loanCoin": "BUSD",      "liquidationDebt": "10000",      "collateralCoin": "BNB",      "liquidationCollateralAmount": "123",      "returnCollateralAmount": "0.2",      "liquidationFee": "1.2",      "liquidationStartingPrice": "49.27565492",      "liquidationStartingTime": 1575018510000,      "status": "Liquidated" // Liquidating    }  ],  "total": 1}

liquidationStartingPrice 是指清算开始时的抵押币/借贷币汇率。最终汇率将取决于代币的流动性和市场状况。

*   [HTTP 请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Liquidation-History#http-%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)
    
*   [请求权重(IP)](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Liquidation-History#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Dip)
    
*   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Liquidation-History#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)
    
*   [响应示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Liquidation-History#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)

**请注意：该服务的所有用户均受到币安使用条款的约束。API服务不适用于含套利、高频交易或价格剥削在内的使用目的。币安可随时出于任何原因自行决定限制或终止币安API连接，且没有义务提前告知任何此类限制或终止。**

# Connect | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/user-data-streams/Connect#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

账户信息流连接
=======

*   本篇所列出REST接口的baseurl **[https://dapi.binance.com](https://dapi.binance.com/)
    **
    
*   用于订阅账户数据的 `listenKey` 从创建时刻起有效期为60分钟
    
*   可以通过`PUT`一个`listenKey`延长60分钟有效期，如收到`-1125`报错提示此`listenKey`不存在，建议重新使用`POST /dapi/v1/listenKey`生成`listenKey`
    
*   可以通过`DELETE`一个 `listenKey` 立即关闭当前数据流，并使该`listenKey` 无效
    
*   在具有有效`listenKey`的帐户上执行`POST`将返回当前有效的`listenKey`并将其有效期延长60分钟
    
*   本篇所列出的websocket接口，共有如下两种连接方式：
    
    *   连接方式一：
        
    *   Base Url: **wss://dstream.binance.com**
        
    *   订阅账户数据流的stream名称为 **/ws/\`<listenKey>\`**
        
    *   连接样例：
        
    *   `wss://dstream.binance.com/ws/XaEAKTsQSRLZAGH9tuIu37plSRsdjmlAVBoNYPUITlTAko1WI22PgmBMpI1rS8Yh`
        
    *   连接方式二：
        
    *   Base Url: **wss://dstream-auth.binance.com**
        
    *   订阅账户数据流的stream名称为 **/ws/\`<listenKey>\`?listenKey=<validateListenKey>**
        
    *   **<validateListenKey>在建立连接时，必须为一个有效的listenKey**
        
    *   连接样例：
        
    *   `wss://dstream-auth.binance.com/ws/XaEAKTsQSRLZAGH9tuIu37plSRsdjmlAVBoNYPUITlTAko1WI22PgmBMpI1rS8Yh？listenKey=XaEAKTsQSRLZAGH9tuIu37plSRsdjmlAVBoNYPUITlTAko1WI22PgmBMpI1rS8Yh`
        
*   每个链接有效期不超过24小时，请妥善处理断线重连。
    
*   单一账户，单一连接的推送数据流消息可以保证时间序; **强烈建议您使用 E 字段进行排序**
    
*   考虑到剧烈行情下, RESTful接口可能存在查询延迟，我们强烈建议您优先从Websocket user data stream推送的消息来获取订单，仓位等信息。

---

# Connect | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/websocket-market-streams/Connect#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

市场数据连接
======

*   本篇所列出的所有wss接口，共有如下两种连接方式：
    
    *   连接方式：
    *   Base Url：**wss://dstream.binance.com**
    *   订阅单一stream格式为 **/ws/<streamName>**
    *   组合streams的URL格式为 **/stream?streams=<streamName1>/<streamName2>/<streamName3>**
    *   连接样例：
    *   `wss://dstream.binance.com/ws/bnbusdt@aggTrade`
    *   `wss://dstream.binance.com/stream?streams=bnbusdt@aggTrade/btcusdt@markPrice`
*   订阅组合streams时，事件payload会以这样的格式封装 **{"stream":"<streamName>","data":<rawPayload>}**
    
*   stream名称中所有交易对均为**小写**。
    
*   每个链接有效期不超过24小时，请妥善处理断线重连。
    
*   服务端每3分钟会发送ping帧，客户端应当在10分钟内回复pong帧，否则服务端会主动断开链接。允许客户端发送不成对的pong帧(即客户端可以以高于10分钟每次的频率发送pong帧保持链接)。
    
*   Websocket服务器每秒最多接受10个订阅消息。
    
*   如果用户发送的消息超过限制，连接会被断开连接。反复被断开连接的IP有可能被服务器屏蔽。
    
*   单个连接最多可以订阅 **1024** 个Streams。

---

    {	"exchangeFilters": [], 	"rateLimits": [ // API访问的限制 		{ 			"interval": "MINUTE", // 按照分钟计算   			"intervalNum": 1, // 按照1分钟计算   			"limit": 2400, // 上限次数   			"rateLimitType": "REQUEST_WEIGHT" // 按照访问权重来计算   		},  		{  			"interval": "MINUTE",   			"intervalNum": 1,   			"limit": 1200,   			"rateLimitType": "ORDERS" // 按照订单数量来计算   		}   	], 	"serverTime": 1565613908500, // 请忽略。如果需要获取系统时间，请查询接口 “GET /dapi/v1/time” 	"symbols": [ // 交易对信息 		{ 			"filters": [ 				{ 					"filterType": "PRICE_FILTER", // 价格限制     				"maxPrice": "100000", // 价格上限, 最大价格     				"minPrice": "0.1", // 价格下限, 最小价格     				"tickSize": "0.1" // 下单最小价格间隔     			},    			{    				"filterType": "LOT_SIZE", // 数量限制     				"maxQty": "100000", // 数量上限, 最大数量     				"minQty": "1", // 数量下限, 最小数量     				"stepSize": "1" // 下单最小数量间隔     			},    			{    				"filterType": "MARKET_LOT_SIZE", // 市价订单数量限制     				"maxQty": "100000", // 数量上限, 最大数量     				"minQty": "1", // 数量下限, 最小数量     				"stepSize": "1" // 允许的步进值     			},     			{    				"filterType": "MAX_NUM_ORDERS", // 最多挂单数限制    				"limit": 200  				},  				{    				"filterType": "PERCENT_PRICE", // 价格比限制    				"multiplierUp": "1.0500", // 价格上限百分比    				"multiplierDown": "0.9500", // 价格下限百分比    				"multiplierDecimal": "4"  				}    		],   			"orderTypes": [ // 订单类型   				"LIMIT",  // 限价单   				"MARKET",  // 市价单   				"STOP", // 止损单   				"TAKE_PROFIT", // 止盈单   				"TRAILING_STOP_MARKET" // 跟踪止损单   			],   			"timeInForce": [ // 有效方式   				"GTC", // 成交为止, 一直有效   				"IOC", // 无法立即成交(吃单)的部分就撤销   				"FOK", // 无法全部立即成交就撤销   				"GTX" // 无法成为挂单方就撤销   			],   			"liquidationFee": "0.010000",	// 强平费率   			"marketTakeBound": "0.30",	// 市价吃单(相对于标记价格)允许可造成的最大价格偏离比例   			"symbol": "BTCUSD_200925", // 交易对   			"pair": "BTCUSD",	// 标的交易对   			"contractType": "CURRENT_QUARTER",   // 合约类型   			"deliveryDate": 1601020800000,   			"onboardDate": 1590739200000,   			"contractStatus": "TRADING", // 交易对状态   			"contractSize": 100,     //   			"quoteAsset": "USD", // 报价币种   			"baseAsset": "BTC",  // 标的物   			"marginAsset": "BTC",	// 保证金币种   			"pricePrecision": 1,   // 价格小数点位数(仅作为系统精度使用，注意同tickSize 区分)   			"quantityPrecision": 0, // 数量小数点位数(仅作为系统精度使用，注意同stepSize 区分)		 	"baseAssetPrecision": 8,		   	"quotePrecision": 8,		   	"equalQtyPrecision": 4,		// 请忽略		   	"triggerProtect": "0.0500",	// 开启"priceProtect"的条件订单的触发阈值		   	"maintMarginPercent": "2.5000", // 请忽略		   	"requiredMarginPercent": "5.0000", // 请忽略		   	"underlyingType": "COIN",  // 标的类型		   	"underlyingSubType": []		// 标的物子类型   		}   	],	"timezone": "UTC" // 服务器所用的时间区域}

*   [接口描述](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Exchange-Information#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0)
    
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Exchange-Information#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)
    
*   [请求权重](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Exchange-Information#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D)
    
*   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Exchange-Information#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)
    
*   [响应示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Exchange-Information#%E5%93%8D%EF%BF%BD%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)

    [	{		"symbol": "BTCUSD_PERP",	// 交易对  		"pair": "BTCUSD",			// 基础标的  		"markPrice": "11029.69574559",	// 标记价格  		"indexPrice": "10979.14437500",	// 指数价格  		"estimatedSettlePrice": "10981.74168236",  // 预估结算价,仅在交割开始前最后一小时有意义  		"lastFundingRate": "0.00071003",	  // 最近更新的资金费率,只对永续合约有效，其他合约返回""  		"interestRate": "0.00010000",		// 标的资产基础利率,只对永续合约有效，其他合约返回""  		"nextFundingTime": 1596096000000,	 // 下次资金费时间，只对永续合约有效，其他合约返回0  		"time": 1596094042000	// 更新时间  	}, 	{ 		"symbol": "BTCUSD_200925",	 		"pair": "BTCUSD",  		"markPrice": "12077.01343750",  		"indexPrice": "10979.10312500",  		"estimatedSettlePrice": "10981.74168236",  		"lastFundingRate": "",  		"interestRate": "",  		"nextFundingTime": 0,  		"time": 1596094042000  	}]

# Index Price Kline Candlestick Data | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Index-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

价格指数K线数据
========

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Index-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

查询价格指数K线

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Index-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/dapi/v1/indexPriceKlines`

每根K线的开盘时间可视为唯一ID

请求权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Index-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "请求权重的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

取决于请求中的LIMIT参数

| LIMIT参数 | 权重  |
| --- | --- |
| \[1,100) | 1   |\
| \[100, 500) | 2   |\
| \[500, 1000\] | 5   |\
\
> 1000 | 10\
\
请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Index-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")\
\
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\
\
| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |\
| --- | --- | --- | --- |\
| pair | STRING | YES | 标的交易对 |\
| interval | ENUM | YES | 时间间隔 |\
| startTime | LONG | NO  | 起始时间 |\
| endTime | LONG | NO  | 结束时间 |\
| limit | INT | NO  | 默认值:500 最大值:1500 |\
\
> *   startTime 与 endTime 之间最多只可以相差200天\
> *   默认返回 startTime 与 endTime 之间最接近 endTime的 limit 条数据:\
>     *   startTime, endTime 均未提供的, 将会使用当前时间为 endTime, 200天前为 startTime\
>     *   仅提供 startTime 的, 将会使用 startTime 之后200天作为默认 endTime (至多为当前时间)\
>     *   仅提供 endTime 的, 将会使用endTime 之前200天作为默认 startTime\
\
响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Index-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")\
\
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\
\
    [  [    1591256400000,      	// 开盘时间    "9653.69440000",    	// 开盘价    "9653.69640000",     	// 最高价    "9651.38600000",     	// 最低价    "9651.55200000",     	// 收盘价(当前K线未结束的即为最新价)    "0	", 					// 请忽略    1591256459999,      	// 收盘时间    "0",    				// 请忽略    60,                		// 构成记录数    "0",    				// 请忽略    "0",      				// 请忽略    "0" 					// 请忽略  ]]\
\
*   [接口描述](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Index-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0)\
    \
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Index-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)\
    \
*   [请求权重](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Index-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D)\
    \
*   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Index-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)\
    \
*   [响应示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Index-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)

# Kline Candlestick Data | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Kline-Candlestick-Data#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

K线数据
====

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

每根K线的开盘时间可视为唯一ID

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Kline-Candlestick-Data#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/dapi/v1/klines`

*   订阅Kline需要提供间隔参数,最短为分钟线,最长为月线。支持以下间隔:  
    m -> 分钟; h -> 小时; d -> 天; w -> 周; M -> 月
    
    *   1m
    *   3m
    *   5m
    *   15m
    *   30m
    *   1h
    *   2h
    *   4h
    *   6h
    *   8h
    *   12h
    *   1d
    *   3d
    *   1w
    *   1M

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Kline-Candlestick-Data#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82-1 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    [  [    1591258320000,    	// 开盘时间    "9640.7",       	// 开盘价    "9642.4",       	// 最高价    "9640.6",       	// 最低价    "9642.0",       	// 收盘价(当前K线未结束的即为最新价)    "206",  			// 成交量    1591258379999,   	// 收盘时间    "2.13660389",    	// 成交额(标的数量)    48,               	// 成交笔数    "119",    			// 主动买入成交量    "1.23424865",       // 主动买入成交额(标的数量)    "0" 				// 请忽略该参数  ]]

请求权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "请求权重的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

取决于请求中的LIMIT参数

| LIMIT参数 | 权重  |
| --- | --- |
| \[1,100) | 1   |\
| \[100, 500) | 2   |\
| \[500, 1000\] | 5   |\
\
> 1000 | 10\
\
请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")\
\
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\
\
| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |\
| --- | --- | --- | --- |\
| symbol | STRING | YES | 交易对 |\
| interval | ENUM | YES | 时间间隔 |\
| startTime | LONG | NO  | 起始时间 |\
| endTime | LONG | NO  | 结束时间 |\
| limit | INT | NO  | 默认值:500 最大值:1500 |\
\
> *   startTime 与 endTime 之间最多只可以相差200天\
> *   默认返回 startTime 与 endTime 之间最接近 endTime的 limit 条数据:\
>     *   startTime, endTime 均未提供的, 将会使用当前时间为 endTime, 200天前为 startTime\
>     *   仅提供 startTime 的, 将会使用 startTime 之后200天作为默认 endTime (至多为当前时间)\
>     *   仅提供 endTime 的, 将会使用endTime 之前200天作为默认 startTime\
\
*   [接口描述](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0)\
    \
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Kline-Candlestick-Data#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)\
    \
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Kline-Candlestick-Data#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82-1)\
    \
*   [请求权重](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D)\
    \
*   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)

多空持仓人数比
=======

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Long-Short-Ratio#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

多空持仓人数比

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Long-Short-Ratio#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/futures/data/globalLongShortAccountRatio`

请求权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Long-Short-Ratio#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "请求权重的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**1**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Long-Short-Ratio#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| pair | STRING | YES | BTCUSD |
| period | ENUM | YES | "5m","15m","30m","1h","2h","4h","6h","12h","1d" |
| limit | LONG | NO  | Default 30,Max 500 |
| startTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| endTime | LONG | NO  |     |

> *   若无 startime 和 endtime 限制， 则默认返回当前时间往前的limit值
> *   仅支持最近30天的数据

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Long-Short-Ratio#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

*   [请求权重](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Long-Short-Ratio#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D)

*   [响应示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Long-Short-Ratio#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)

# Mark Price Kline Candlestick Data | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Mark-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

标记价格K线数据
========

每根K线的开盘时间可视为唯一ID

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Mark-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/dapi/v1/markPriceKlines`

请求权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Mark-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "请求权重的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

取决于请求中的LIMIT参数

| LIMIT参数 | 权重  |
| --- | --- |
| \[1,100) | 1   |\
| \[100, 500) | 2   |\
| \[500, 1000\] | 5   |\
\
> 1000 | 10\
\
请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Mark-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")\
\
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\
\
| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |\
| --- | --- | --- | --- |\
| symbol | STRING | YES | 交易对 |\
| interval | ENUM | YES | 时间间隔 |\
| startTime | LONG | NO  | 起始时间 |\
| endTime | LONG | NO  | 结束时间 |\
| limit | INT | NO  | 默认值:500 最大值:1500 |\
\
> *   startTime 与 endTime 之间最多只可以相差200天\
> *   默认返回 startTime 与 endTime 之间最接近 endTime的 limit 条数据:\
>     *   startTime, endTime 均未提供的, 将会使用当前时间为 endTime, 200天前为 startTime\
>     *   仅提供 startTime 的, 将会使用 startTime 之后200天作为默认 endTime (至多为当前时间)\
>     *   仅提供 endTime 的, 将会使用endTime 之前200天作为默认 startTime\
\
响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Mark-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")\
\
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\
\
    [  [    1591256400000,      	// 开盘时间    "9653.69440000",    	// 开盘价    "9653.69640000",     	// 最高价    "9651.38600000",     	// 最低价    "9651.55200000",     	// 收盘价(当前K线未结束的即为最新价)    "0	", 					// 请忽略    1591256459999,      	// 收盘时间    "0",    				// 请忽略    60,                		// 构成记录数    "0",    				// 请忽略    "0",      				// 请忽略    "0" 					// 请忽略  ]]\
\
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Mark-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)\
    \
*   [请求权重](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Mark-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D)\
    \
*   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Mark-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)\
    \
*   [响应示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Mark-Price-Kline-Candlestick-Data#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)

=====================

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Old-Trades-Lookup#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

查询订单簿历史成交

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Old-Trades-Lookup#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/dapi/v1/historicalTrades`

请求权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Old-Trades-Lookup#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "请求权重的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**20**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Old-Trades-Lookup#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| symbol | STRING | YES | 交易对 |
| limit | INT | NO  | 默认值:100 最大值:500. |
| fromId | LONG | NO  | 从哪一条成交id开始返回. 缺省返回最近的成交记录 |

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

合约持仓量

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Open-Interest-Statistics#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/futures/data/openInterestHist`

请求权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Open-Interest-Statistics#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "请求权重的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**1**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Open-Interest-Statistics#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| pair | STRING | YES | BTCUSD |
| contractType | ENUM | YES | ALL, CURRENT\_QUARTER, NEXT\_QUARTER, PERPETUAL |
| period | ENUM | YES | "5m","15m","30m","1h","2h","4h","6h","12h","1d" |
| limit | LONG | NO  | Default 30,Max 500 |
| startTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| endTime | LONG | NO  |     |

> *   若无 startime 和 endtime 限制， 则默认返回当前时间往前的limit值
> *   仅支持最近30天的数据

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Open-Interest-Statistics#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

| LIMIT参数 | 权重  |
| --- | --- |

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Premium-Index-Kline-Data#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")\

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------\

> *   缺省返回最近的数据\
\
响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Premium-Index-Kline-Data#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")\
\

\

# Symbol Order Book Ticker | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Symbol-Order-Book-Ticker#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

当前最优挂单
======

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Symbol-Order-Book-Ticker#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

返回当前最优的挂单(最高买单,最低卖单)

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Symbol-Order-Book-Ticker#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/dapi/v1/ticker/bookTicker`

请求权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Symbol-Order-Book-Ticker#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "请求权重的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

单交易对**2**，无交易对**5**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Symbol-Order-Book-Ticker#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| symbol | STRING | NO  | 交易对 |
| pair | STRING | NO  | 标的交易对 |

> *   symbol 和 pair 不接受同时发送
> *   发送 pair的,返回pair对应所有正在交易的symbol数据
> *   symbol,pair 都没有发送的,返回所有symbol数据

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Symbol-Order-Book-Ticker#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   [接口描述](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Symbol-Order-Book-Ticker#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0)
    
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Symbol-Order-Book-Ticker#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)
    
*   [请求权重](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Symbol-Order-Book-Ticker#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D)

# Top Trader Long Short Account Ratio | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Top-Long-Short-Account-Ratio#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

大户账户数多空比
========

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Top-Long-Short-Account-Ratio#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

持仓大户的净持仓多头和空头账户数占比，大户指保证金余额排名前20%的用户。一个账户记一次。 多仓账户数比例 = 持多仓大户数 / 总持仓大户数 空仓账户数比例 = 持空仓大户数 / 总持仓大户数 多空账户数比值 = 多仓账户数比例 / 空仓账户数比例

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Top-Long-Short-Account-Ratio#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/futures/data/topLongShortAccountRatio`

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Top-Long-Short-Account-Ratio#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| symbol | STRING | YES |     |
| period | ENUM | YES | "5m","15m","30m","1h","2h","4h","6h","12h","1d" |
| limit | LONG | NO  | default 30, max 500 |
| startTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| endTime | LONG | NO  |     |

> *   若无 startime 和 endtime 限制， 则默认返回当前时间往前的limit值
> *   仅支持最近30天的数据

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Top-Long-Short-Account-Ratio#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    [     {	  "pair": "BTCUSD",	  "longShortRatio": "1.8105",	  "longAccount": "0.6442",  //64.42%	  "shortAccount": "0.3558",  //35.58%	  "timestamp": 1591261042378   },   {     "pair": "BTCUSD",	  "longShortRatio": "1.1110",	  "longAccount": "0.5263",  	  "shortAccount": "0.4737",  	  "timestamp": 1592870400000   }]

*   [接口描述](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Top-Long-Short-Account-Ratio#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0)
    
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Top-Long-Short-Account-Ratio#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)
    
*   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Top-Long-Short-Account-Ratio#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)
    
*   [响应示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/coin-margined-futures/market-data/rest-api/Top-Long-Short-Account-Ratio#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)

# Flexible Loan Repay (TRADE) | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/trade/Flexible-Loan-Repay#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

活期借币还款(TRADE)
=============

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/trade/Flexible-Loan-Repay#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

活期借币还款

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/trade/Flexible-Loan-Repay#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POST `/sapi/v2/loan/flexible/repay`

请求权重(UID)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/trade/Flexible-Loan-Repay#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Duid "请求权重(UID)的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**6000**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/trade/Flexible-Loan-Repay#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必须 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| loanCoin | STRING | YES |     |
| collateralCoin | STRING | YES |     |
| repayAmount | DECIMAL | YES |     |
| collateralReturn | BOOLEAN | NO  | 默认: TRUE. TRUE: 多余的抵押金退回现货钱包；FALSE: 多余的抵押金保留在原订单里，降低 LTV |
| fullRepayment | BOOLEAN | NO  | 默认: FALSE. TRUE: 全部偿还; FALSE: 按照 loanAmount 金额部分偿还 |
| repaymentType | INT | NO  | 默认: 1. 1: 借贷资产还款; 2: 抵押物还款 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

> *   repayAmount 是必填项，即便 fullRepayment = FALSE

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/trade/Flexible-Loan-Repay#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {  "loanCoin": "BUSD",  "collateralCoin": "BNB",  "remainingDebt": "100.5",  "remainingCollateral": "5.253",  "fullRepayment": false,  "currentLTV": "0.25",  "repayStatus": "REPAID" // REPAID, REPAYING, FAILED}

*   [接口描述](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/trade/Flexible-Loan-Repay#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0)
    
*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/trade/Flexible-Loan-Repay#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)
    
*   [请求权重(UID)](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/trade/Flexible-Loan-Repay#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Duid)
    
*   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/trade/Flexible-Loan-Repay#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)
    
*   [响应示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/trade/Flexible-Loan-Repay#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)

查询活期借币还款记录历史(USER\_DATA)
========================

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Repayment-History#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

查询活期借币还款记录历史

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Repayment-History#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

GET `/sapi/v2/loan/flexible/repay/history`

GET `/sapi/v1/loan/flexible/repay/history` 可查询2024-02-27 08:00之前数据

请求权重(IP)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Repayment-History#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Dip "请求权重(IP)的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**400**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Repayment-History#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必须 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| loanCoin | STRING | NO  |     |
| collateralCoin | STRING | NO  |     |
| startTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| endTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| current | LONG | NO  | 当前查询页数，从 1 开始。默认值：1；最大：1000。 |
| limit | LONG | NO  | 默认值：10；最大：100。 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

> *   如果没有发送 startTime 和 endTime，默认返回最近 90 天的数据。
> *   startTime 和 endTime 的最大间隔为 180 天。

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/flexible-rate/user-information/Get-Flexible-Loan-Repayment-History#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

**20**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/future-copy-trading/Get-Futures-Lead-Trader-Status#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/future-copy-trading/Get-Futures-Lead-Trader-Status#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

    {  "code": "000000",  "message": "success",  "data": {     "isLeadTrader": true,     "time": 1717382310843   },  "success": true}

*   [HTTP请求](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/future-copy-trading/Get-Futures-Lead-Trader-Status#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82)
    
*   [请求权重(UID)](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/future-copy-trading/Get-Futures-Lead-Trader-Status#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Duid)
    
*   [请求参数](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/future-copy-trading/Get-Futures-Lead-Trader-Status#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0)

# 快速开始 | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/quick-start#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

快速开始
====

API Key 权限设置[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/quick-start#api-key-%E6%9D%83%E9%99%90%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE "API Key 权限设置的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   新创建的API的默认权限是 `只读`。
*   如果需要通过API提款, 需要在UI修改权限, 选中 `允许提现`。

账户[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/quick-start#%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7 "账户的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 现货账户[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/quick-start#%E7%8E%B0%E8%B4%A7%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7 "现货账户的直接链接")

新注册的币安账号都会有一个现货(`SPOT`)账号。

### 杠杆账户[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/quick-start#%E6%9D%A0%E6%9D%86%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7 "杠杆账户的直接链接")

为了开设杠杆(`MARGIN`)账户, 可以参考[Binance杠杆交易账户设置指南](https://www.binance.vision/zh/tutorials/binance-margin-trading-guide)

API 代码库[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/quick-start#api-%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%E5%BA%93 "API 代码库的直接链接")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Connectors[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/quick-start#connectors "Connectors的直接链接")

以下有一些轻量级的代码库，使不同语言的用户能够直接调用现货的 Binance 公共 API：

*   Python [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-python](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-python)
    
*   JavaScript [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-js](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-js)
    
*   Ruby [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-ruby](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-ruby)
    
*   DotNET C# [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-dotnet](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-dotnet)
    
*   Java [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-java](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-java)
    
*   Rust [https://github.com/binance/binance-spot-connector-rust](https://github.com/binance/binance-spot-connector-rust)
    
*   PHP [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-php](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-php)
    
*   Go [https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-go](https://github.com/binance/binance-connector-go)
    

### Postman Collections[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/quick-start#postman-collections "Postman Collections的直接链接")

Postman 集合现已推出。推荐给寻求快速和轻松地开始使用 API 的新用户。

[https://github.com/binance/binance-api-postman](https://github.com/binance/binance-api-postman)

### Swagger[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/quick-start#swagger "Swagger的直接链接")

以下有提供包含 RESTful API 的 OpenAPI 规范的 YAML 文件，以及可供参考的 Swagger UI 页面。

[https://github.com/binance/binance-api-swagger](https://github.com/binance/binance-api-swagger)

*   [API Key 权限设置](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/quick-start#api-key-%E6%9D%83%E9%99%90%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE)
    
*   [账户](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/quick-start#%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7)
    *   [现货账户](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/quick-start#%E7%8E%B0%E8%B4%A7%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7)
        
    *   [杠杆账户](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/quick-start#%E6%9D%A0%E6%9D%86%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7)
        
*   [API 代码库](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/quick-start#api-%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%E5%BA%93)
    *   [Connectors](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/quick-start#connectors)
        
    *   [Postman Collections](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/quick-start#postman-collections)
        
    *   [Swagger](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/copy_trading/quick-start#swagger)

---

# 更新日志 | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

更新日志
====

2025-12-26[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#2025-12-26 "2025-12-26的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 时效性通知[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#%E6%97%B6%E6%95%88%E6%80%A7%E9%80%9A%E7%9F%A5 "时效性通知的直接链接")

*   **以下有关于REST API变更将在 2026-01-15 07:OO UTC 发生:**  
    调用需要签名的接口时，请在计算签名之前对 payload 进行百分比编码（percent-encode）。不符合此顺序的请求将被拒绝，并返回错误代码 [`-1022 签名不正确`](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/error-code#-1022-invalid_signature)
    。请检查并相应地更新您代码中的签名逻辑部分。

### REST API[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#rest-api "REST API的直接链接")

*   更新了 REST API 文档中有关于 [签名请求示例](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/general-info#post-apiv3order-%E7%9A%84%E7%AD%BE%E5%90%8D%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B)
     的部分。

2024-12-20[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#2024-12-20 "2024-12-20的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   活期借币新增接口：活期借币支持抵押物还款

*   `POST/sapi/v2/loan/flexible/repay/collateral`
*   `GET /sapi/v2/loan/flexible/repay/rate`
*   `GET /sapi/v2/loan/flexible/liquidation/history`

2024-11-05[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#2024-11-05 "2024-11-05的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   根据币安借币（固定利率）的最新升级，币安借币已经下架了如下固定利率借贷对应的SAPI接口(VIP借币定期利率订单不受本次服务更新影响 ):
    
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/loanable/data`
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/collateral/data`
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/borrow`
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/repay`
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/adjust/ltv`
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/customize/margin_call`
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/ongoing/orders`
*   于此同时，币安借币会继续维护如下固定利率借贷的历史订单查询SAPI接口:
    
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/income`
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/borrow/history`
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/ltv/adjustment/history`
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/repay/history`

2024-02-27[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#2024-02-27 "2024-02-27的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   根据币安借币（浮动利率）的[最新升级](https://www.binance.com/zh-CN/support/announcement/%E5%B8%81%E5%AE%89%E5%8D%87%E7%BA%A7%E8%B4%A8%E6%8A%BC%E5%80%9F%E5%B8%81-%E6%B4%BB%E6%9C%9F%E5%88%A9%E7%8E%87-%E4%BA%A7%E5%93%81-2024-02-27-d35942110b53480581773fc62a3e6eae)
     ，
    
    *   币安借币已于 2024-02-27 08:00 (UTC) 添加以下 /v2 SAPI 接口。用户可以使用 v2 SAPI 接口来下单、还款和管理 2024-02-27 08:00 (UTC) 之后创建的 币安借币（浮动利率 新版）订单。
        
        *   `POST /sapi/v2/loan/flexible/borrow`
        *   `GET /sapi/v2/loan/flexible/ongoing/orders`
        *   `GET /sapi/v2/loan/flexible/borrow/history`
        *   `POST /sapi/v2/loan/flexible/repay`
        *   `GET /sapi/v2/loan/flexible/repay/history`
        *   `POST /sapi/v2/loan/flexible/adjust/ltv`
        *   `GET /sapi/v2/loan/flexible/ltv/adjustment/history`
        *   `GET /sapi/v2/loan/flexible/loanable/data`
        *   `GET /sapi/v2/loan/flexible/collateral/data`
    *   此外，币安借币将在以下时间停止维护 /v1 SAPI 接口：
        
        *   在 2024-02-27 08:00 (UTC):
            *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/borrow`
            *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/loanable/data`
            *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/collateral/data`
        *   在 2024-04-24 03:00 (UTC):
            *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/ongoing/orders`
            *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/repay`
            *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/adjust/ltv`
    *   币安借币还将继续维护以下 /v1 SAPI 接口，以便用户查看在 2024-02-27 08:00 (UTC) 之前浮动利率的订单历史。
        
        *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/borrow/history`
        *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/repay/history`
        *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/ltv/adjustment/history`

* * *

2023-08-26[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#2023-08-26 "2023-08-26的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   新增质押借币接口：
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/borrow`: 活期借币借贷
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/ongoing/orders`: 查询活期借款中订单列表
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/borrow/history`: 查询活期借币历史记录
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/repay`: 活期借币还款
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/repay/history`: 查询活期借币还款记录历史
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/adjust/ltv`: 调整活期借币质押率
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/ltv/adjustment/history`: 查询活期借币质押率调整历史
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/loanable/data`: 查询活期借币可借币种数据
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/collateral/data`: 查询活期借币抵押币种数据

* * *

2023-02-21[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#2023-02-21 "2023-02-21的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   修改质押借币接口:
    
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/borrow`: 参数`loanTerm`仅可传 7 或 30

* * *

2022-11-01[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#2022-11-01 "2022-11-01的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   添加质押借币接口：
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/loanable/data`： 获取可借币种的利率和借贷限额。借入限额以美元价值显示。
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/collateral/data`： 获取抵押币种质押率信息和质押限额。质押限额以美元价值显示。
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/repay/collateral/rate`： 获取抵押物还款时，抵押/借贷币种的汇率价格。汇率价格有效时间为 8 秒。
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/customize/margin_call`： 质押借币自定义补仓质押率，仅可针对进行中订单，自定义补仓质押率。

* * *

2022-09-15[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#2022-09-15 "2022-09-15的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   添加质押借币接口：
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/borrow`：借币 - 质押借币借贷
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/borrow/history`：借币 - 查询质押借币历史记录
    *   `GET/sapi/v1/loan/ongoing/orders`：借币 - 查询借款中订单列表
    *   `POST/sapi/v1/loan/repay`：还款 - 质押借币还款
    *   `GET/sapi/v1/loan/repay/history`：还款 - 查询还款记录历史
    *   `POST/sapi/v1/loan/adjust/ltv`：调整质押率 - 质押借币调整质押率
    *   `GET/sapi/v1/loan/ltv/adjustment/history`：调整质押率 - 查询质押率调整历史

* * *

2021-11-08[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#2021-11-08 "2021-11-08的直接链接")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   新增质押借币接口:
    *   新增查询质押借币资金流水接口`GET /sapi/v1/loan/income`以支持用户查询质押借币资金流水历史

*   [2025-12-26](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#2025-12-26)
    *   [时效性通知](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#%E6%97%B6%E6%95%88%E6%80%A7%E9%80%9A%E7%9F%A5)
        
    *   [REST API](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#rest-api)
        
*   [2024-12-20](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#2024-12-20)
    
*   [2024-11-05](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#2024-11-05)
    
*   [2024-02-27](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#2024-02-27)
    
*   [2023-08-26](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#2023-08-26)
    
*   [2023-02-21](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan#2023-02-21)

        *   `GET /sapi/v2/loan/flexible/borrow/history`
        *   `POST /sapi/v2/loan/flexible/repay`
        *   `GET /sapi/v2/loan/flexible/repay/history`
        *   `POST /sapi/v2/loan/flexible/adjust/ltv`
        *   `GET /sapi/v2/loan/flexible/ltv/adjustment/history`
        *   `GET /sapi/v2/loan/flexible/loanable/data`
        *   `GET /sapi/v2/loan/flexible/collateral/data`
    *   此外，币安借币将在以下时间停止维护 /v1 SAPI 接口：
        
        *   在 2024-02-27 08:00 (UTC):
            *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/borrow`
            *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/loanable/data`
            *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/collateral/data`
        *   在 2024-04-24 03:00 (UTC):
            *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/ongoing/orders`
            *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/repay`
            *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/adjust/ltv`
    *   币安借币还将继续维护以下 /v1 SAPI 接口，以便用户查看在 2024-02-27 08:00 (UTC) 之前浮动利率的订单历史。
        
        *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/borrow/history`
        *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/repay/history`
        *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/ltv/adjustment/history`

* * *

2023-08-26[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/change-log#2023-08-26 "2023-08-26的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   新增质押借币接口：
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/borrow`: 活期借币借贷
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/ongoing/orders`: 查询活期借款中订单列表
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/borrow/history`: 查询活期借币历史记录
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/repay`: 活期借币还款
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/repay/history`: 查询活期借币还款记录历史
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/adjust/ltv`: 调整活期借币质押率
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/ltv/adjustment/history`: 查询活期借币质押率调整历史
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/loanable/data`: 查询活期借币可借币种数据
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/flexible/collateral/data`: 查询活期借币抵押币种数据

* * *

2023-02-21[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/change-log#2023-02-21 "2023-02-21的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   修改质押借币接口:
    
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/borrow`: 参数`loanTerm`仅可传 7 或 30

* * *

2022-11-01[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/change-log#2022-11-01 "2022-11-01的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   添加质押借币接口：
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/loanable/data`： 获取可借币种的利率和借贷限额。借入限额以美元价值显示。
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/collateral/data`： 获取抵押币种质押率信息和质押限额。质押限额以美元价值显示。
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/repay/collateral/rate`： 获取抵押物还款时，抵押/借贷币种的汇率价格。汇率价格有效时间为 8 秒。
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/customize/margin_call`： 质押借币自定义补仓质押率，仅可针对进行中订单，自定义补仓质押率。

* * *

2022-09-15[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/change-log#2022-09-15 "2022-09-15的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   添加质押借币接口：
    *   `POST /sapi/v1/loan/borrow`：借币 - 质押借币借贷
    *   `GET /sapi/v1/loan/borrow/history`：借币 - 查询质押借币历史记录
    *   `GET/sapi/v1/loan/ongoing/orders`：借币 - 查询借款中订单列表
    *   `POST/sapi/v1/loan/repay`：还款 - 质押借币还款
    *   `GET/sapi/v1/loan/repay/history`：还款 - 查询还款记录历史
    *   `POST/sapi/v1/loan/adjust/ltv`：调整质押率 - 质押借币调整质押率
    *   `GET/sapi/v1/loan/ltv/adjustment/history`：调整质押率 - 查询质押率调整历史

* * *

2021-11-08[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/change-log#2021-11-08 "2021-11-08的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   新增质押借币接口:
    *   新增查询质押借币资金流水接口`GET /sapi/v1/loan/income`以支持用户查询质押借币资金流水历史

# Get Loan LTV Adjustment History (USER_DATA) | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/stable-rate/user-information/Get-Loan-LTV-Adjustment-History#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

本页总览

查询质押率调整历史(USER\_DATA)
=====================

接口描述[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/stable-rate/user-information/Get-Loan-LTV-Adjustment-History#%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0 "接口描述的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

查询质押率调整历史

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/stable-rate/user-information/Get-Loan-LTV-Adjustment-History#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

`GET /sapi/v1/loan/ltv/adjustment/history`

请求权重(IP)[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/stable-rate/user-information/Get-Loan-LTV-Adjustment-History#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8Dip "请求权重(IP)的直接链接")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**400**

请求参数[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/stable-rate/user-information/Get-Loan-LTV-Adjustment-History#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0 "请求参数的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| 名称  | 类型  | 是否必需 | 描述  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| orderId | LONG | NO  |     |
| loanCoin | STRING | NO  |     |
| collateralCoin | STRING | NO  |     |
| startTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| endTime | LONG | NO  |     |
| current | LONG | NO  | 当前查询页数，从 1 开始。默认值：1；最大：1000。 |
| limit | LONG | NO  | 默认值：10；最大：100。 |
| recvWindow | LONG | NO  |     |
| timestamp | LONG | YES |     |

> *   如果没有发送 startTime 和 endTime，默认返回最近 90 天的数据。
> *   startTime 和 endTime 的最大间隔为 180 天。

响应示例[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/crypto_loan/stable-rate/user-information/Get-Loan-LTV-Adjustment-History#%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E7%A4%BA%E4%BE%8B "响应示例的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Connect | Binance Open Platform

[跳到主要内容](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/portfolio-margin/user-data-streams/Connect#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

账户信息流连接
=======

*   本篇所列出REST接口的baseurl **[https://papi.binance.com](https://papi.binance.com/)
    **
    
*   用于订阅账户数据的 `listenKey` 从创建时刻起有效期为60分钟
    
*   可以通过`PUT`一个`listenKey`延长60分钟有效期，如收到`-1125`报错提示此`listenKey`不存在，建议重新使用`POST /papi/v1/listenKey`生成`listenKey`
    
*   可以通过`DELETE`一个 `listenKey` 立即关闭当前数据流，并使该`listenKey` 无效
    
*   在具有有效`listenKey`的帐户上执行`POST`将返回当前有效的`listenKey`并将其有效期延长60分钟
    
*   Websocket连接方式：
    
    *   连接方式一：
    *   Base Url: **wss://fstream.binance.com/pm**
    *   订阅账户数据流的stream名称为 **/ws/\`<listenKey>\`**
    *   连接样例：
    *   `wss://fstream.binance.com/pm/ws/pqia91ma19a5s61cv6a81va65sdf19v8a65a1a5s61cv6a81va65sdf19v8a65a1`
*   每个链接有效期不超过24小时，请妥善处理断线重连。
    
*   单一账户，单一连接的推送数据流消息可以保证时间序; **强烈建议您使用 E 字段进行排序**
    
*   考虑到剧烈行情下, RESTful接口可能存在查询延迟，我们强烈建议您优先从Websocket user data stream推送的消息来获取订单，仓位等信息。

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

查询可交易的币对的信息，以及它们分别所支持交易金额的上下限。

HTTP请求[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/usds-margined-futures/convert/List-all-convert-pairs#http%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82 "HTTP请求的直接链接")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

请求权重[​](https://developers.binance.com/docs/zh-CN/derivatives/usds-margined-futures/convert/List-all-convert-pairs#%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%9D%83%E9%87%8D "请求权重的直接链接")
